R0042.name: Run: Roko's Dragon
R0042.description: The World Dragon will spare you but only if you do everything in your power to further its goals.

R0066.name: Run: Vengeance
R0066.description: The World Dragon's son has traveled back in time to prevent you from killing his father (or mother).

R0086.name: Run: Rematch
R0086.description: Upon defeating the World Dragon, a stronger version of the World Dragon will spawn, now more adapted and knowledgeable to better counter your strategies.

R0086-A0000.name: Run: This Isn't Even My Final Form
R0086-A0000.description: Upon defeating the second World Dragon, it will evolve into its Awakened Form for a third fight.

R0023.name: Run: Gotta Catch Them All!
R0023.description: All 151 gen 1 Pokémon are loosed into the world! You must complete your collection before the World Dragon dies. You begin with 10 Pokéballs, and goblin traders occasionally sell them at exorbitant prices. Only Pokémon can be caught in Pokéballs. Pokémon remain hostile after being captured unless you have some method of taming them.

R0058.name: Run: The Dad Who Stepped Up
R0058.description: You must complete your run while taking care of a perpetually 8-month-old half-somalian half-[your race] baby. Any harm, damage or feeling inflicted on or experienced by the baby is transferred to you with a 3x multiplier (including sadness, fear, hunger). Additionally, you mirror the baby’s excretory functions, without the ability to “hold it in.” The baby is indestructible, though anything that happens to the baby that would be fatal to it is instead superfatal to you.

R0017.name: Run: Festive
R0017.description: Never fail to celebrate a holiday during your stay on the island. Calendar not included.

R0027.name: Run: Infamous
R0027.description: Start with -INF Reputation for all factions and races.

R0050.name: Run: Stoneblock
R0050.description: Islands are instead caves surrounded by infinite solid rock in all directions WARNING: Limited oxygen!

R0030.name: Run: Level of Violence
R0030.description: You must inflict a total of at least 1e18 GDP (Gross Damage Points).

R0098.name: Run: Don't Stop
R0098.description: Staying within a zone of 3m x 3m x 3m for more than 30 minutes will cause you to violently explode.

R0070.name: Run: World Series
R0070.description: The World Dragon and its Followers must be defeated in a baseball match. Choose your team wisely.

R0038.name: Run: No Hit
R0038.description: If you take damage you die.

R0100.name: Run: Mind Over Matter
R0100.description: You continuously feel the total collective pain and suffering of all creatures in The 'Verse.

R0049.name: Run: Speedrun
R0049.description: Every time you do any action, a timer will come into view. Complete the action before the timer hits zero or your run is over.

R0061.name: Run: The God Run
R0061.description: The run continues after you defeat the World Dragon and ends once you defeat God.

R0011.name: Run: Collector's Edition
R0011.description: Collect 100 items with Supernova level rarity or higher

R0091.name: Run: Forever Faithful
R0091.description: Within 3 years, you must get married to a denizen of The 'Verse. After that, you can no longer be more than 3 km from them without feeling linearly increasing emotional distress, must always be faithful to them (even after death), and cannot kill them or let them die through indifference.

R0074.name: Run: Paying it Forward
R0074.description: Before killing the World Dragon and during the first 100 years of your adventure, you must design Neo CYOA 三. It must have at least twice as many items as Neue CYOA Deux, and the items must collectively have equivalent or greater median sovl. The World Dragon will impartially judge your submission, once.

R0092.name: Run: Busy Schedule
R0092.description: You are provided with a schedule book and pen. You must now schedule all activities appropriately or you'll incur a -90% penalty to all stats.

R0097.name: Run: World 4
R0097.description: Everything is bigger by a factor of 10 including land masses and creatures but not your starting island, tree, chest, items you take, or your body. Distances between islands are also longer by a factor of 10. Renewable food sources such as plants or prey animals are not affected by this.

R0088.name: Run: The Escapee
R0088.description: The World Dragon and his minions have framed you! The caravan of High King Leothold of the Vaneck Jackelfs on his pilgrimage to the World's Light in High Yendor was cozened and robbed by a group of highwaymen who then kidnapped his daughter, Princess Anise. And the leader of these bandits? None other than you! Or so it seemed... Now you're one of The 'Verse's most wanted outlaws, with a bounty of 10,000,000 Sapphyres on your head. Additionally, Special 'Verse Task Force Omicron Epsilon has been deployed to track you down to the ends of The 'Verse, and they'll stop at nothing to make you talk. Will you find evidence to clear your name, or blacken it even further?

R0085.name: Run: The Final Solution
R0085.description: In addition to the World Dragon and its kin, any other race that generally displeases you must be entirely wiped out.

R0019.name: Run: Gameshark
R0019.description: Cheats are enabled, but Hell is real (again).

R0045.name: Run: Seduce and Destroy
R0045.description: Go on at least 25,000 dates with different women during your stay in The 'Verse.

R0059.name: Run: The Final Forgiveness
R0059.description: After defeating the World Dragon, you are brought to the afterlife. Before winning the run, you must make amends with all slain creatures, regardless of morality or intelligence, and get them to forgive you for killing them.

R0099.name: Run: The Ultimate Showdown
R0099.description: In addition to defeating the World Dragon, you now have to defeat Cataclysm Godzilla, Nega Batman, Post-Cyberpocalypse Shaq, Demon Form Aaron Carter, Slave Owner Abraham Lincoln, Cracked Optimus Prime, Rainbow Belt Jackie Chan, Cursed Indiana Jones, Teh Care Bear Of Doom, Chuck Norris, Gandalf the Silver, Gandalf the Alabaster, Monty Python and the Holy Grail's funniest jokes, Allied Powers Mussolini, The Cobalt Meanie, Dark World Cowboy Curtis, Dark World Jambi the Genie, ChatGPT-powered RoboCop, Grok-powered The Terminator, Führer Kirk, Death Vader, Dragon-form Lo Pan, Locked In Superman, The "White Power" Rangers, Bill & Ted's Excellent Video Game Adventure for NES, Sigma Spock, The Rocket, Dr. Octogonapus, Comrade Hogan and Unbounded Mister Rogers.

R0068.name: Run: Cart Life
R0068.description: You have a job preparing hotdogs at a small cart with an umbrella. you must work a minimum of 40 hours every week. You will lose one random item for every minute shy of 40hrs you are at the end of the week. Every hour of overtime worked provides a small bonus to a random stat. You are perpetually depressed. The smell of hotdogs cannot be washed out of your uniform and becomes slightly more pungent with every day worked.

R0034.name: Run: May the Best Racer Win
R0034.description: You must now defeat the World Dragon in a Go-Kart race.

R0014.name: Run: Easy Mode
R0014.description: Gain +5.3% items, +1 all stats, but halfway through the run you will suddenly die of a heart attack and be told to play on normal mode to reach the true ending

R0093.name: Run: Free To Pay
R0093.description: You can perform 30 free actions a day, after which you faint for 24 hours. More actions per day can be purchased with gems. Each action costs one gem.

R0078.name: Run: Neutral Route
R0078.description: Upon defeating the World Dragon, your Alignment must be Neutral.

R0055.name: Run: Total Drama Island
R0055.description: Keep your viewers entertained, or the run ends.

R0036.name: Run: Nameless
R0036.description: Learn the true name of an elder god of your choice who lost their domain during the Fall. Assist it in reconstruction of its aspect and receive rewards. All other gods will work against you.

R0056.name: Run: The Bad Ending
R0056.description: It's over. The World Dragon has already taken over The 'Verse, destroying it and leaving what little of the population that remains in a state of chaos. All that's left for you do is to take The 'Verse back and try to salvage what is left...

R0101.name: Run: Fall Guys
R0101.description: There is now a death barrier 100 meters below your island that encompasses the entirety of The 'Verse. If you go beyond the barrier, you die and your run is over.

R0031.name: Run: Linked
R0031.description: You and the World Dragon are linked, physically and mentally. You know what the World Dragon sees and thinks at all times, and vice versa. Additionally, any wounds inflicted on the World Dragon are inflicted on you as well, but not vice versa for some reason. It seems that slaying this beast will be the death of you, literally.

R0012.name: Run: Curse Of The Dawn
R0012.description: You take damage from The Sun.

R0071.name: Run: YLYL
R0071.description: You instantly die should you utter as much as a snicker. Children's party clowns and Netflix comedians are inbound to your location.

R0002.name: Run: A Battle of Wits
R0002.description: You must beat the World Dragon in a heated debate. Be warned; its words are as sharp as its claws, and its mind is as bright as its fire...

R0052.name: Run: That Dragon, Cancer
R0052.description: The World Dragon can now utilize mental attacks against you from any distance.

R0096.name: Run: Tactical
R0096.description: You now move on a grid-based system

R0051.name: Run: Super Picky
R0051.description: You can only eat chicken nuggets with no sauce. Anything else will give you 0 hunger.

R0057.name: Run: The Balance
R0057.description: The more your Karmic Value strays from zero the longer the Strings that make up the universe are stretched.

R0067.name: Run: Victory Royale
R0067.description: Exterminate all life in the universe. Every year, the eye of the storm shrinks.

R0048.name: Run: SPAAAAAAAAAAAACE!
R0048.description: The island now exists in a vacuum similar to space, with stars in the distance but no planets. You will be given adequate time to prepare at the start. Hope you brought your spacesuit!

R0102.name: Run: Capeshit
R0102.description:
All 'Verse creatures are now Superheroic. Roll a D9 for your own Superpower:
1. Invisibility 
2. Mind Reading
3. Super-strength
4. Flight
5. Psychokinesis 
6. Super-speed
7. Shape-shifting
8. Magic
9. Super-smarts

R0029.name: Run: Let There Be Darkness
R0029.description: Holy attributes incense the Gods, and the unholy angers demons. The firmament instantly shatters. All the world will be your enemy.

R0083.name: Run: On A Diet
R0083.description: If at any point in your run your BMI is considered overweight, the run is over and you die.

R0032.name: Run: Long Way Down
R0032.description: Your island is no longer unaffected by gravity.

R0007.name: Run: Blood Brothers (AKA Co-Op 2)
R0007.description: Choose a friend to join you. You will be bound together by the Blood Pact. Choose two other runs and take no extra points. EVERYTHING will be twice as difficult...

R0060.name: Run: The Game
R0060.description: If you lose The Game, you die.

R0037.name: Run: Neue Cyoa Babies
R0037.description: You now inhabit the unaging body of your infant self.

R0025.name: Run: Home-Stuck
R0025.description: You have to defeat the World Dragon without leaving your starting island.

R0026.name: Run: I Have a Special Plan for The 'Verse
R0026.description: You must remove The 'Verse from existence.

R0016.name: Run: Everyone Disliked That
R0016.description: Humanity's space radio broadcasts were just too fucking reddit and gay, angering intergalactic powers. Hostile starfleets from multiple advanced alien races surround your island seconds after you spawn in.

R0062.name: Run: The Political Machine
R0062.description: It's election season, and so you must win the hearts and minds of the people or use any other method you wish to beat the World Dragon in a bid for presidency. It'll be far from easy though as the World Dragon will similarly stop at nothing to become commander in chief, this means lobbying, dirty dealings, assassinations, smear tactics, the works. If you fail to become president you can try again after 4 years, but it will be significantly harder to oust the incumbent.

R0069.name: Run: Wake up
R0069.description: Lose all your items. It hurts... I can still see... Where am I?

R0009.name: Run: Boss Rush
R0009.description: All bosses except the World Dragon now spawn on your starting island

R0081.name: Run: Z-Rank
R0081.description: You must have a Score of at most 0 when you kill the World Dragon.

R0081-A0000.name: Run: Ω-Rank
R0081-A0000.description: You must have a score of at most -1e9 when you kill the World Dragon.

R0047.name: Run: Slowrun
R0047.description: Every time you do any action, a timer will come into view. Do not complete the action until the timer hits zero, or your run is over.

R0053.name: Run: That Which Begins
R0053.description: The void around you is no longer a blue sky, but an endless black void. You can hear whispers beyond your island... You will not last very long.

R0064.name: Run: Hero of Legend
R0064.description:
"O Hero, we call upon you to protect us!" Uh, buddy... They're talking about YOU (if you take this Run).
You will be appointed as the Guardian Hero of a randomly selected civilization ("Your People") within a 150 km sphere from your starting island which is currently at war with a different civilization. As the Guardian Hero, you must accomplish the following: end the current war it's engaged in such that the outcome is generally favorable to Your People, ensure the continued prosperity and existence of Your People, and acquire for Your People 1000x more land than they currently possess. You are given a piece of paper with the name of Your People and a picture of their capital city (or village, hovel, etc)

R0005.name: Run: All Life is Precious
R0005.description: You instantly die if you kill anything

R0095.name: Run: House Rules
R0095.description: All ensouled beings in The 'Verse may now buy volumes of space with gems, which become claimed as their Domain. For extra gems, Owner's Rules may be applied to Domains, which can restrict the actions ensouled beings may take within them. Societies in The 'Verse naturally become oriented around this.

R0076.name: Run: Neue High
R0076.description: You're now enrolled for 2 semesters in a high school on a nearby island, though you're not told which. You must get a date for the prom, which will happen within 1 year, and you must pass at least 2 classes.

R0089.name: Run: School Days
R0089.description: You now have homework you need to do every day. Your assignments start at high school level and will increase in difficulty each year, unbounded. Failure to complete an assignment before the due date will result in death and the termination of the run.

R0054.name: Run: The "Weird" Route
R0054.description: You need to pee constantly and also the clouds are made of urine vapor instead of water vapor and you  need to drink pee of other creatures instead of water to survive and the air smells like piss.

R0079.name: Run: A-Rank
R0079.description: You must have a Score of at least 1e9 when you kill the World Dragon.

R0079-A0000.name: Run: S-Rank
R0079-A0000.description: You must have a Score of at least 1e15 when you kill the World Dragon.

R0044.name: Run: Salesmanship
R0044.description: You're now hired by Gefelt the Greedy Goblin as a salesman of his Magical Midas Lacquer. You must make enough sales per month to keep his business afloat.

R0033.name: Run: Massively Multiplayer
R0033.description: You are not alone!  Hundreds of the most determined humans from Earth are given their own islands and the same items you chose. First to kill the World Dragon wins! All losers experience Truedeath.

R0003.name: Run: A Journey of Transformation
R0003.description: Reach level 999 in strength, farming, and cultivation.

R0041.name: Run: Quid Pro Quo
R0041.description: Start off with a trash bin on your island. Every day you must throw 1 kg of matter into it. Matter inside is irretrievably lost. Every year the amount you need to put in increases by 25%.

R0077.name: Run: Shut Up, Faker!
R0077.description: Somewhere in the void an evil clone/doppelganger of yourself is also playing this CYOA, except their goal is to kill you and assist the World Dragon in its goals in any way possible.

R0077-A0000.name: Live And Learn
R0077-A0000.description: Your doppelganger is no longer mindlessly evil, just troubled and misunderstood. If you could just get through to him maybe you could join forces...

R0103.name: Run: Thoughts And Prayers
R0103.description: You must perform the Lord's Prayer, the Liturgy of the Hours, the Fajr, Zuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha, the Amidah, the Shacharit, Mincha, and Ma'ariv, the Sandhyavandanam, the Nitnem, the Sāmāyika, The 108 Prostrations, the Prajñāpāramita-Hṛdayam Sutra and the Ōharae no Kotoba daily.

R0090.name: Run: Fuck All Of You
R0090.description: After defeating the World Dragon you will be given 5 years in your home universe to eradicate humanity.

R0006.name: Run: Back in Time for Dinner
R0006.description: You only have one afternoon to defeat the World Dragon. If you don't make it back in time, you will be forcibly teleported home and your mom will beat you.

R0010.name: Run: Carnivore
R0010.description: You only gain sustenance from human flesh.

R0072.name: Run: Teh Urn
R0072.description: Tall Aext, Tords, Whoughts nnd Shrases era aow pcrambled.

R0087.name: Run: Dogscape
R0087.description: Every island's terrain is replaced with dogs, except for Star Material which is replaced with Dog Material.

R0020.name: Run: Genocide
R0020.description: If anything you see stays alive for more than a day besides yourself you die.

R0008.name: Run: Boggy's Basics
R0008.description: Every hour, a math problem will pop into the center of your vision. You have 15 minutes to solve it. If you answer incorrectly, the world loses a little bit of light. The difficulty of the problems increase with every correct answer and they never decrease in difficulty. The darkness effect is permanent and stacks, but correct answers will reset the light level. Don't let it get too dark...

R0046.name: Run: Sleepover Game Night
R0046.description: You must defeat the World Dragon in a series of island-hopping minigames and dice rolls that follows Mario Party rules.

R0035.name: Run: Minesweeper
R0035.description: Every floating island is now filled with hidden landmines.

R0084.name: Run: The 'Verse Is Fucking Dead
R0084.description: Almost all NPCs fall into one of three groups: the majority perform rote, irrational, and wasteful routines like chopping down all the trees in a forest and then burning all of the wood in a huge pile. These will mostly not talk, though those that do will only repeat the same phrases over and over again. The other two types are: wandering, overpowered groups of NPCs that want to mindlessly kill anyone that crosses their paths, and groups of seemingly-regular NPCs gathered in town squares that silently stare off into the distance most of the time. The latter group will occasionally respond to you, sometimes speaking of the better times before this all happened, but will soon lapse back into their long silence.

R0075.name: Run: Evil Has A Thousand Names
R0075.description: You must now collect the Mirror Shard by defeating the Multiplicity Demon in order to summon the World Dragon. The Multiplicity Demon will have possessed all the inhabitants of a nearby island and will devote all of their resources to finding and killing you, but will always try to conceal its existence. Only when all the possessed are dead or exorcised will the Multiplicity Demon be defeated.

R0040.name: Run: Play It Again
R0040.description: All bosses except the World Dragon respawn after 3 months.

R0004.name: Run: About Damn Time
R0004.description: Stay in The 'Verse for at least 2,000 years

R0001.name: Run: [SPECIAL] You Can (Not) Choose Your Own Adventure
R0001.description: Item choices are made for you by a randomly-picked person.

R0024.name: Run: Home Away From Home
R0024.description: You must grow your island to the size of Kazakhstan.

R0013.name: Run: Don't Shit Your Pants
R0013.description: But you really have to go

R0065.name: Run: To The Moon!
R0065.description: A huge white celestial body now rests 385,000 km above your island. Make your way to it and destroy it, but beware: werewolves love the full moon!

R0022.name: Run: Getting Wood
R0022.description: Kill the World Dragon with only a stick.

R0039.name: Run: Pet 'Scape
R0039.description: Instead of spawning on your starting island, you spawn in a 15 x 25 x 30 meter hamster cage located on an island 1 km away from it. A 70 meter tall featureless humanoid capable of wingless flight will care for you, providing meager but acceptable meals, water, and fresh bedding, but will always try to return you to your cage if you try to escape. It cannot understand your language.

R0021.name: Run: Get On My Level
R0021.description: All living things that would normally be weaker than you are now as strong as you are.

R0015.name: Run: Every Dog Has Its Day

U1560.name: DOOM
U1560.description: Killing demons is now 666% more epic.

U1082.name: Time Out
U1082.description: You have the ability to stop time.

U0709.name: Lucky Bag
U0709.description: Loot bags have a 0.01% chance of increasing your Lck by 0.01.

U0780.name: Rollplay
U0780.description: During your stay in The 'Verse, you must roleplay as the character you roll below and stick to a fake backstory. Breaking character or failing to play your role will result in intense pain that can be fatal after a long enough period. A glowing star on your forehead

U1842.name: Reinforcement Learning
U1842.description: It feels good when your Score increases.

U0925.name: Sham Hypeman
U0925.description: You are incapable of telling the truth. Everything you say or write must contain at least a small lie.

U1593.name: Large Rock
U1593.description: 2x damage to glass bridges with people standing on them

U0647.name: It's A Pretty View
U0647.description: Astolfo, is suicidal and will jump into the void.

U0769.name: NASA's Folly
U0769.description: A glowing crack appears in the firmament.

U0214.name: Adventurer's Guild
U0214.description: A high quality profile is made for you on GuildIn advertizing your skills. You will need a suitable conduit and Intraley connection to access your profile.

U1329.name: Snow Globe
U1329.description: You experience visual snow at all times.

U0386.name: Come and Go
U0386.description: Every time you enter a door, it makes the “entering a gas station” sound

U1955.name: DON'T
U1955.description: The script you would've written for that mystery box show you said were going to write appears on your island. Strange things start happening if you read it...

U0231.name: Alternative Medicine
U0231.description: Every day you wake up with a new acupuncture needle somewhere in your skin.

U0603.name: Human Science
U0603.description: Quaffing unknown potions will be guaranteed to not cause fatal harm or fatal poisoning

U1458.name: The Stanley Parable
U1458.description: You may create a flat stanley of any design you wish and send it off to another random session and you will recieve one random flat stanley in return after seven business days

U0331.name: Brofist
U0331.description: Your island comes with a single wooden barrel

U0624.name: Immersion
U0624.description: Every race speaks a different conlang invented by a different autistic 16 year old

U1321.name: The Promised Land
U1321.description: Your island takes up the same volume/square meters, but it is now shaped like a six-sided star.

U1321-A0000.name: Inconsequential Land Dispute
U1321-A0000.description: The size of your starting island is multiplied by 4, but there's a town of Elfkin not too far away that claim your island belongs to them.

U1619.name: Verseland
U1619.description: Amusement parks in The 'Verse are more common, fun, and dangerous.

U0641.name: Inventory
U0641.description: A piece of college ruled notebook paper. Anything written on it that is carried on your person will return to you if it is lost or stolen.

U1500.name: Wagie
U1500.description: A button that, when pressed, allows you to work a fast food service job for as long as you want (1 million years minimum) and receive the corresponding payment based on minimum wage.

U2020.name: 500 milliliters of liquid nitrogen in a brown paper bag.

U0907.name: Saintly
U0907.description: Your dead body will never decay

U0937.name: Silent Chills
U0937.description: There is now permanent fog in the void, reducing visibility everywhere to about 20 meters.

U0937-A0000.name: They Follow
U0937-A0000.description: You can see Them in the fog.

U0826.name: Options Menu
U0826.description: You may optionally disable music, view bobbing, motion blur, bloom, and god rays IRL.

U0600.name: Housing Crisis
U0600.description: The entire 8-billion-and-counting population of earth is spawned on your island. No size increase included.

U1729.name: Don't TAS Me Bro
U1729.description: A maximally-optimized defeat of the World Dragon and all events leading up to it are shown to you in the form of a tool assisted speedrun. You do not gain any progress from this run and your memory of it is erased upon the run's completion, but it will give you a small sense of being entertained for its runtime.

U1817.name: I Need Scissors, 61
U1817.description: 61 pairs of kids safety scissors are yours now.

U1728.name: Deep Lore
U1728.description: Lootboxes have a 1% chance of only containing copies of random written correspondences of different NPCs in The 'Verse.

U1879.name: Vacation Destination
U1879.description: A map to the Gilded Isles + a brochure.

U1879-A0000.name: Must-See Places
U1879-A0000.description: Your map includes the scenic route, which includes stops at Pangerey Falls, The Quasar Nexus, and Gnomehell.

U1879-A0001.name: Tourist
U1879-A0001.description: Khakis, flip-flops, cheap plastic sunglasses, and a Hawaiian shirt

U1879-A0003.name: Never Miss A Moment
U1879-A0003.description: An instant print camera which can take 40 photos.

U0956.name: Spirit of the Jester
U0956.description: Wearing a full clown suit multiplies your End by 1.5x

U1162.name: You Are A Toy
U1162.description: Secrets of Golemancy are revealed to you. 100 souls can be used to create 1 artificial soul capable of inhabiting 10kg of matter

U0172.name: A set of 5 ceramic plates decorated with a checkerboard pattern

U1981.name: Positive Feedback Loop
U1981.description: A blank piece of paper which becomes more attractive to you the more you masturbate to it.

U0245.name: An ancient, enchanted GPU from a lost civilization. Specifications unknown.

U1435.name: Mist
U1435.description: Your island comes with mysterious underground puzzles but the solutions are gated behind annoying gay lore that takes too long to read.
stats: backstory diary entries no one cares about

U1720.name: Inaction Figure
U1720.description: You can become entirely solid plastic at will.

U0205.name: A wooden fishing boat that always hovers at the same height, though it can be pushed up or down with enough force

U0426.name: Death's Note
U0426.description: You will receive a daily newspaper full only of obituaries for residents of The 'Verse that died the previous day

U0582.name: Heaven & Hell
U0582.description: Void Angels now spawn in addition to Void Demons

U0582-A0000.name: Through The Fire and Flames
U0582-A0000.description: Void Dragons now spawn as well

U0734.name: Mementos
U0734.description: During your time in The 'Verse, you will only be able to hold a week's worth of new memories at a time. Every Sunday at midnight your memories get reset.

U0627.name: Imperfect Vessel
U0627.description: You can replace your skin with other materials and your body will adapt to them.

U2061.name: Po-Oc
U2061.description: Your anti-form joins you on the island. If you come into physical contact with them it will cause an explosion releasing 1,000 foes of energy.

U0602.name: How Do I Summon Succubus?
U0602.description: Every day, you may perform a unique ritual of your choice which has a 0.1% chance of summoning a succubus.

U1457.name: Wrong Warp
U1457.description: Intraversal wormholes are now common in The 'Verse.

U1457-A0000.name: World 1-1
U1457-A0000.description: Your starting island has a wormhole on it that leads to a different island.

U1457-A0001.name: The Nexus
U1457-A0001.description: Your starting island now has 12 different wormholes leading to different islands.

U1457-A0002.name: Credits Warp
U1457-A0002.description: There is a wormhole on your starting island leading directly to the World Mountain.

U1457-A0003.name: Teleport Maze
U1457-A0003.description: Wormholes are no longer guaranteed to have symmetric destinations.

U0708.name: Luck of The Irish
U0708.description: If you're Irish, your Lck is raised by x1.01

U1029.name: The Isles of Albion
U1029.description: A series of large islands themed upon Merry England appear not too far from you. These jolly islanders will often set sail in their skyships and venture to faraway lands looking to establish trade or colonies. Cheerio!

U1109.name: Vaccinated
U1109.description: You become immune to all viruses, fungi, and bacteria, but this includes your gut microbiome

U1626.name: Tales From The 'Verse: Escape From The Sky Island Collector's Edition
U1626.description: Puzzles involving random objects now plague you wherever you go.

U0563.name: Guess Who's Back
U0563.description: The Grim Reaper from The Grim Adventures of Billy and Mandy joins you on your adventure. However, looks like he left his scythe back home this time...

U0496.name: Fasting
U0496.description: For every 3 consecutive days you don't eat or drink anything nourishing you permanently gain +0.1 Spd. If you last for 6 days you gain +0.35 Spd.

U1164.name: You are immune to Knockback, but you pass lead stool instead of normal feces.

U1977.name: I Yam What I Yam
U1977.description: One (1) can of spinach from Popeye. Tastes like motor oil

U0294.name: Beauty and the Beast
U0294.description: The combined total of your Chr and Str can be allocated to only one or the other at any given time. Switching between the two takes a day.

U1938.name: Starter Familiars
U1938.description: 2,500 loyal fruit flies which will follow your every command.

U1718.name: Happily Ever After
U1718.description: After you defeat the World Dragon, all the bosses resurrect and you go out to "the pub" as "mates" for an evening.

U1389.name: Splat
U1389.description: You can now create 4 illusory copies of an object you're holding to your left or right, each separated by a distance of 1 meter.

U1389-A0000.name: Swizzle
U1389-A0000.description: You may now swap objects you are holding with their illusory copies

U1762.name: Switching Sides
U1762.description: Rift Serpents, Void Drakes, and Wyrm Guardians are no longer loyal to the World Dragon.

U0865.name: Protagonistic Sway
U0865.description: You are the main character of this story. Others are drawn to you and go along with your plans, but they lack interiority and have to be micromanaged. Enemies are mindlessly evil and difficult to persuade.

U0865-A0000.name: Talk no Jutsu
U0865-A0000.description: You can now more easily persuade enemies.

U1684.name: High Functioning
U1684.description: You can no longer stand the feeling of certain objects, the texture of certain foods, and certain sounds are louder and more discomforting.

U1684-A0000.name: Low Functioning
U1684-A0000.description: You have a complete meltdown any time you experience any unfamiliar sensations.

U0415-A0000.name: Green and Purple
U0415-A0000.description: The gummies are now green and purple

U0522.name: Frickin Sweet
U0522.description: VHS tape of footage from inside a brazen bull showing Justin Bieber being slowly cooked alive.

U0522-A0000.name: Second footage is added of FRED getting cooked alive as well.

U0385.name: Come Again?
U0385.description: Get a more in-depth explanation of one Non-Exempt item from a local

U1138.name: Why So Serious?
U1138.description: You can always see the funny side of things

U0263.name: Annoying Fag Slave
U0263.description: Summon Justin Bieber as- just kidding. He gets fucking tortured to death LOL. But you don't get to watch unfortunately.

U1808.name: Free Space
U1808.description: You may take this item without losing any points.

U1808-A0000.name: Free As In Freedom
U1808-A0000.description: You may take this item for free. Its permissive license states there are no restrictions on how you utilize its contents on your run. (Suggested donation of 10 points)

U1808-A0001.name: No Free Lunch
U1808-A0001.description: You will have to pay for this item.

U1273.name: Second Chance
U1273.description: Once upon death, you revive at spawn with no limbs.

U0574.name: Hard Time
U0574.description: Your starting island (and not any added on land or islands) is surrounded by 3 meter tall iron bars.

U0044.name: 50 rusty iron nails scattered around your island

U1942.name: 10 dispersible fast-acting colorless tasteless sleeping pills

U1177.name: You can change your skin color to anything you want while invisible

U1838.name: Saturday Morning Cartoons
U1838.description: Funny shows like The PJs, Game Over, and Glenn Martin DDS come back and unfunny shows like Smiling Friends are cancelled.

U1210.name: You now have 3 feet, but still only 2 legs

U0184.name: A Taste of What's to Come

U2003.name: Night Raper
U2003.description: While completely unencumbered (wearing no clothing or equipment and carrying no items), you may slow down your subjective experience of time by up to 50%, absorb 50% of light, become translucent to 50% of unabsorbed light, cancel 50% of noise your body causes directly, and may become completely undetectable to sentient, sub-Divine beings by inhabiting all valid positions within 2m of solid matter (other than your own body) in a region bounded by a greater than 50% likelihood of one or more sentient, sub-Divine beings detecting your presence (if not for this sub-ability), which can be collapsed at will to rematerialise your form, and is forcibly collapsed when the region's volume is reduced below your physical volume. If the region is partitioned into disjoint subregions, you must choose which subregion to inhabit.

U2014.name: One Ring
U2014.description: A keyring that can hold an unlimited amount of novelty keychains without running out of space or getting heavier.

U0013.name: 15 free stock photos of your choice printed on glossy A4 paper

U1003.name: The Classic
U1003.description: Your starting tree is now a palm tree.

U1008.name: The Crimson Chin
U1008.description: Your chin is now 4 feet longer.

U0878.name: Rationalism
U0878.description: 1.10x INT modifier, but you become vulnerable to infohazards.

U0466.name: Eduardo Godot
U0466.description: Teaches you how to make a videogame in Godot, computer and Godot game engine not included.

U0126.name: A kind hispanic man will mow your island's grass for you.

U2007.name: Fun Alone Or Together
U2007.description: A tether ball pole is added to your island.

U1421.name: Think Quickly!
U1421.description: Your starting island is now made of quicksand

U0679.name: Lambda Calculus
U0679.description: Within the first day you pass a tiny kidney stone shaped like a Greek letter (Get it?). Bringing this stone to the World Dragon will unlock New Game+.

U0847.name: Planned Addition
U0847.description: Pieces of rebar and concrete now jut out of the sides of your island and a meter of scaffolding extends out from it on all sides

U2008.name: Hits Hard
U2008.description: A HitClips player. Comes with a single cartridge in which you narrate your own suicide note. One minute and forty-seven seconds in, you step away and someone else takes over.

U2008-A0000.name: Hits Different
U2008-A0000.description: Another cartridge. I am not allowed to desribe its contents.

U0389.name: Comfort Food
U0389.description: Your favorite fast food resturaunt spawns on the island. You can order anything you want but all the food tastes like styrofoam and isn't filling at all. It is unstaffed and will respond to orders magically. It will eventually run out of food.

U1394.name: Cannonball!
U1394.description: Your starting island gets outfitted with a diving board

U0963.name: Star Fruit
U0963.description: Star Material is now edible, highly delicious, and contains all the nutrients you need to survive. 10 cubic cm supplies about 100 calories.

U1829.name: Buyer's Market
U1829.description: Adventurers are now as common as houseflies. As a result, the questing job market goes to shit. At least it might be easier to find cheap second-hand equipment.

U0304.name: Binary Tree
U0304.description: You now get a flash drive with the equivalent information content as your starting tree

U1783.name: Crime Of Passion
U1783.description: Do 3x damage to any creature whose Romance score is above 70.

U0792.name: Noble Heritage
U0792.description: Begin with complete knowledge of all scientific, artistic, and cultural achievements ever attained by citizens of Indonesia.

U0776.name: Neuvillette
U0776.description: Your Chr is doubled when you speak words given to you by another person to say, halved otherwise.

U1479.name: What's Cookin'?
U1479.description: Your starting island is now a giant grill filled with hot coals.

U0469.name: Elflord Scheme
U0469.description: The warlock ensnares you with an ancient incantation, upon waking from a horrifying feverish dream, you now find yourself shapeshifted into a lost race of elf, thought extinct, you suffer from their bygone ailments, unknown to current medicine and incurable, such as early-onset rheumatoid arthritis of the hands (similar symptoms, but a misdiagnosis) and a rare form of early cone-rod dystrophy and macular degeneration, the lights and the sky look black, your vision is low, very low resolution, dot matrix even, and everything is perceived as unreadable symbols in a 24x80 grid, in a harsh white, yellow, red, cyan or magenta, which cause eye strain and headaches, you prefer to keep your eyes closed. Upon making contact with the Elvish Faction, their leaders recognize you from myths, folklore and fairy tales of their childhood, they offer you nobility, granting you the right to buy lands and command subordinates, but only if you have enough gems.

U1899.name: You Can Take It With You
U1899.description: If an afterlife exists, your gems will join you there.

U0129.name: A lag machine will occasionally activate for intervals ranging from a few seconds to a few days.

U1607.name: I'm Not Racist, My Girlfriend Is A Dark Elf
U1607.description: You are compelled to continuously yell the most applicable racial slur for any creature you see in your view.

U0387.name: Come On and Slam
U0387.description: A basketball hoop is installed next to the tree in your island. Your tree can now grow 1 basketball a month.

U0922.name: Sex Offender
U0922.description: All other races are extremely suspicious of you and will actively try to stop you from coming to their islands. They can be reasoned with.

U0922-A0000.name: Take A Seat
U0922-A0000.description: All other races will now actively try to sabotage you.

U0446.name: Do You Feel Lucky Punk?
U0446.description: Loot boxes found on random islands now have a higher chance of RARE items, but a new CURSED item pool has been added to them.

U1067.name: They Did Surgery On A Grape
U1067.description: Your tree is now a vine that grows grapes.

U1821.name: Mission Impossible
U1821.description: Two fledgling Wurmfolk missionaries from the Order of Huey of Latter-Day Gladvocates have been sent to your island to proselytize.

U0623.name: Ignore Previous Instructions
U0623.description: You can ask GPT-3.5 one question per day.

U0221.name: All containers are 1.1x larger on the inside than the outside.

U0665.name: Just The Flu
U0665.description: Longcovid status effect added. Cannot be removed

U1985.name: Belout's Knapsack
U1985.description: A large, quivering organoid that quickly recovers your mana and majyszka while you're inside.

U0974.name: Stonks
U0974.description: Every publicly traded company started by you increases or decreases one of your stats based on the ratio of its current share price over its original IPO valuation.

U2025.name: The Foolish Young Man Eats The Mountains (愚少吞山)
U2025.description: Every 250kg of clay you ingest increases your Wil and End by 1.

U0499.name: Feared
U0499.description: Enemies overestimate your strength by a factor of 1.10x, which may alter their behavior or tactics.

U1944.name: Always Be Careful, Don't Ever Fumble
U1944.description: Every word you speak needs to start with the next letter of the alphabet or you die.

U1149.name: Wordsmith
U1149.description: The books you publish will all become #1 NY Times Bestsellers

U0439.name: Director's Cut
U0439.description: Some areas are replaced with their beta versions WARNING: Some areas may be unfinished or have glitches. Collision issues may exist.

U0996.name: That Can't Be True
U0996.description: You'll never believe who joins you on your island...

U0297.name: Begin the game with a life-sized gingerbread house.

U0065.name: A 90 year old adventurer on his deathbed
U0065.description: He can tell you stories of his travels.

U0553.name: Godbolt
U0553.description: You now inflict Fire damage equal to your Faith / 1e9

U1139.name: Willy Wonder
U1139.description: A colony of pixies open up a candy factory only 5 miles away from your island! Since pixies are so small and the demand for candy isn't very high, they only produce a gumdrop per week.

U1139-A0000.name: Berry Nice
U1139-A0000.description: The pixies can produce special gum that makes you inflate like a blue berry

U0450.name: Doordash now works but every Doordash driver is stuck on the island with you.
U0450.description: You will need a phone, internet and money.

U1488.name: Land Sanitizer
U1488.description: Vegetation within 1 meter of you quickly withers and dies.

U0313.name: Blood Money
U0313.description: Your FanDuel account gains the ability to use your own blood to bet with.

U0668.name: KekW
U0668.description: You now laugh like "El Risitas", your infectious laughter makes everyone burst into laughter at your wild hijinks!

U1215.name: You take 25% less physical damage from all injuries, but the pain is 100% more intense and lasts for 100% longer.

U0688.name: Learned Sage
U0688.description: Your Int is subtly increased when wearing video game related apparel

U0617.name: I'm Eggcellent
U0617.description: Killing a monster has a 0.002% chance to drop an egg. You can either let the egg hatch over 27 days for a wholesome pet for your house, or eat it raw to gain the powers of that monster for 5 minutes and you might get salmonella.

U0800.name: Nothingburger
U0800.description: Crate of burger buns that allow you to eat air.

U1523.name: Dialogue Tree
U1523.description: Your starting tree now grows 16 chatterberries a month!

U1437.name: Comb Over
U1437.description: Hair touching hairless patches of skin stimulates hair (re)growth.

U1001.name: The Big Guy Upstairs
U1001.description: An irritable titan is spawned on a 20x20x10 meter island that floats above yours.

U0139.name: A mysterious sculpture appears on the island
U0139.description: When you try to mention it to the others, none of them seem to know what you're talking about.

U1392.name: Endless Refreshment
U1392.description: A can of Dr. Pepper that can replenish itself using the blood of the person holding it.

U0622.name: Ignorance Is Bliss
U0622.description: You now know the T.R.U.E. meaning of Ach.

U1136.name: Where We Dropping?
U1136.description: Instead of spawning on your starting island, you instead spawn 80,000 meters above it

U1136-A0000.name: Safety First
U1136-A0000.description: You spawn wearing an undeployed parachute

U0967.name: Stay Organized
U0967.description: a 1.3 meter tall metal filing cabinet spawns on the island.

U1464.name: My Work Is Not Yet Done
U1464.description: You gain immunity to papercuts, but you have an uncontrollable urge to destroy any device that is as convenient or more convenient than a Personal Computer.

U1188.name: You can see the 5th panel of any 4 panel comic

U0530.name: Gain knowledge of an item duping exploit.
U0530.description: WARNING: Careless use of this exploit will draw the attention of Admins who have full Crystalized Obsidian Armor and world edit hax

U1792.name: Welcoming Atmosphere
U1792.description: Your starting tree now continuously plays background music from a pool of 40 different grocery store-friendly songs.

U0645.name: It Pays To Behave
U0645.description: For every good word someone says about you your island gains another kg of landmass

U0625.name: Immortal Technique
U0625.description: You no longer age as long as you drink milk

U1198.name: An immortal companion who survived an ancient challenge against immense odds
U1198.description: He is generally unresponsive and will not assist you in any way. He expresses a strong desire to die.

U1928.name: A copy of "The Lusty Zirconian Maid: My Affair With A Sultry Silica Golem."

U2036.name: Wacky Races
U2036.description: Clowns, Jesters, Harlequins, Comedians, Commedians, Satirists, and Parodians are now more common.

U1470.name: Probability Mass
U1470.description: Your Lck is increased by 1e-6 for each extra kg of equipment you're carrying above your body weight.

U1066.name: There is an island made of Bitcoin Cash somewhere in The 'Verse.

U0884.name: Remember What They Took From You
U0884.description: You can order Fast Food once a month (1 menu item) and it will be from the time period when it tasted the best.

U0884-A0000.name: Quality You Pay For
U0884-A0000.description: You may now choose items from Chick-fil-A.

U0405.name: Cultured
U0405.description: You gain a desire to read and experience The Classics rather than watch anime, manga, comics, Netflix, or listen to rap music

U1788.name: Tip Of My Tongue
U1788.description: Your tongue now has a sharp bladed point at its tip.

U1014.name: The Enemy of My Enemy...
U1014.description: 150 extra points, but the World Dragon gets to choose how to spend them instead of you. You won't know what it has selected for you until the run starts.

U1070.name: This Place Will Grow
U1070.description: Your starting island is now a living organism, requiring proper care and love

U1069.name: This Is Skyblock
U1069.description: sparta kicks are 100% more powerful, all other kicks are 0.1% as powerful [must shout “This! Is! SKYBLOCK!” with the proper cadence before beginning the kick for the buff to be applied]

U0305.name: Bit Flip
U0305.description: One random aspect of your personality is changed to its opposite

U1763.name: Sick Loot
U1763.description: Blood elfs produce twice as much blood.

U0486.name: Evilmaxxing
U0486.description: Every time you betray an ally who has trusted you for more than a year, gain +1 to all Dark Triad stats.

U1361.name: ARG
U1361.description: 3,301 cicadas will emerge from the ground of of your island in 7 years. Upon emerging, they will play sounds that could be transcribed into a melody. Replaying this melody on an instrument in the presence of a Guru will reveal the path to the Archives. Yield not to impatience, seeker of wisdom!

U1058.name: The Violet Veil
U1058.description: You can now see invisible islands. The inhabitants will begin to notice you too.

U1093.name: True Neutral
U1093.description: All Neutral attributes increase your Wis by 1e-9

U1121.name: Webbed Pal
U1121.description: The son your mother would have had if she didn't meet your father joins you. He was born premature and is 3 feet tall with webbed fingers and toes.

U1859.name: Serious Business
U1859.description: A legal briefcase full of gag snakes.

U1859-A0000.name: But Seriously
U1859-A0000.description: Underneath the gag snakes is grisly photographic evidence from an unsolved murder case which clearly identifies the perpetrator.

U0136.name: A map showing the three nearest islands.
U0136.description: There is a large barbecue sauce stain on it.

U1954.name: Griefer's Goblet
U1954.description: A brass goblet which causes anyone within a few meters of it to slowly accumulate anger.

U0508.name: Flat Earth
U0508.description: Gravity is replaced by density and buoyancy

U1858.name: Alternate History
U1858.description: Normally, your the items you choose here will be retroactively applied to alter the entire history of The 'Verse (except in special cases). Now they suddenly happen all at once when you arrive.

U0057.name: A 10 oz can of compressed air

U0484.name: Everyone is hiding something from you.

U0282.name: Bag of Foulness
U0282.description: Your starting island now has pockets of highly pressurized explosive gas within it

U0430.name: Delicious Fruit
U0430.description: Your starting tree now grows cherries

U0543.name: Getting Caught Up
U0543.description: A DVD that contains a 102 hour long 8K video where each pixel is taken from a different movie and the audio from all movies plays simultaneously. Movies that end are replaced by others.

U1710.name: My Way
U1710.description: All NPC cultures are now guaranteed to have weird unspoken rules that will enrage members of their race when broken.

U1802.name: Growing Pains
U1802.description: You now have fibrodysplasia ossificans progressiva and will feel pain from it but it will not kill you

U0729.name: Mead of Punishment
U0729.description: A bottle of liquid mercury that tastes like blue Powerade

U0609.name: I F*cking Love Science
U0609.description: Any cybernetic limbs you have are now made of funtanium

U1683.name: My Culture Is Not A Costume

U0232.name: Altman Alternatives
U0232.description: You may take any of these AI-Generated items for half-off the price listed. But be warned: Each item you take increases the chance of dooming humanity to an Infinite Total Suffering S-Risk Scenario by 10% (additive).

U0232-A0000.name: 1. Porcelain Toenail Collection
U0232-A0000.description: A neatly labeled case containing 48 of someone’s toenails, made of porcelain. Can be thrown like shuriken but will shatter if you miss.

U0232-A0001.name: 2. Gravity Reverse Card
U0232-A0001.description: Once per day, you can invert gravity for everything within a 5-meter radius… including yourself.

U0232-A0002.name: 3. Cursed Pretzel Rod
U0232-A0002.description: An eternally stale pretzel rod that whispers your regrets back to you in reverse. Eating it heals 1 HP but permanently reduces your self-esteem by 7%.

U0232-A0003.name: 4. Cube of Infinite Bees
U0232-A0003.description: A cube that constantly spawns 1 bee per second until it is thrown into the void. Bees are non-aggressive but block movement.

U0232-A0004.name: 5. Grandpa’s Left Slipper
U0232-A0004.description: Smells faintly of mothballs and gasoline. Wearing it increases movement speed by 5% but doubles fall damage.

U0232-A0005.name: 6. Vegan Vampire Kit
U0232-A0005.description: A bundle of non-blood-based substitutes, including beet juice “wine” and tofu stakes. Attracts ethical undead.

U0232-A0006.name: 7. Sentient Mop
U0232-A0006.description: Will clean your island compulsively and occasionally judge you in a thick French accent.

U0232-A0007.name: 8. The Crowbar of Quiet Violence
U0232-A0007.description: Deals bonus sneak attack damage but makes an oddly wet *squelch* instead of a metallic clang.

U0232-A0008.name: 9. Quantum Egg
U0232-A0008.description: Its exact content cannot be known until it is cracked. Every crack may spawn food, explosives, or your worst enemy.

U0232-A0009.name: 10. Friendly Guillotine
U0232-A0009.description: A portable guillotine that refuses to be used for executions but will give you “friendly haircuts.”

U0232-A0010.name: 11. Jar of Imaginary Spiders
U0232-A0010.description: You cannot see them, but you’re convinced they’re inside. Periodic phantom itching applies permanent -3 Composure.

U0232-A0011.name: 12. Flavored Oxygen Canisters
U0232-A0011.description: Breathe bubblegum or bacon air for +2 Mood, -1 Lung Longevity.

U0232-A0012.name: 13. Glowstick of Authority
U0232-A0012.description: Cracking it makes you irresistible to bureaucrats for 6 hours.

U0232-A0013.name: 14. Infinite Soup Ladle
U0232-A0013.description: No matter where you dip it, it scoops up clam chowder. Cannot be thrown away.

U0232-A0014.name: 15. Haunted AirPods
U0232-A0014.description: They *always* connect. The music is great, but ghosts occasionally skip to unsettling Gregorian chants at full volume.

U0232-A0015.name: 16. Thumbtack Familiar
U0232-A0015.description: A tiny, loyal thumbtack that follows you and occasionally rolls into your enemies’ path. May also roll into *your* path.

U0232-A0016.name: 17. Solar-Powered Nightlight
U0232-A0016.description: Never works when you actually need it.

U0232-A0017.name: 18. The Finger of Karl
U0232-A0017.description: A withered, mummified finger labeled simply: “Karl.” Pointing it at people gives you a 60% chance to make them sneeze.

U0232-A0018.name: 19. Brick of Unrequited Love
U0232-A0018.description: It’s just a brick, but you feel bad throwing it.

U0232-A0019.name: 20. Wormhole Sock
U0232-A0019.description: Put anything inside and it vanishes forever. There’s a 0.01% chance it comes back holding an angry message.

U0232-A0020.name: 21. Bag of Sobbing Marshmallows
U0232-A0020.description: They taste fine but weep softly whenever bitten.

U0232-A0021.name: 22. The Government-Approved Stick
U0232-A0021.description: It’s just a stick, but if you break it you will be fined by an interdimensional tax auditor.

U0232-A0022.name: 23. Jar of Pickled Noise
U0232-A0022.description: Every time you open it, a random loud sound blasts out at 200 decibels.

U0232-A0023.name: 24. Terribly Taxidermied Weasel
U0232-A0023.description: Looks wrong in ways that bother reality itself. +1 Chaos Power, -3 Trustworthiness.

U0232-A0024.name: 25. Half-Translated Manga
U0232-A0024.description: Missing every 3rd page. Characters occasionally address you directly in Japanese.

U0232-A0025.name: 26. Orthopedic Chainsaw
U0232-A0025.description: Specially balanced for “safe” cutting, but has a 10% chance to cut in slow motion while screaming your full name.

U0232-A0026.name: 27. Spicy Pillowcase
U0232-A0026.description: Sleeping on it buffs Melee Damage by +2 but sets your dreams on fire

U0232-A0027.name: 28. Schrödinger’s Lunchbox
U0232-A0027.description: Contains either a delicious meal or a horrifying crime scene.

U0232-A0028.name: 29. Plastic Armor
U0232-A0028.description: Full set. Completely weightless, completely useless. NPCs treat you like you’re important though.

U0232-A0029.name: 30. MP3 Player with One Track
U0232-A0029.description: The track is “Cotton Eye Joe” but at unpredictable speeds.

U0232-A0030.name: 31. Cube of Cold Hands
U0232-A0030.description: Holding it permanently lowers your body temperature by 2°C. You *do* get +10 grip strength though.

U0232-A0031.name: 32. Grandma’s Mystery Jar
U0232-A0031.description: Hasn’t been opened since “The Incident.” Opening it rolls 1d100 on Grandma’s Table.

U0232-A0032.name: 33. Soggy Bible
U0232-A0032.description: Waterlogged, unreadable, and smells like old fish. +1 Cursed Aura, -12 Holy Alignment.

U0232-A0033.name: 34. Rock That’s Just a Rock
U0232-A0033.description: There’s nothing special about it. You’re wasting points.

U0232-A0034.name: 35. Bag of Screaming Coins
U0232-A0034.description: They scream when spent. Merchants will hate you.

U0232-A0035.name: 36. Iron Lung but it’s Portable
U0232-A0035.description: Keeps you breathing no matter what. You can’t fit through doorways while inside it.

U0232-A0036.name: 37. Pet Ghost Crab
U0232-A0036.description: Does nothing but stare at you at night from the foot of your bed.

U0232-A0037.name: 38. Mind-Melting Crossword Puzzle
U0232-A0037.description: Cannot be completed without losing 10 IQ per clue solved.

U0232-A0038.name: 39. Inflatable Cathedral
U0232-A0038.description: Fully functional, deflates if you swear.

U0232-A0039.name: 40. Doom-Stapler
U0232-A0039.description: Every 100 staples, opens a localized hell rift.

U0232-A0040.name: 41. Ham of Destiny
U0232-A0040.description: A single glazed ham that regenerates itself every sunrise. The taste changes daily, but one day will taste like the void.

U0232-A0041.name: 42. The Fourteenth Commandment
U0232-A0041.description: It’s written on a napkin in pencil. Reading it out loud makes all milk in the universe curdle instantly.

U0232-A0042.name: 43. Two-Headed Umbrella
U0232-A0042.description: Shields you from rain *and* suspicion, but doubles incoming wind damage.

U0232-A0043.name: 44. Musical Guillotine
U0232-A0043.description: Chops *beautifully* in tune with “Flight of the Bumblebee.” Cannot be stopped once it starts.

U0232-A0044.name: 45. Spider Milk Jug
U0232-A0044.description: Filled with thick, lukewarm milk of unknown eight-legged origin. Drinking it gives +2 Night Vision for 1 hour, then makes your teeth itchy.

U0232-A0045.name: 46. Hourglass of Misunderstanding
U0232-A0045.description: Reveals the truth about *one* thing every 24 hours… but you interpret it completely wrong.

U0232-A0046.name: 47. Rotten Velvet Gloves
U0232-A0046.description: Soft, luxurious, and smell like a dying raccoon. Enemies underestimate you, allies avoid you.

U0232-A0047.name: 48. Bagpipe Familiar
U0232-A0047.description: Plays on its own when you’re in danger, but only songs about potatoes.

U0232-A0048.name: 49. Milk-Cart Blueprints
U0232-A0048.description: Allows you to craft the “Milk Cart” vehicle. It doesn’t move.

U0232-A0049.name: 50. Lantern That Burns Cold
U0232-A0049.description: Lights up beautifully but lowers the temperature around you by 20°C.

U0232-A0050.name: 51. Dead Man’s Flip Phone
U0232-A0050.description: Calls connect to someone *else’s* nightmares. Sometimes they call back.

U0232-A0051.name: 52. Gelatin Sword
U0232-A0051.description: Bounces off enemies with a comedic *boing* but leaves them inexplicably sticky.

U0232-A0052.name: 53. Fungus Crown
U0232-A0052.description: Looks regal, slowly releases spores that cause mild hallucinations and make your voice echo weirdly.

U0232-A0053.name: 54. Puppet That’s Definitely Alive
U0232-A0053.description: Makes sarcastic commentary, but also reports your every move to a mysterious Council.

U0232-A0054.name: 55. Calendar of Bad Days
U0232-A0054.description: All dates are wrong. Following it guarantees every day will be unlucky for *someone*.

U0232-A0055.name: 56. Ice Cream Machine (McDonald’s Model)
U0232-A0055.description: Always broken. Standing near it makes everyone slightly angrier.

U0232-A0056.name: 57. Lanternfish Companion
U0232-A0056.description: Floats beside you, emitting faint light. Smells powerfully of the ocean at all times.

U0232-A0057.name: 58. Crossbow of Wasted Effort
U0232-A0057.description: Perfectly accurate but fires only toothpicks.

U0232-A0058.name: 59. Dehydrated Pond
U0232-A0058.description: Just a jar of cracked mud and dead algae. Pouring water on it restores 1 small angry fish.

U0232-A0059.name: 60. Uncle Barry’s Wedding Suit
U0232-A0059.description: Three sizes too big, but NPCs assume you’re in charge of *something*.

U0232-A0060.name: 61. Bag of Teeth (Misc.)
U0232-A0060.description: Every tooth is unique, like they came from different species. If arranged correctly, they “point” somewhere — but the bag keeps rearranging itself at night.

U0232-A0061.name: 62. The Twelfth Spoon
U0232-A0061.description: No one remembers making the first eleven. Stirring any liquid with it makes the surface reflect somewhere that’s *not here.*

U0232-A0062.name: 63. Coconut Full of Sand
U0232-A0062.description: Clearly hollowed out and refilled. Sand keeps pouring out endlessly, even if smashed.

U0232-A0063.name: 64. “It’s Not Blood” Spray Bottle
U0232-A0063.description: The label says it’s not blood. It smells like blood. It works as an incredibly effective weed killer.

U0232-A0064.name: 65. Drawing of the World Dragon (Child’s Crayon)
U0232-A0064.description: Crude and colorful. The dragon is smiling in this one. The crayon marks keep moving.

U0232-A0065.name: 66. Manual of Non-Euclidean Knots
U0232-A0065.description: Can only be read when you’re asleep. Tying anything with these knots makes it harder to *untie you*.

U0232-A0066.name: 67. Mismatched Dice
U0232-A0066.description: When rolled, one die always comes up six. The other… never lands. No one’s found it yet.

U0232-A0067.name: 68. Latchkey That Opens No Door
U0232-A0067.description: Glows faintly in moonlight that doesn’t exist here.

U0232-A0068.name: 69. VHS Tape – “Dragon Sightings Compilation, 1994”
U0232-A0068.description: Mostly static. At minute 46, someone is clearly recording from *your island*.

U0232-A0069.name: 70. Inverted Bucket Helmet
U0232-A0069.description: Wearing it muffles the void’s whispering but makes it hard to breathe.

U0232-A0070.name: 71. Repeating Alarm Clock
U0232-A0070.description: No snooze button. Rings every 47 minutes and 12 seconds. Sometimes it skips a day.

U0232-A0071.name: 72. Jar of “Fresh” Water
U0232-A0071.description: Tastes slightly metallic. At the bottom is a tiny scale the size of a fingernail.

U0232-A0072.name: 73. Lantern That Doesn’t Cast Shadows
U0232-A0072.description: No matter what you light, shadows disappear within a 10m radius. Works disturbingly well on people.

U0232-A0073.name: 74. “Eggs of No Concern”
U0232-A0073.description: Four large white eggs, warm to the touch. Every time you check, one is in a different spot.

U0232-A0074.name: 75. Rusted Compass (Points Nowhere)
U0232-A0074.description: When you hold still, it points somewhere. When you walk, it spins wildly.

U0232-A0075.name: 76. “The Choir” in a Jar
U0232-A0075.description: A jar of dark liquid that hums in harmony with your heartbeat.

U0232-A0076.name: 77. Wrench from “Maintenance Crew 3”
U0232-A0076.description: Engraved with a number you can’t quite focus on. The metal feels *too* warm.

U0232-A0077.name: 78. Stack of News Clippings
U0232-A0077.description: Stories about missing islands, “dragon accidents,” and something called the Basketball Stadium Tragedy.

U0232-A0078.name: 79. Mask of the Sky-Caretaker
U0232-A0078.description: Wooden mask, smooth eye holes. NPCs bow to you but refuse to speak.

U0232-A0079.name: 80. “Forbidden Fishing Pole”
U0232-A0079.description: Can hook items far beyond your visible range — but occasionally drags something *closer*.

U0232-A0080.name: 81. Shouting Thermometer
U0232-A0080.description: Reads temperature out loud in an aggressive tone. Constantly swears when below freezing.

U0232-A0081.name: 82. Beef Jerky Bookmark
U0232-A0081.description: Smells great but attracts ants you have never seen before.

U0232-A0082.name: 83. Velcro Cape
U0232-A0082.description: Sticks to everything except your enemies.

U0232-A0083.name: 84. Mango Full of Rice
U0232-A0083.description: No one knows why. It’s not bad rice, just… there.

U0232-A0084.name: 85. VHS Tape of “Ow My Bones!” Season 2
U0232-A0084.description: Slapstick violence footage that somehow gives +1 Pain Tolerance if you binge-watch.

U0232-A0085.name: 86. Tiny Plastic Tombstone
U0232-A0085.description: Has your name on it, plus tomorrow’s date.

U0232-A0086.name: 87. Inflatable Porcupine
U0232-A0086.description: Looks dangerous until touched — then it just deflates sadly.

U0232-A0088.name: 89. Guillotine Cheese Slicer
U0232-A0088.description: Slices cheese flawlessly but leaves the cheese faintly whispering regrets.

U0232-A0089.name: 90. Haunted Tie Clip
U0232-A0089.description: Gives +2 Style but only if tied wrong.

U0232-A0090.name: 91. Book of Slightly Wrong Facts
U0232-A0090.description: Everything is *almost* true. Reading too much drops Intelligence by 1.

U0232-A0091.name: 92. Mittens of Mild Concern
U0232-A0091.description: Wearing them makes nearby people feel uneasy without knowing why.

U0232-A0092.name: 93. Tiny Train That Hates You
U0232-A0092.description: A palm-sized wind-up locomotive that always derails when near you.

U0232-A0093.name: 94. Time-Stopping Ice Cube
U0232-A0093.description: Freezes in place in midair forever unless touched.

U0232-A0094.name: 95. Belt Made of Cables
U0232-A0094.description: Sometimes vibrates. You don’t know what’s on the other end.

U0232-A0095.name: 96. Glow-in-the-Dark Spider Webs
U0232-A0095.description: Look cool, feel terrible when touched.

U0232-A0096.name: 97. The Infinite Shopping Bag
U0232-A0096.description: Holds exactly one more useless item than you own.

U0232-A0097.name: 98. Reversible Crow Mask
U0232-A0097.description: Looks like a crow from the front, a slightly angrier crow from the back.

U0232-A0098.name: 99. Pocket-Sized Lighthouse
U0232-A0098.description: Shines a blinding beam for 0.2 seconds when shaken violently.

U0232-A0099.name: 100. Uncooked Spaghetti Staff
U0232-A0099.description: Snaps if touched, but regenerates in 3 minutes. Cannot be used for pasta.

U1567.name: Reddit Adamantium
U1567.description: Your Reddit account's upvotes can now be converted into Reputation Points with either the Nerd, Incel, Loser, or Retard Faction.

U0066.name: A baby bottle filled with an unknown preworkout supplement mixed with water

U0454.name: Double Trouble
U0454.description: A second island floats on the other side of the universe. It is the exact same as your own.

U1778.name: This Will Only Hurt A Bit
U1778.description: All Minigames will be at least Hard difficulty by default.

U1778-A0000.name: Punish Me Daddy
U1778-A0000.description: All Minigames will be at least Very Hard difficulty by default.

U1778-A0001.name: Satan Nigger Rape Madness
U1778-A0001.description: All Minigames will be at least Ludicrous difficulty by default.

U1778-A0002.name: I'm Fucking Cracked Bro
U1778-A0002.description: All Minigames will be at least Impossible difficulty by default.

U1984-A0000.name: Demon's Best Friend
U1984-A0000.description: A sticker to put on your shield, car, etc. in the shape of a hellhound pawprint that says "Who Rescued Who?"

U1275.name: A 1000m tall spiral staircase reinforced by Star Material.

U1540.name: Pride Month
U1540.description: Every sentient being is now gay for once a month every year.

U1548.name: This New Update Ruined The 'Verse
U1548.description: You can now level swimming (SWM). SWM experience has dynamic multipliers depending on how dangerous the liquid is. A bonus multiplier is applied for swimming inside of living creatures. At level 999 SWM you may swim in any fluid, gas or liquid, at 1/100th the speed of your base water swim speed. The fluid swimming speed scales linearly with every level after 999.

U1528.name: Ready-Made
U1528.description: Bluesmiths can now repair Common and Fallen Mystical equipment.

U0828.name: ORIGINAL SOUNDTRACK
U0828.description: Activities and actions in your life now play personalized SFX and background music created and composed by Toby Fox, which envelops and surrounds you 24/7 all throughout the day.

U0828-A0000.name: Soulful Composition
U0828-A0000.description: It's composed by Jeremy Soule instead

U0828-A0002.name: Banging Gamer Tunes
U0828-A0002.description: It's composed by Tim Follin instead

U0828-A0003.name: Grrl Power
U0828-A0003.description: It's composed by Lindsey Stirling instead

U0828-A0004.name: Real Shit
U0828-A0004.description: It's composed by the frontman of The $hit instead

U0828-A0005.name: Real Nigga Shit
U0828-A0005.description: It's composed by the best of rappers like Drake and Lil Wayne

U0828-A0006.name: Gore Shit
U0828-A0006.description: It's composed by Venetian Snares instead

U0828-A0007.name: Free Shit
U0828-A0007.description: It's all songs previously composed by Kevin Macleod.

U0929.name: Shrink Ray
U0929.description: A ray gun which transfers the mental illnesses of those hit by the beam onto the holder

U0939.name: Single Sign On
U0939.description: Every few days, you will need to say an (at least) 12 character password aloud to continue using your body. If anyone repeats your password to you, they can control you. You will be asked to change your password every 3 months.

U0939-A0000.name: 2FA
U0939-A0000.description: You receive a Rubik's Cube you need to configure into a certain pattern before you can say your password

U1610.name: Steins Gate
U1610.description: You can now travel between other similar 'Verse parallel timelines where things are slightly changed but not enough to notice any differences.

U1712.name: Waterproof
U1712.description: The amount of PFAS in your blood is doubled.

U2057.name: 'Verses's Worst Boss
U2057.description: Any business owned by you is 15% more efficient if at least 40% of the employees hate their job.

U0638.name: Insane Pulls
U0638.description: Every item you took now has a randomized prefix. Some possible prefixes include: Ephemeral, Retarded, Mid, Legendary, Superb, A little better, Much worse, Shitty, Trite, Aura, etc.

U0978.name: Subliminals are more effective on you

U1106.name: Unrealistic Expectations
U1106.description: Female dragons now have mammary glands

U1106-A0000.name: Lover's Lab
U1106-A0000.description: Dragon mammary glands now resemble those of humans

U1305.name: We Need To Cook
U1305.description: You are incapable of eating anything that wasn't cooked in the past hour.

U1257.name: Your walk animation has more frames.

U0605.name: I Believe I Can Fly
U0605.description: Membranous skin wings on your back giving you a total wingspan of 4 meters and strong enough extra muscles and bones to move them (but not quickly).

U0538.name: Gender Affirming Care
U0538.description: Your head is changed to look more like Rayman

U1815.name: Foot Fetish
U1815.description: You now have a foot fetish.

U1815-A0000.name: You Will Pick This Item
U1815-A0000.description: You now have a hypnotism fetish.

U1815-A0001.name: I Could Be A Dragon
U1815-A0001.description: You now have a transformation fetish.

U1815-A0002.name: Pump It Up
U1815-A0002.description: You now have an inflation fetish.

U1815-A0003.name: Bigger Is Better
U1815-A0003.description: You now have a giantess fetish.

U1815-A0004.name: Eat My Shorts
U1815-A0004.description: You now have a vore fetish.

U1277.name: Rawhide
U1277.description: Your skin no longer flakes off, allowing it to thicken without limit unless you manually peel it off. (+0.5 Defence/cm)

U0377.name: Co-Vid
U0377.description: A strange VHS tape that documents the effects an untested vaccination had on a populace of people

U0273.name: Asbestos Removal Service
U0273.description: All asbestos your island was built with is removed and replaced with a safer material.

U1208.name: You lose the war, but you win the battle

U1666-A0000.name: Hope Springs Eternal With My Dear Friends
U1666-A0000.description: Friendly dragons will let you ride them.

U2009.name: I've Seen Enough Hentai To Know Where This Is Going
U2009.description: You gain INF Rep with all Shoggoths, Chthonian Demons, Octopi, Sky Krakens, and Squid Elves.

U0528.name: Fun And Educational
U0528.description: 10 random 20 cm tall star polyhedra made of glass spawn on your island.

U0951.name: Song of the Summer
U0951.description: You get two large tymbals in your neck that allow you to make cicada sounds

U0373.name: Cloud Juice
U0373.description: Water from void clouds now tastes 15% better

U0491.name: Fall From Grace
U0491.description: Eminem is no longer the most talented rapper

U0572.name: Happy Appy
U0572.description: Any apples you eat give you double the dopamine when eating them, but all food gives you half the dopamine you'd normally get. Apple seeds can be found randomly in your stool.

U0152.name: A plastic bag which increases your Int by 1 when equipped in the head slot

U1023.name: The Gooner
U1023.description: Summon a new goon each week to do your bidding. Goons have low intellect but are loyal.

U1045.name: The Points Dealer
U1045.description: You want more points, kid? You got 'em...at a price, o' course. A mysterious hooded figure you can trade with for more points. Who he is and where he's getting these points from, no one knows. His exchange rates are horrible; exorbitant amounts of Hyperionical gems or incredibly rare materials will net you just one measly point. There's almost no other way to get them though, so what can you do?

U0797.name: Not Cool, Man
U0797.description: You start with 6 (black) slaves that will do your bidding. No catch, but everyone you meet will think it's kinda weird and may attempt to stop you depending on their light/dark alignment and your reputation with them.

U1704.name: Lurk Moar
U1704.description: Your body is now a black silhouette.

U0517.name: Fraternal Damnation
U0517.description: A narrow cobblestone path leading off the northwest edge of your island leads to a Greater Haunted Frat House about 0.5km away. Be warned, a single Greater Undead Brotherhood Chair could easily defeat an Infernal Wurm or Mired Cragbeast.

U1178.name: You can conduct heat through your body better

U0473.name: Enchanted Golden Apples are called Notch Apples again
U0473.description: (Required to access the "Taking Back the Throne" questline)

U1135.name: Where Can I Even Fit This Thing?

U0269.name: Arborist
U0269.description: The rate of growth of anything your starting tree can produce increases over time, as long as it is watered and taken care of regularly

U0269-A0000.name: The rate of growth increases at an even faster rate, but now it also requires affection

U0258.name: An OLED screen is added to your forehead that displays all of your thoughts in plaintext, including descriptions of images.
U0258.description: Any attempt to obscure the device will prevent you from forming thoughts. There are 2 USB-C slots.

U1878.name: Rat King
U1878.description: A bunch of miscellaneous Frank Sinatra and Rat Pack memorabilia someone gave to you.

U2022.name: Finger Lickin' Good...?
U2022.description: A hen infected with the bubonic plague.

U0745.name: Miscegenation
U0745.description: You can now produce hybrid offspring with any of the ensouled races of The 'Verse

U0745-A0000.name: Unnatural Union
U0745-A0000.description: You can now produce hybrid offspring with any monsters in The 'Verse.

U0745-A0001.name: He Shall Surely Be Put To Death
U0745-A0001.description: You can now produce hybrid offspring with any animals in The 'Verse.

U0110.name: A floppy disk with a cracked copy of FL Studio 20 and various Riddim/Trap sample packs

U0661.name: Jumpman
U0661.description: You receive a free masterclass from Mario

U1087.name: Tower to Heaven
U1087.description: Your island stretches 50 more meters downward

U2060.name: Crazy Nigger Faggot
U2060.description: Your Dark now scales with your Gayness and Fashion.

U1605.name: Semiotic Simplicity
U1605.description: Everything that's true and virtuous is beautiful, everything that's false and evil is ugly. The only thing this doesn't apply to is yourself.

U1605-A0000.name: Ressentiment
U1605-A0000.description: Everything that is false and evil is made beautiful and everything that is true and virtuous is made ugly.

U0903.name: Romeo
U0903.description: You are now able to pretend to die from poison convincingly

U1608.name: Containment Breach
U1608.description: All creatures in The 'Verse are now born from That Which Waits In The Darkness. Most are hostile and no longer bound by physical and magical laws.

U1127.name: What A Deal!
U1127.description: Trading with The Points Dealer is 5% cheaper.

U0248.name: An empty cubic spawner with a volume of one cubic meter.
U0248.description: Any living creature of mass one gram or greater placed inside will be repeatedly duplicated in the surrounding nine cubic meters at an interval depending on its mass. Time interval in seconds is equal to the creature's mass in decigrams to the one and one halfth power.

U0252.name: An honorary degree from the Uchiha School of Culinary Arts

U0504.name: Fish Tank
U0504.description: You can now hear the insults that Those Which Watch hurl at you from The Beyond.

U0947.name: Slop Generator
U0947.description: A large color printer is added to your island. Every day it prints a new random image that exists on the internet onto a piece of A4 paper. Requires no ink, paper, or electricity. Cannot be fixed if broken.

U0947-A0000.name: LOL Generator
U0947-A0000.description: It now prints random images from iFunny

U0947-A0001.name: Kek Generator
U0947-A0001.description: It now prints random images from 4Chan

U1959.name: Graphics - Performance
U1959.description: You can now see only 10 feet forward in all directions. Anything beyond 10 feet will clip abruptly, showing the void instead.

U1959-A0000.name: Infdev
U1959-A0000.description: You can now see only 8 feet forward, but anything beyond 8 feet will be enveloped in a tasteful, completely opaque, colored fog.

U1344.name: Ali Express
U1344.description: A man named Ali from far away lands will sell you rare silks, gems, and spices, but his journey to your island is multiple years long.

U1344-A0000.name: Silk Road
U1344-A0000.description: He may sell you common drugs such as opium, modafinil, and Orc crack.

U0345.name: By The Power Vested In Me
U0345.description: You are now ordained to perform Elven marriages

U0824.name: Open Your Mind
U0824.description: You gain psychokinesis capable of manipulating singular objects with the same strength as your full body at a range of 5 meters, but your skull naturally insulates this power to 1/100th of its full potential. Any holes in your skull will allow you to direct your power fully in the direction of the hole.
