U1687.name: Legendary Companion: Slime Overlord Peter-Qo-Jell
U1687.description:
Peter was a serious young boy who set out into the forest to slay slimes.
He wanted to grow in power to protect his village.
He carried a longsword, and wore basic cotton clothing.

Peter understood well enough that his parents had sent him into the wilderness to keep him occupied more than out of any need for protection. These low level slimes posed no threat to the village.
He also tired of dealing with his parents, who somehow managed to be simultaneously neglectful and demanding, so possessed by an unusual whimsy, he simply chose not to return home one evening.
Peter slept soundly on the forest floor, and awoke mysteriously untouched by insects or other creatures of the night.
He continued like this as weeks blurred into months, and lost himself in the telos of slime death.
Peter pressed forward slaying slimes and doing little else, too deep in the wilderness to be found by any search parties.
His parents must have assumed he died at some point.
He ate a diet of mostly slime, a monster drop thought to be toxic and inedible even to animals, but Peter found it tasted quite pleasant after a long day of slime culling.

The average person knows slimes for their habits of absorption and molestation, but fewer are aware of their psychological and noospheric capabilities.
Recent studies suggest a statistical link between naturalists who study slimes and those who develop early-onset dementia.
Further study has yet to reveal the following, but slimes also have deleterious effects on the minds of adventurers who slay them through contact with splattered slime, even in the brief moments before the slimes' death.
Peter, like any other adventurer, would ordinarily have been expected to lose a few basis points of Int after slaying hundreds of slimes over the summer.
However, his mind felt clearer than it ever had while living with his parents.
While murdering slimes with his longsword, Peter felt a bizarre, yet impossibly natural serenity without any loss of alertness.
Cutting through thick brush and slimes alike with a sharp eye, the path ahead couldn't have been more obvious.

Although when Peter found himself at the gates of a coastal city with nothing but oddly intact clothing and a longsword, he wondered briefly where his legs were taking him.
Surely the few slimes he sensed in this city could not be better slays than those that spawned in the deep wilderness?
A few uncommon jewels collected from yesterday's slimes were enough to pay for lodging at a local tavern.
Peter struck up conversation with some of the guests while watching the sun set.
Months of aimless wander-slaughter without human contact hadn't dulled his ability to communicate in the slightest, in fact Peter found himself to possess a surprising charisma belying his age.
Peter effortlessly maintained the false persona he had prepared in advance, but actually stumbled over his words when his interlocutor casually mentioned that her expedition party's airship would be leaving tomorrow for Slime Island.
His mind, rapidly catching up with his instincts, instantaneously understood why the greater purpose that provided him salvation had brought him to this time and moment.
Of course, he must board this airship.
The expedition party was hesitant, but something about this strange boy reassured them, as if his desire to learn more about slimes was more compelling than their own mission.
They set off and as the airship landed on Slime Island, Peter slew every member of the expedition in the night.

The slimes on Slime Island were much larger and more diverse than those from his homeland, but Peter's capabilities rose to meet the task.
Slaying these slimes made him feel more alive and attuned with himself than ever. He barely ate or slept.
Some of the most dangerous higher level slimes specialized in absorption of intellect, and used advanced combat tactics to hide themselves before paralyzing prey in seconds.
Peter quickly began to understand that not only was he immune to these attacks, he seemed to reflect them.
As a Striped Carmine-Grey slime that had caught him in an ambush attempted to smother him, he felt a surge of focus and the slime sloshed limply onto the rocky ground.
The answer came from within before Peter's mind formed the question, as he reached down to touch the broken slime and absorbed its remaining conceptual essence, reducing its form to dust.
He could tell, from touching the slime, that its cytoplasm was less pure than his own.
Inexplicably, Peter by killing slimes had become more slime than this slime. But how?
Were these impurities born from non-digestible concepts the slime had absorbed, following its blind instincts? Or perhaps from the necessity that the practicalities of life as a low-perplexity life form limit its entelechy?
The Striped Carmine-Grey had grown wiser by rejecting its slime aspect, in opposition to his own journey.
Either way, it was apparent that a slime only capable of absorption through physical contact was not a true slime.
And with that understanding, Peter also understood how his Way of the Ooze had thusfar kept him from losing himself while floating in the boundless psychic awareness of a sea of slimes.

The slimes he slashed open were purified, much like the slimes themselves purified their victims.
Peter purified a lot of slimes every day for a long time, and meditated instead of sleeping.
Slime Island was vast, and his purification did not have any impact on their total population.
One day, while meditating on Slime Island, the Slime King appeared on the horizon.
Perhaps it was attracted by his activities, or perhaps the meeting was entirely by chance.
As soon as he noticed its ripples in the psychic ocean, Peter without exiting trance gripped his longsword and hastened to purify the Slime King.
Moved by his purity of will, and with a primal understanding that standing against this man would be to deny its own existence, the Slime King overextended a thousand pseudopods before Peter could strike at range with psychic attacks.
The Slime King explosively ruptured its own membrane, raining down refined royal slime across the entire island.
The Slime King's crown, several meters across, rolled along the beach and arrived before Peter.
Rather than changing his form to fit the crown, he consumed the concept of the Slime King and redefined it such that it was himself.
Peter wears the former slime king's crown and retains his human form to this day.
He took the name Peter-Qo-Jell (or "Peter from Slime"), christening himself as a being that had ascended beyond what slimes once were.

What exactly was it that possessed Peter that evening he decided not to return to his parents' home?
Despite perfect exocognitive clarity of thought, he does not know for sure.
Peter-Qo-Jell could see now that the gestalt Slimemind, while possessing far greater psychic force, was unable to coordinate more than a primitive, constant urge, and the former Slime King, while it lived, could not have been much more sophisticated.

In the end, Peter's village was destroyed by low level slimes which mysteriously began to show levels of aggression and intelligence previously unheard of.
He left Slime Island on his slimeship for distant lands shortly after becoming Slime Overlord.
Peter-Qo-Jell lives across all slimes, and appears to revive from slime if his primary physical form is destroyed.
He exists as the hyperconscious embodiment of the greater Slime will, and cannot be easily persuaded or deceived without psychic capacity to rival the Slimemind.
Peter-Qo-Jell's instinctive powers of influence and manipulation are as frightening as his direct attacks. He can effect direct attacks over long distances without the requirement for physical contact which was once the greatest weakness of slimes.

Peter-Qo-Jell joins your island.

U0533.name: Game Design
U0533.description: Yellow paint shows you where to go.

U0436.name: Did He, Blood?
U0436.description: You can interrogate the blood of any living creature with your mind. You are not immune to this power.

U1849.name: Virgo
U1849.description: You lose your virginity. You don't get to have sex, you just aren't a virgin anymore.

U1697.name: No Sap
U1697.description: Trees no longer produce sap or resin.

U1209.name: You no longer need to eat or drink. Instead you need to do something else

U1357.description: You now see in ASCII art

U2002.name: The Unbearable Weight
U2002.description: Look at yourself: another pathetic also-ran trying to Choose Your Own Escapism. Unfortunately, friend, the impotent safety of pure hypotheticals is far behind you now. Your actions have consequences. You are forcibly equipped with the Guilty Gamer's Pendant, which makes you feel the full weight of your choices. However, as painful as it is, the pendant also profoundly increases your Gamesmastery.

U2016.name: We Are Anyonemous
U2016.description: Your presence is now completely untraceable over the Internet, Interley, any P2P network, radio broadcasts, DwarfNET, and Urbit.

U1340.name: You Get What You Never Fucking Deserved
U1340.description: A single copy of "Fez 2", for an unknown game console you don't possess.

U0777.name: Never ending tissue box but the tissues are slightly too rough and irritate the skin easily

U1302.name: Irresistible Rhythm
U1302.description: You can't stop bouncin' to the beat!

U1337.name: Code Monkey
U1337.description: Monkeys are now factionally aligned with Mech Dwarves, Robots, and Nerds

U1337-A0000.name: Node Monkey
U1337-A0000.description: Monkeys are now factionally aligned with Dimensional Pixies.

U0912.name: Scientific Literacy
U0912.description: You always know what the axes on a chart represent

U1900.name: Frogmode
U1900.description: You now breathe out of your skin and must keep it sufficiently wet or you will die. On the bright side, you are now stickier, slimier, have a long prehensile tongue, and insects taste better. (Stickiness and Sliminess now level x2.5 faster.)

U1900-A0000.name: Ribbit
U1900-A0000.description: You now have a vocal sac that allows you to perform mating calls.

U1900-A0001.name: Bachelor Pad
U1900-A0001.description: Your starting tree is now a lily pad.

U1900-A0002.name: Leapfrog
U1900-A0002.description: You can now jump 6x as high.

U0414.name: Dad's Hidden Stash

U1774.name: Whiz Kid
U1774.description: Elder residents of The 'Verse are now impressed by your ability to do mundane tasks.

U1575.name: Feels Guy
U1575.description: Gain 5 new emotions. Words don't exist to describe them.

U0510.name: Florida Man
U0510.description: You gain power & discipline and your cockiness levels max out.

U1016.name: The fifth member of The Beatles, Dean, can be found on a random island.

U0462.name: Earthbound

U0335-A0000.name: Betrayal Of Hatred

U1881-A0001.name: Waffle Boy's World Mountain Adventure

U1496.name: High Speed
U1496.description: Data can now be transferred at light speed.

U0327.name: Break It Down
U0327.description: You can dance incredibly well. Everybody else hates it and will attack if you dance in their LOS.

U0639.name: Install a shader pack of your choosing

U0443.name: Diviner's Helmet

U0730.name: Mechanical keyboard with a mixture of switches of all types

U2038.name: Mr. Pluto

U1240.name: Your skin becomes navy colored with pinstripes of gold

U1775.name: Get Off My Lawn

U1850.name: Gemini

U0791.name: Noah's DArk

U1536.name: Sensitive Young Man
U1536.description: Criticism of any kind wounds you deeply.

U0140.name: A Nerf N-Force Marauder Long Sword

U0501.name: Not Too Shabby

U1207.name: You look like your IMVU avatar

U1391.name: Born Too Late
U1391.description: You start wearing traditional Victorian clothing.

U0607.name: I Did That

U1422.name: Fit Check

U1074.name: Three's Company

U0053.name: A 0.5x0.7x1.2m stick of cream cheese wrapped in parchment paper

U1624.name: Build The Wall
U1624.description: All islands are now harder to access due to various obstacles and border patrols.

U1744.name: Calm Down, Boy!

While you sit on it you will recieve massive random stat boosts over a bi-weekly period, but if you get up from the throne at any point the stats will be purged and you will have to sit and accumulate the boosts again. Also, you being so high in the sky has drawn the attention of the jealous and territorial Zephyr Bandits who will aim violent storm winds towards you.

U0228.name: All The Comforts of Home
U0228.description: The Shadow Reader will read you 1 random creepypasta each night before you go to sleep.

U1929.name: Red Rum

U1760.name: German Engineering
U1760.description: Gas chambers and other mass death machines are now 50% more efficient.

U1046.name: The Prisoner

U1943.name: Bad Trip

U1453.name: The Great Work

U1453-A0000.name: You get a handheld decibel meter that never runs out of battery.

U1453-A0001.name: Your tongue is cut off, but you receive 5 Gerahs of pure gold as an apology.

U0157.name: A Pound of Flesh
U0157.description: A pound of uncooked pork shoulder

U0260.name: An unfertilized human egg frozen inside an ice cube.

U0487.name: Eye Wood If I Could

U0359.name: CHICKEN JOCKEY!
U0359.description: You can ride any living creature.

U1924.name: Dye of Amaclastus
U1924.description: This one-time use item will let you apply a glow-in-the-dark effect or digital camouflage to any piece of armor, no matter its level.

U0437.name: DIE POTATO!
U0437.description: Your starting tree is replaced with a potato plant.

U0437-A0000.name: I Like Trains
U0437-A0000.description: Your starting tree is replaced with a non-functional train's front car.

U0585.name: Heavy is the Crown
U0585.description: A Burger King crown that doubles the calories gained from anything ingested by whatever wears it

U2015.name: I Wear My Sunglasses At Night
U2015.description: Wearing sunglasses in the dark gives you night vision.

U1339.name: I'd Just Like To Interject
U1339.description: You can't help but interrupt people to go on pedantic tirades.

U1450.name: Oriental
U1450.description: You always know which way is East.

U1530.name: Collin's Key
U1530.description: A thumnalium key which oozes a scintillating mystery slime...

U0943.name: Slept On
U0943.description: Your starting island has a king size bed on it with comfortable blankets and pillows. There is a small chance of having a Class Q nightmare when you sleep on it or sleep using any dissassembled parts from it.

U0943-A0000.name: So Much More Room for Activities
U0943-A0000.description: It is now a bunk bed

U1658.name: Settling The Score
U1658.description: All Water Damage, Wind Damage, Fire Damage, Stone Damage, Wood Damage, Nature Damage, Ice Damage, Energy Damage, Light Damage, Dark Damage, Bacon Damage, Metal Damage, Silver Damage, Poison Damage, Disease Damage, ??? Damage, Fear Damage, Curse Damage, Good Damage, Evil Damage, and Null Damage is now rounded up to the nearest whole number.

U0664.name: Just Needs S'mores
U0664.description: Your starting island comes with an illusory campfire! Provides light but no heat. SORCERER GENERAL'S WARNING: Prolonged exposure to illusion magic can have negative health consequences.

U0804.name: Oasis
U0804.description: Islands may now spawn with lakes that contain faux-water that causes immediate intracranial hemorrhaging when ingested

U1950.name: Crack Shipping
U1950.description: Any item you order will now be delivered by kobolds under the influence of addictive narcotic substances, thusly your item may not be delivered to your exact location or come in one piece.

U1225.name: Your father's grimoire
U1225.description: He told you to never touch this, but maybe just this once...

U1623.name: I Can't Breathe
U1623.description: All oxygen is now carbon dioxide.

U1892.name: Wizards of Worldly Place
U1892.description: You receive an admission to the Mogwarts Magical Academy for Gifted Children located 0.934 megameters directly southwest of your starting island.

U0004.description: You can now only speak in ellipses.

U1460.name: Stargazer
U1460.description: You can see an exact numerical representation of the Fame of any entity you look at

U0467.name: Eduardo Godoy
U0467.description: He has grown as a person and no longer carries toxoplasmosis.

U1996-A0000.name: Onmyojisan
U1996-A0000.description: Your right nostril bleeds cherubumor and your left nostril bleeds Tartarian bile.

U0909.name: SANS-!
U0909.description: Sans is now standing in your island, has one line of dialogue.

U0885.name: Remnants of the Presence
U0885.description: Glowing cyan stones which are warm to the touch will spawn for 3 minutes in random areas at random times. Picking one up makes it disappear and adds 1 to your collected count. Every 100 collected spawns a Rare lootbox. Every 1,000 collected spawns a Mega Rare lootbox and increases your Obscure by 1. Every 10,000 collected spawns an Epic Lootbox and gives you a Strange Vision. After the first 100,000 are collected, the Paradise event occurs. Surviving will grant you access to 1 hidden item.

U1677.name: Think (About What You've Done)
U1677.description: Whenever you kill something, you must relive its life in real time.

U1806.name: To The Secret Lair!
U1806.description: Your starting tree now has a secret door on it concealing a chute to the bottom of your island.

U1220.name: You-May Nicky
U1220.description: A friendly Koala bear named Nicky that encourages your every action and attempts to grant you psychological permission for every action you have hesitance to take. Nicky will never do actions for you.

U1871.name: Strategist's Toolbox
U1871.description: A set of 100 green, 100 blue, and 100 red plastic army men and 1x1 meter roll up plastic mat with a black and white chessboard pattern.

U2068.name: GameFAQs
U2068.description: A shoddy solar-powered tablet that allows you to post to and read threads on Worldchan's "Random" board.

U0278.name: Aw Crud
U0278.description: You become 10x faster at creating simple web applications

U1791.name: Happy Tree Friends
U1791.description: A colony of Dökkálfar now live in your starting tree.

U1165.name: You are made out of glass
U1165.description: If you trip or bump into anything you will shatter and die immediately

U0518.name: Free At Last, Free At Last

U0495.name: Fast Travel
U0495.description: Immediately teleport to any island you're about to die on

U0265.name: Annoying Nigger
U0265.description: Constantly talks while you try to think

U0218.name: Alice & Bob
U0218.description: Everything you say or write is encrypted using an AES-128 ECB block cipher. You are given a plastic card with your 128-bit key printed on it.

U0687.name: Learn To Code
U0687.description: You have perfect knowledge of HTML

U0772.name: Negahistamine
U0772.description: Permanently cure all of your food allergies.

U1609.name: Dungeons And World Dragons
U1609.description: You now need to roll for initiative before doing anything. Enemies will wait their turn but not let you try again if you fail.

U0213.name: Adam Savage
U0213.description: Every 13 days you get the overwhelming urge to rape. Committing rape during this time will permanently turn you into a jellied being.

U1039.name: The N Word
U1039.description: A word so powerful it can kill anything (besides the World Dragon). Can only be used once.

U1566.name: My Precious...
U1566.description: Every ring in the 'Verse now has stat bonuses, but the bonuses only apply if you have proposed to a woman or man with a ring of identical or near identical make (he/she/it has to say yes.) Stat bonuses depend on the race of your spouse.

U0863.name: Promise Ring
U0863.description: An onion ring that gives you a flashbulb memory of the moment you consume it fully.

U1582.name: My Stash
U1582.description: Your chest is now a metal safe with a combination lock.

U1582-A0000.name: You know the combination to your chest.

U0301.name: Better Help
U0301.description: You've now received the equivalent of 10 years worth of professional mental health counseling

U1995.name: Redundant And Unneeded
U1995.description: Frost Dragons are added to The 'Verse

U1995-A0000.name: Balance Patch
U1995-A0000.description: Frost Dragons are now more numerous in order to counter overfarming of their resources.

U1299.name: LitRPG
U1299.description: Lvl up! Your username and level now float above your head.

U0223.name: All Just A...
U0223.description: Upon defeating the World Dragon, you will suddenly wake up, revealing everything that happened was a dream. (Free, but disappointing)

U0223-A0000.name: Oh. My. God.
U0223-A0000.description: When you wake up, Gandalf bursts into your room asking you to go on an epic quest with him.

U0223-A0001.name: Good Things Come to Those Who Wait
U0223-A0001.description: On the small desk beside your bed sits a new Nintendo handheld game console that you don't recognize. Next to it, a note reads: "Happy Birthday, my little son". You suddenly notice a small game card attached to the note. Its label art depicts a blue summer sky and a title: "オトメファンクション〜待てば海路の日和あり〜"

U1098.name: Two 5 meter by 0.5 meter strips of cheesecloth.

U0230.name: Alpha Syndrome
U0230.description: You must look at digital screens for at least an hour a day or your sanity quickly begins to slip.

U1595.name: (Still) So Sorry
U1595.description: Your OC will become canon in the 'Verse!

U0586.name: Heavy News
U0586.description: A roll of newspaper that weighs 1 Megagram

U2067.name: Green Thumb
U2067.description: Feeding your starting tree the thumbs of ensouled plant and earth-aligned creatures increases the rate of growth of anything it produces.

U1152.name: Wrap-Around
U1152.description: The 'Verse is now a finite 3-torus. Careful what you wish for!

U1862.name: Teh Penguin Of Doom
U1862.description: Your set of DoomKnight armor (if you own one) from your DragonFable account is transferred to The 'Verse.

U1043.name: The Old Man Lost His Horse

U2000.name: Long Dream
U2000.description: Every dream you have increases the average length of your dreams by 7%.

U1787.name: Sodium
U1787.description: You start with a 1m³ block of pure elemental sodium, containment apparatus not included.

U0341.name: But Nobody Came
U0341.description: Sexual reproduction is now impossible for any beings in the universe. All sexual functions and associated feelings no longer work

U1379.name: A wifebeater shirt that reads "WHO FARTED?"

U0307.name: Bless This Mess
U0307.description: Snoopy spawns on your island in 10 years

U1542.name: Gambler's Certainty
U1542.description: Completely random events now have a higher chance of occurring as time goes on.

U1341.name: Total Recall
U1341.description: You can remember anything that happened in the past 24 hours with perfect clarity.

U1670.name: Eye Of The Storm
U1670.description: Wykfir's Greater Maelstrom now takes 2 fewer ticks to cast.

U1930.name: 100 single-use plastic bags dating from before The Fall

U0743.name: Mini Me
U0743.description: You can now split yourself in half to create 2 clones which are half the size of your normal self, both of which you control. You can merge these clones back together if they're touching. Each clone has halved stats.

U0743-A0000.name: Personal Army
U0743-A0000.description: You can now perform Mini Me cloning recursively.

U1035.name: The Littlest Mermaid
U1035.description: Whalekin are no longer healthy at all sizes

U1242.name: Your starting island's surface is covered in a 20cm thick layer of liquid bitumen

U1526.name: A picture of a Terrablade printed out on a paper dinner plate.

U0877.name: Ransomware
U0877.description: Several not-strictly-necessary but good-to-have mental skills (eg numeracy, face recognition, knowledge of dog breeds) that you have are now encrypted by an unknown 64-bit secret key. You have a USB port in the back of your head where you can connect and try to input the correct key.

U0521.name: Freshman's Dream
U0521.description: (x + y)2 now equals x2 + y2

U1543.name: Vindicated
U1543.description: Various conspiracies you've always believed before you came to The 'Verse all turn out to be true.

U0719.name: Make A Wish
U0719.description: A 7 meter diameter, 10 meter tall, non-functional decorative fountain made of stone is added to the southwest side of your island, supported by Star Material. It contains 4,209 coins from various countries.

U0949.name: Solomon's Lock
U0949.description: It is now impossible for you to have sex with Demonic type creatures

U0899.name: Ring For Service
U0899.description: A 1.5 meter tall, 1 meter diameter bell hangs off the bottom of your island.

U0116.name: A glass bottle of vintage Coca-Cola

U1108.name: Urban Decay
U1108.description: All buildings now have those ugly brown stains on them and there's crumbling concrete everywhere

U1108-A0000.name: Urbanite
U1108-A0000.description: Rare magic metals can now spawn in Urban Ruins, but so can Crack Orcs

U0262.name: Anhedonic
U0262.description: You can no longer feel happiness

U0488.name: Fair Fight
U0488.description: The World Dragon refrains from using instant death abilities until phase 3.

U1383.name: Sandman's Blessing
U1383.description: For every hour you spend asleep, 4 milligrams of titanium ore dust (TiO2) accumulates in the corners of each of your eyes.

U0445.name: Djinn & Tonic
U0445.description: A lamp which summons a mystical entity when rubbed which will grant you a 4/5ths-full 16oz disposable cup of tonic water with extra quinine. This can only be done three times, and the lamp evaporates instantly upon the third cup’s materialization.

U0479.name: Epstein Island
U0479.description: Gain a savvy new bunker underneath your island.

U0003.description: Your Animal Crossing island appears behind you (-100 miles back). There are no inhabitants.

U0511.name: For The Kids
U0511.description: Your starting tree now has a tire swing attached.

U0789.name: No Regrets
U0789.description: You become unaging as long as you don't think about how old you are. If you ever think about how old you are, you suddenly become the correct age.

U0738.name: Mike Jests
U0738.description: You are now tuned in to an infinite stream of famous Let's Player MikePlays! You are tuned in with your Mind's Ear, you can't mute it.

U0738-A0000.name: BombsUp
U0738-A0000.description: You can now send Twitch emotes psychically to MikePlays

U0738-A0001.name: The Trip Nnemonic
U0738-A0001.description: MikePlays is killed and replaced with MikeNnemonic, and your Mind's Sight is now unlocked. All of the regulars of his stream are now perceivable ghosts in your vision and will watch with you.

U0738-A0002.name: An Unlikely Alliance
U0738-A0002.description: All members of the Radioactive Uber Clan materialize within The 'Verse and will aid you on your journey.

U1812.name: This Is Very Bad
U1812.description: Many YouTube channels experience unexpected view count drops due to YouTube cracking down on bots and setting Restricted Mode on for user accounts by default.

U1958.name: Putting Economic Policy Before Fiscal Responsibility Is Like Killing The World Dragon Before The Radiation Demon
U1958.description: Inflation rates around The 'Verse approach levels comparable to Weimar Germany or America under Joe Biden.

U1621.name: Shinigami Eyes
U1621.description: The lifespan (in kiloyears) of any creature above 100 nanometers in diameter in your line of view will be shown to you in flashing red text.

U1285.name: Bring your pet with you into the 'Verse.

U1285-A0000.name: Neopet
U1285-A0000.description: Bring your Neopet with you into the 'Verse.

U1285-A0001.name: You Forgot Someone!
U1285-A0001.description: Bring your Neopet's Petpet with you into the 'Verse.

U1285-A0002.name: The Gang's All Here
U1285-A0002.description: Bring your Neopet's Petpet's Petpetpet with you into the 'Verse.

U0165.name: A ream of handmade recycled paper

U1002.name: The Candidate
U1002.description: While talking, tiny glowing dots will randomly appear on your face. You feel like you're being watched.

U1073.name: Three pounds of white super sculpey

U0740.name: Minds Eye
U0740.description: You gain the ability to visualize apples in extreme vivid detail.

U0740-A0000.name: Visionary
U0740-A0000.description: You can visualize any kind of fruit with absolute clarity.

U1895.name: When I'm Bored
U1895.description: Any music track you listen to will be accompanied by an epic Anime Music Video edit that plays in your head.

U0055.name: A 1 cubic meter flesh block spawns somewhere in the aether.
U0055.description: Touching it will grant you the ability to see The Mirror Dragon.

U0097.name: A complete version of Kichikou Mario is released, but playing it will kill the developer instantly.

U0299.name: Best Day Ever
U0299.description: For one day only, on the first anniversary of you starting this challenge, all* hostile monsters will instead throw an epic islandversary party for you.

U0759.name: Mr. Robot
U0759.description: You can hijack the wifi of other islands if you guess the password

U0428.name: Deep End
U0428.description: All island lakes are now 100x deeper

U0366.name: Chug Jug
U0366.description: You start with a refreshing ice cold glass of water

U0239.name: Amnesiac Hero
U0239.description: You lose all your memories at the beginning of the scenario.

U0876.name: Rancio
U0876.description: A special 2 liter glass vial which will turn urine within it into gasoline if left out in the sun for 2 days (cumulatively)

U1999.name: This Is My Island, It Was Made For Me!
U1999.description: -0.1 Sanity, +0.01 Morphity for every day you are less than 0.5 miles away from your island.

U0803.name: Now That The Dust Has Settled
U0803.description: Void Dust storms can now occur.

U1915.name: Lem
U1915.description: The classic Light Grey family game enjoyed by billions 'Versewide.

U1145.name: Won't Even Break A Sweat
U1145.description: Your stats are upgraded, but you can no longer sweat.

U1873.name: Destroy Them With Lasers
U1873.description: All arthropods have more legs, higher concentrations of venom, and are compelled to crawl on you in your sleep.

U1863.name: Start Doing This
U1863.description: You get a microphone. Turning it on, speaking a series of commands into it, and then turning it off will make your body perform the series of commands automatically. You will have no recollection of the events.

U1831.name: Sweet Victory
U1831.description: All past, present, and future players of the Pittsburgh Steelers are sent to Ultraheaven and given a steady supply of Godheroin for seven trillion years. All past, present, and future players of the Cleveland Browns are sent to Megahell and brutally tortured for seven trillion years.

U1048.name: The Punisher
U1048.description: A pandy bat with a The Punisher logo on it

U0635.name: Inner Strength
U0635.description: Your Str is temporarily increased after quiet introspection.

U1550.name: Achilles' Heal
U1550.description: Immersing 99% of your body in water removes all debuffs. Immersing 100% of your body in water kills you instantly.

U1590.name: Micro Machines
U1590.description: Three Toybots of neutral alignment are added to your starting island.

U1499.name: Fedora Tipper
U1499.description: Atheism is now the de facto religion all throughout The 'Verse.

U1019.name: The Fruit of the Loom logo has a cornucopia on it

U0133.name: A life-sized plastic anatomical dummy of an elf

U0990.name: Takeout Order
U0990.description: Order as many items off the following menu as you want, as many times as you want. Item prices are in points.

U1410-A0000.name: She wood
U1410-A0000.description: You can now have sex with your tree and produce human-tree hybrid offspring.

U1997.name: Good Old Games
U1997.description: Video games found in lootboxes will now only be limited to games from the Second Generation of consoles.

U0475.name: Endless Reinforcements
U0475.description: All enemy mages learn Greater Warp in their first year at their academy of choice. Invasions become overwhelming early on, but maybe you could get your hands on that spell...

U1115.name: Watch It Fly By As The Pendulum Swings
U1115.description: A 10 meter tall steel pendulum is added to the bottom of your island.

U2013.name: Cheap Meal
U2013.description: A tub of Roast Duck flavored protein powder.

U1426.name: Big News
U1426.description: Microbial life is found in the solar system while you're away.

U1426-A0000.name: Bigger News
U1426-A0000.description: Intelligent life is found in a nearby star system while you're away.

U1426-A0001.name: Biggest News
U1426-A0001.description: The cartoon "The Mighty B!" is rebooted while you're away.

U1342.name: Chemono
U1342.description: You become furrylicious, but have rectal cancer.

U1407.name: Numerology
U1407.description: All numbers are now more likely to contain patterns, repetitions, and ordered sets

U0268.name: Anybody There?
U0268.description: The closest island to your starting island is now at least 100km away

U1415.name: Charlie Dirk
U1415.description: Large increase in defence against piercing weapons targeted at your neck area, but only if the enemy disagrees with your values.

U0225.name: All NPCs now speak The King's English.

U0632.name: Infinite Jest
U0632.description: A DVD which contains a different Naruto AMV set to "Bloodhound Gang - The Bad Touch" every time it's played

U1489.name: Embarrassing Habit
U1489.description: You now uncontrollably say "lol" out loud after some sentences.

U1620.name: Drawn To Life
U1620.description: You can now draw an avatar to represent yourself before starting. You must have the same number of limbs as a human and have no visible external features that would give you any sort of advantage.

U1741.name: Regression To The Mean
U1741.description: You become more average in every way.

U1434.name: The Frydarian Tale
U1434.description: Basileus Joseph Fygoon joins you on your adventure, armed with battle experience and a random weapon from his journeys across Frydar Island.

U0086.name: A camera that can only take a photo of yourself once per day.

U0251.name: An endless feed of Roblox chat from random games beamed directly into your left eye 24 hours a day in brilliant red text.

U0388.name: Come, My Thrall
U0388.description: A RealDoll golem comes with your island. Using her for any kind of sexual task will cause her artificial soul to disperse and leave the doll lifeless

U0388-A0000.name: Forbidden Servant
U0388-A0000.description: A mini-RealDoll Golem with the same rules applied. Had to be smuggled through Elfen customs. Don't let anyone catch you with this.

U1573.name: Name Voucher
U1573.description: Change your name at the start of your run

U1982.name: /settime
U1982.description: A silver digital watch. Every time it reenters your field of vision, the time of day will instantaneously change to a pseudo-randomly chosen time

U1332.name: Chef's Kiss
U1332.description: Ticks, leeches, mosquitos, and all other tiny, blood-sucking creatures now have professional-level cooking knowledge which can be temporarily transferred to you in small amounts.

U0911.name: Sawed Off
U0911.description: You can shoot 100g of sawdust out of your fingertips per second. It costs you 30 calories per second per fingertip.

U0842.name: Perfect World
U0842.description: All water is now Sprite Zero

U0835.name: Peasant Genetics
U0835.description: You are built to survive famine. Your hunger bar depletes 33.3% slower.

U2041.name: Just An Idea
U2041.description: You gain the ability to easily push box-shaped objects as large as yourself, but NPCs in The 'Verse now rarely take your ideas seriously.

U1579.name: Good Girl
U1579.description: Any mistresses you obtain in The 'Verse will agree to cosplay as your favorite cartoon character with no resistance.

U1659.name: I Am The Blade Of My Sword
U1659.description: Your left forearm is replaced with a sword.

U1659-A0000.name: 'Verse Adventure Mamba
U1659-A0000.description: Your sword arm is upgraded to a psycho-blade.

U0062.name: A 240g jar of Montaño Bangus (Milkfish) in Corn Oil

U0062-A0000.name: Olive oil instead of corn oil

U0062-A0001.name: (HOT) In olive oil and white wine

U1828.name: It's The Little Things
U1828.description: Diminutive races and monsters are now 1000% more common.

U0226.name: All pitbulls become friendly towards you.
U0226.description: All other breeds of dogs are bloodlusted and will attack you on sight.

U0786.name: No Limits Fun
U0786.description: The 'Verse no longer has any age of consent laws.

U0786-A0000.name: Diggy Diggy Hole
U0786-A0000.description: Dwarven children no longer have any rights under 'Verse law.

U1307.name: Dirty Pear
U1307.description: Your starting tree now grows one pear covered in dirt a month

U0063.name: A 5.5 meter tall stained glass window depicting a group of figures standing in a jungle looking at a dead animal

U0035.name: 4 random lawn signs are added to your starting island.

U1180.name: You can explain any iceberg chart upon seeing it for 10 seconds

U0050.name: 666 carats of stolen sapphires
U0050.description: The velvet bag also contains an AirTag...

U1085.name: Toucan Sam
U1085.description: You can now convert Toucans into cereal with your mind

U0215.name: Affirmative Action
U0215.description: Your charisma is twice as effective only when uttering the word "Yes."

U0016.name: 150 pop tabs, 100 bottlecaps, and 95 plastic soda caps

U0775.name: Neue Cyoa Deux School Days: Family Friendly Edition
U0775.description: Enemies and NPCs use absolutely no mature, gross or suggestive language. No swears, no slurs.

U1466.name: Happy Hardcore
U1466.description: Monsters are x1.5 stronger and NPCs are x1.5 friendlier.

U1668.name: Poacher's Profit
U1668.description: Mighty Phenixes now drop 2x as many claws and feathers and will rarely drop Bronzed Helms of the Ascetic, Deepglade Sickles, and Potions of Absorb Blasphemy.

U0363.name: Choose one companion of yours. You now receive a stuffed doll in their image.

U0431.name: Demon Core
U0431.description: Your End now increases by the formula (Faithlessness / 1e9)

U1557.name: Surprise Egg
U1557.description: All foods now have random solid objects hidden inside them.

U0451.name: Doppler Effect
U0451.description: Acceleration slows you down, and remaining still causes you to speed up.

U0589.name: Heroic Dose
U0589.description: You get a 12 oz glass vial filled with a red potion that doubles the Str and Dex of anything that consumes it and quadruples its End, but also causes intense and nightmarish visual and auditory hallucinations. The full potion, if drank, lasts 5 hours.

U0796.name: NoSleep
U0796.description: You now no longer need to sleep, though you can if you wish.

U0457.name: Drought
U0457.description: It hasn't rained in what seems like forever, and the sun is beating down on The 'Verse hard. Could it be the World Dragon's doing? All crops must be watered manually, and they die three times as fast without water. Races whose economies depend on agriculture will be poorer, and more desperate as a result.

U0643.name: Island is guaranteed to be above Latvia

U0070.name: A baseball bat made of coral

U1688.name: Runelight
U1688.description: You can now level hidden stats.

U0539.name: Gentleman
U0539.description: Fatal blows instead leave female enemies on the brink of death and remove their clothes.

U1028.name: The Incident
U1028.description: Get covered in mysterious scars which you become reluctant to talk about

U0381.name: Coin-Op
U0381.description: A friend you know from real life of your choice will join you, but they now must eat currency to survive.

U1664.name: Clean AF
U1664.description: A dispenser filled with the school bathroom pink soap is installed on your island.

U0558.name: Gourmand
U0558.description: Every 5000kg consumed makes it so you no longer age for a year. Anything not immediately toxic can be consumed.

U0975.name: Stool Sample
U0975.description: Choose one of these three wooden stools to get installed on your island next to your chest.

U1354.name: You no longer feel guilt after jacking off.

U1532.name: Seeker Of The Depths
U1532.description: A motion-activated novelty singing fish which speaks a sequence of numbers when given power. The numbers change based on your location.

U1194.name: You must end all sentences you speak or write with "Sent from my iPhone"

U1089.name: Trans Rights
U1089.description: You are now a real woman. WARNING: Avoid mirrors.

U0808.name: Oh Baby
U0808.description: Foetal Hellspawn are now twice as common

U1387.name: Brand Loyalty
U1387.description: Humanoid NPCs under 3.5 meters in height branded by both the Spotify® and FanDuel logos are hypnotically compelled to obey you.

U1311.name: Boom Blox Bash Party for the Nintendo Wii

U1799.name: Fantasy Sports
U1799.description: You get a Farther Cwtec Behemoths baseball cap.

U1799-A0000.name: The Best Things In Life Are Free
U1799-A0000.description: You can get more 'Verse-themed sportswear using your accumulated FanDuel Bonus Points.

U1050.name: The Rising Sun
U1050.description: Replace your tree with a Cherry Blossom tree.

U1050-A0000.name: Perfect Cherry Blossom
U1050-A0000.description: Your tree now grows Touhou fumo dolls

U1538.name: Smells Like Bacon
U1538.description: Animated corpses now smell good instead of bad.

U0936.name: Side Quest
U0936.description:
Do you remember the story of the 6 Great Champions?
Geither, the wisest of the Elfs; Marbaran, the eldest of the Vampires; Xu-Bisi, the most intelligent of the Greys;  Kippa, the richest of the Goblins; Tyrone, the strongest of the Orcs; and Jimmy, the luckiest Human.
2,700 years ago they surmounted the Three Glorious Challenges and won fame for themselves throughout all of The 'Verse. The legends of their exploits are still told, but...
Recently Marbaran has resurfaced. He claims he is not the only one left alive: Jimmy lives, and he has begun to be a mighty one in The 'Verse.
Jimmy has enslaved an island of Demi Brood and Gays and seems to be making plans to resurrect the others. His goal is unknown, but Marbaran thinks he is seeking to raise a mighty army to take on "The Invading Islander"...

U1161-A0000.name: Only Up
U1161-A0000.description: Your starting tree gets a ladder installed on it

U1161-A0001.name: Overgrowth
U1161-A0001.description: Your starting tree's diameter is 7x wider and it now has large branches regularly, some of which would be large enough to stand upon.

U1161-A0002.name: Secret Clubhouse
U1161-A0002.description: A shitty, cramped, sloppily-built treehouse is added somewhere in your starting tree.

U1576.name: Mechanical Keyboard
U1576.description: You hear the keypresses after each action you take.

U1576-A0001.name: DualShock
U1576-A0001.description: They're PS4 controller noises instead, with occasional vibrations.

U1169.name: You become bald.
U1169.description: If you can find a way to restore your hair, you may find it has taken on an unexpected quality...

U0333.name: Broken Going Into Games Machine
U0333.description: Severely damaged from overuse, requires extensive repairs.

U2065.name: Nothing Without The Fans
U2065.description: Do you have an awesome fanwork about Neue CYOA: Deux? Email it to icouldbeany1@proton.me and enter the redemption code you receive as a reply in the field below to get 5 FREE points!

U0933.name: Sick Stunts
U0933.description: A 20 meter by 20 meter concrete BMX park is added to the west end of your island. There is a sewer underneath it (stretching 10 meters down) infested with Weeping Hellslimes, Tube Men, and a single Leviathan Gator.

U0886.name: Remove all termites from the starting tree.

U0886-A0000.name: Add carpenter ants to the starting tree

U1281.name: A swollen laptop battery
U1281.description: It can be used in combat to discharge all its energy at once.

U2048.name: Gainful Employment
U2048.description: You are immediately given job at the nearest dust factory as soon as you find it.

U2048-A0000.name: Never Open The Green Door No Matter What You Hear
U2048-A0000.description: On your first day at the dust factory, your supervisor will give you a strange set of rules...

U0982.name: SuperSpecial
U0982.description: The color of your eyes changes based on your mood

U0545.name: Ghost Dad
U0545.description: Ghosts are now attracted to uninhabited graves.

U1761.name: Supreme Gentleman
U1761.description: Chivalry is now more respected all throughout The 'Verse.

U1296.name: Magical Realism
U1296.description: A small gland is added next to your bladder that produces tiny quantities of pixie dust.

U0615.name: I Put On My Robe and Wizard Hat
U0615.description: You get a robe and wizard hat

U1182.name: You can freely convert low-sodium soy sauce to normal soy sauce and vice versa

U1564.name: Amphibia
U1564.description: Aquatic creatures are now 500% more common.

U1163.name: You are allowed to watch unlimited nostalgia compilation videos customized for you in your mind's eye.
U1163.description: Every time you watch one, you feel a memory slipping...

U0959.name: Spotify® #SpreadTheWord Sweepstakes
U0959.description: You get entered to win a lifetime of Spotify® Premium if you've read the Spotify® Corrections and take this choice!

U0946.name: Slime Processor
U0946.description: A machine you can dump slimes into to make edible material from their remains. The material's texture and flavor are undesirable.

U1159.name: Wubba Lubba dub-dub!
U1159.description: You become as smart as Rick Sanchez for 1 week

U0309.name: Blessing of GabeN
U0309.description: There is a Steam sale right when you spawn.

U1818.name: Strawman
U1818.description: You can now summon illusory copies of other beings only for the purpose of pretending to beat them up.

U1334.name: Invoke Prejudice
U1334.description: Increase the GC (Global Consciousness) on an island, increasing the chances of a random event between the races of The 'Verse.

U0837.name: Peerless
U0837.description: No one will ever be the same age as you

U1644.name: Lego Island
U1644.description: Your starting island is now made of legos.

U0621.name: If Only You Could Talk To The Monsters
U0621.description: Monsters' verbal abuse will now be more vicious and personal

U0131.name: A large bag of cheddar chex mix, but the food inside has inverted colors

U1724.name: Parabolic Conduit
stats: receptiveness to all Eether and Void transmitted Majyks

U0171.name: A set of 16 0.75 oz food coloring bottles

U1531.name: Coward's Way Out
U1531.description: A disposable zip gun with a single bullet. Any being killed by the bullet will have a pre-death hallucination where they spend 10 subjective years in the setting of Duck Dodgers as their own original character.

U0106.name: A faithful replica of Timmy Turner's fishbowl

U1611.name: Knowledge Of The Ancients
U1611.description: You now can now perfectly recognize and name all rave stabs and their sources.

U1317.name: Allergies
U1317.description: You now have a random elemental weakness

U0838.name: Pen Island
U0838.description: Your island comes with a pen

U1346.name: New Kid On The Bloc
U1346.description: The Ouya comes back and replaces the Playstation X in the global nostalgience for Elder Vidya. All PSX shaders that were ever used and ever shall be used are now replaced with Ouya shaders. You get an Ouya with all necessary cables and peripherals delivered to your island. Ou-YEAH!

U1271.name: 1kg of tofu, and 1kg of gelatin mixed with sawdust and white mold.

U1698.name: No Zap
U1698.description: Electricity no longer exists in The 'Verse.

U0995.name: Thank You Bus Driver
U0995.description: The bus driver will take you to any island in a hundred mile radius, no ride back.

U0779.name: New Grounds
U0779.description: The properties of matter change randomly.

U0983.name: Supplication to the Divine
U0983.description: Praying for 1 hour stops you from aging for 5 hours. Effect scales with your Holy.

U0983-A0000.name: Intercession
U0983-A0000.description: Other NPCs praying for you increases your lifespan by 1 hour for each hour prayed per NPC.

U0983-A0001.name: Our Hero
U0983-A0001.description: A random stat is increased by 0.05 when an NPC prays for you.

U0983-A0002.name: Our Lord
U0983-A0002.description: A random stat is increased by 0.1 when an NPC prays to you.

U0685.name: Leader of the Pack
U0685.description: You can now tame wolves. (Requires human femur)

U0154.name: A plastic container containing 70 disinfectant wipes

U0328.name: Breakfast Dog 2
U0328.description: Almost as good as the original.

U1917.name: An infinite calendar which gains new months accompanied with pleasant photos of nature and architecture, but if you fail to flip the page within 24 hours on the first of every month, it will lose this ability.

U0284.name: Barbie
U0284.description: Your body is made of cactus material

U2058.name: 'Verses's Best Boss
U2058.description: Any business owned by you is 15% more efficient if at least 40% of the employees love their job.

U1949.name: Backburner
U1949.description: A fireproof coat that catches on fire when you do something epic.

U1707.name: New York Times Omniversal Subscription
U1707.description: You can play the daily Wordle in your head.

U0109.name: A flexible pole that can only be used for pole vaulting and slightly grows in length as you become stronger

U0493.name: Far Out, Dude!
U0493.description: Immediately get catapulted into the stratosphere a million miles from your island and die.

U1696.name: No Map
U1696.description: Maps of any kind no longer make sense to you. You have trouble visualizing physical areas in your head.

U1511.name: Moving Plans
U1511.description: 3 pieces of US Letter sized 5mm graph paper labelled "X", "Y", and "Z" and a special green pencil with eraser. Each horizontal box length is equal to 0.25 meters. Each vertical box length is equal to one second. Drawing a connected line that moves upward and to the left or right on any of the pieces of paper (or on any combination of them) will, after you add a checkmark to one of the pieces of paper and wait 3 seconds, translate your body along that trajectory over time. Can be reused if old markings are erased.

U1086.name: Tournament Arc
U1086.description: You now have a map to the World Arena

U0277.name: Attack of Titans
U0277.description: Titans are permanently hostile to you. Locks you out of the Yearly Festival and the Basketball Stadium will not spawn.

U0810.name: Omega Kek!
U0810.description: Pepe joins you for a year of fun!

U1740.name: Middling
U1740.description: You are now fatecursed to never get first place in anything.

U0012.name: 12 decagrams of cookie dough that cannot be cooked

U0009.name: 1 Whale Carcass
U0009.description: Still fresh for the time being.

U1255.name: Your traps look huge but you arent physically stronger

U1640.name: Boomer
U1640.description: You can now make parts of your body explode at will.

U1708.name: Flower Power
U1708.description: Flowers will now provide backing vocals when you sing.

U0036.name: 4 toy flags
U0036.description: Planting one in the ground will claim a 5 metre x 5 metre square of land with the flag at its center. This effect extends infinitely along the y-axis. The demarcated area will have anti-griefing measures enabled. Removing the flag from the square will nullify the effect and cause it to turn to dust. (CAUTION: Characters possessing the Hacker trait and certain powerful entities can bypass the effect.)

U1811.name: Pro Choice
U1811.description: Denizens of The 'Verse will consistently praise your tactical genius and skill in decision making, but they're really just being nice.

U0183.name: A surfboard with art of a sexy anime girl in a bikini on it

U0490.name: Fairy
U0490.description: Your skin burns when touching iron

U1336.name: Mythril
U1336.description: Mythic-level materials are now 2% more effective in crafting

U1571.name: Human Centipede
U1571.description: You now have 50 legs and 50 arms.

U1571-A0000.name: Human Millipede
U1571-A0000.description: You now have 500 legs and 500 arms.

U1970.name: Nudge
U1970.description: A plastic finger pointer that always applies 1 Newton of force to anything it's pointing at, no matter how far away.

U1411.name: Tipsy
U1411.description: Tipsy status effect added until the run ends.

U1411-A0000.name: Wasted
U1411-A0000.description: "Wasted" status effect added until the run ends.

U1418.name: Greek Chorus
U1418.description: A set of ghostly old men in stone masks will follow you around for your duration in The 'Verse. At random times when nothing else is going on they will summarize the recent events that have happened to you through character dialogue.

U1033.name: The Letter 6 Times
U1033.description: You can only move by changing the orientation of gravity. This effect applies only to you

U0666.name: Just Two
U0666.description: Sapient races will be more inclined to listen to you before fighting

U1345.name: Only Skindeep
U1345.description: You receive the number for Skindeep Reddy Prakshatva, who you may call for Magitech support.

U1721.name: Laser Blast
U1721.description: 14 sprouts of silphium are added to your island, most of which are diseased.

U0352.name: Carry Lookahead
U0352.description: You get your winner's commemorative fanny pack at the start

U1403.name: K-Pop Demon Hunter
U1403.description: Gain double damage against demons, angels, and river elves while blasting K-Pop!

U0844.name: Pet Shop Boys
U0844.description: A CD (in a CD jewel case) of the Beach Boys' album Pet Sounds. There is an extra song at the end which is a minute of ambient noise followed by an abruptly cut off scream. Every time you play the CD the last song gets longer.

U0167.name: Adventurer's Cap
U0167.description: A replica of King Graham's hat from King's Quest

U0823.name: Only a Spoonful
U0823.description: You start with an average sized spoon. Anything consumed by the player must be first decanted into the spoon or scooped up by it. If the spoon is lost or broken, nothing can be consumed.

U2046.name: Cry Havok
U2046.description: A Mesheleth rag doll. When on your person, you take x0.5 damage from all sources, but any damage in class Moderate or above will cause you to ragdoll for 5 seconds. Ragdolling makes you extremely flexible, although occasional physics errors may occur.

U1041.name: The Neighbors
U1041.description: About 30 meters away from your island on a different 15 x 15 x 5 meter floating island, a Green Elf couple moves into a small, cozy cottage. They're... well, it's not like you hate Green Elves, but... You know, Green Elf culture is...

U0506.name: Fishy Odd Parents
U0506.description: A pair of two goldfish in a fishbowl

U0972.name: Still wa- wait no
U0972.description: A girl who has been dead for 36 hours.

U1223.name: Your brain gets larger but your skull stays the same size

U0080.name: A box full of assorted fireworks

U1754.name: I Like Turtles
U1754.description: You gain a large shell on your back which you can retreat into for an 1000% increase in Def as well as End.

U1120.name: We're Gonna Need A Bigger Starting Island

U0594.name: Hijack
U0594.description: You get your own custom Fumo! It's made of high quality materials and washes easily if it gets dirty, but whenever you close your eyes vivid scenes of people being dismembered and burnt alive plague your mind's eye. Sometimes you can hear them, too.

U0056.name: A 1 liter bottle of World Mountain Dew

U1890.name: A tome entitled Basic Psychic Protection for Hedge Mages: Self-Defense with the Mind Blank Spell

U0212.name: Adam and Steve
U0212.description: Steve from Minecraft joins your game!

U0952.name: South Park on TV
U0952.description: A TV with built-in DVD player and a remote that can only play the haunted South Park DVD, but requires no power to do so. It appears to be hollow inside.

U0915.name: Scripted Failure
U0915.description: You lose the first fight you ever get into on your journey

U0930.name: Shut It Down
U0930.description: Golems are no longer hostile towards you by default.

U0101.name: A cracked, but presently watertight, jar

U1186.name: You can never masturbate again
stats: Rep with a certain cereal brand

U0175.name: A slightly damp 0.15 meter by 0.2 meter cardboard box filled with sugar cubes

U1473.name: Everyman
U1473.description: NPCs now perceive you as being their race.

U1384.name: Sandman's Curse
U1384.description: For every hour spent in REM sleep, a small amount (1 milligram) of sodium hydroxide concentrate accumulates in the corners of each of your eyes.

U0673.name: Killing a human within a magic circle creates and charges portals which you can connect together.
U0673.description: N2 human sacrifices are necessary to create a portal of N cm radius.

U2018.name: The Rumors Were True
U2018.description: Your Wis, Mag, Juju, and Mojo, along with Maja Regeneration, are doubled as long as you're at least 30 years old and remain a virgin.

U0283.name: Baldo's Basics
U0283.description: You're bald but are really good at simple math problems involving numbers with digits under three.

U1264.name: Neue CYOA Deux Official Strategy Guide
U1264.description: Contains several build lists considered meta by the community.

U1962.name: Master Kleen
U1962.description: A wizard-shaped bath sponge which removes the magical effects of anything scrubbed by it.

U1674.name: Dungeon Crawl
U1674.description: Your legs temporarily stop working while in dungeons.

U1261.name: 御神木
U1261.description: Your starting tree is a bonsai, and produces a haiku each morning.

U1804.name: Future Diary
U1804.description: You get 3 photos of yourself from the future.

U1187.name: You can see further, but your sight is permanently zoomed in reducing your FOV greatly

U0612.name: I Gotta Go
U0612.description: NPCs now often withold crucial information and become agitated when you try to get more information out of them

U0320.name: Boom, Headshot
U0320.description: Any attacks you take to the head will cause you to die immediately.

U0619.name: Icarus
U0619.description: You now have artificial wings, requires beeswax to repair from melting. WARNING: Do not fly too close to the sun. Do not let the sun get too close to you.

U0087.name: A cardboard box painted to look like a shulker box

U1940.name: One Perfect Shot
U1940.description: An inverse camera capable of a single inverse photo projection.

U1294.name: High Fantasy
U1294.description: Smoke up! Not only is it legal, it's actually encouraged! Ask an elf rolling a spliff for a hit and he won't mind, just so long as you pass that roach on back, hombre!

U0302.name: Big Beautiful Wizard
U0302.description: For every BMI point you are above 25 you gain 1 Wis. For every 5 points, a 1.1x multiplier is added to your total Wis

U1107.name: Upcycled
U1107.description: If you die, your body will be used in an art installation.

U1079.name: Tim Rogers cut up while talking

U1197.name: You gain a new perspective.
U1197.description: In addition, Status Effect "HUMBLED" is added for 2 decades

U1553.name: The Cake is a Lie
U1553.description: The World Dragon baked a cake for you.

U0858.name: Press F
U0858.description: You must mourn every life you take

U1298.name: Isekai
U1298.description: Instead of just vanishing and appearing in The 'Verse, a convincing enough cadaver is left where you last were.

U1298-A0000.name: Eadem Mutata Resurgo
U1298-A0000.description: Your corpse will miraculously revive in a flash of dazzling light when you complete your run and you will be lifted out of the ground.

U1365.name: Have A Bad Day
U1365.description: La Beastia is added to the random monster spawns. Can consume anything it can fit into its gaping maw.

U0330.name: Bro Code
U0330.description: Men trust you. A minor organ of yours becomes mechanical.

U2034.name: True Fan
U2034.description: Earn 10 extra points if you buy something from the official Neue CYOA Deux: Skyblock Edition e-shop!

U1971.name: Hero Helper
U1971.description: A bottle which, after being spun, will always point to the nearest princess.

U1319.name: Goatsy
U1319.description: You get goat horns and eyes

U0557.name: Gotcha!™
U0557.description: Instead of spending your points on perks or items, you can instead put them into the "Gotcha!"™ gacha machine for a chance at wonderful rewards! -5 points per draw. For rewards list and odds please see relevant section of footnotes.

U1335.name: Geiger Counter
U1335.description: Electronic instrument for detecting and measuring ionizing radiation.

U1335-A0000.name: Pneumatic Counter
U1335-A0000.description: Your geiger counter can now detect thaumatic radiation.

U0360.name: Chimes at Midnight
U0360.description: Wind chimes hang off of your starting tree.

U1976.name: Touch of Evil
U1976.description: Everything you touch becomes 10% more evil. Only applies once per object

U1700.name: No Lap
U1700.description: Your feet are now directly attached to your torso.

U1270.name: Multiversal Warming
U1270.description: All plastic straws in The 'Verse are replaced with paper straws.

U1562.name: Age Of Cultivation
U1562.description: You can now participate in The 'Verse's unique Cultivation system, advancing to the ranks of Warped Dragonkin, Demi-Sage, or even World Guardian. You may cycle your Vital Aura, Mana, Blood, Mind Vapor, and Soul Sand into a foundational Path that meets your needs, and improve yourself gradually. However be warned, many creatures harbor this knowledge as well, and may be much stronger than you...

U0105.name: A Dr. Pepper machine that only dispenses Mr. Pibb

U1647.name: Dungeoneering
U1647.description: The 'Verse is now filled with 100x more dungeons and labyrinths.

U1647-A0000.name: PrisonPlanet
U1647-A0000.description: Most societies in The 'Verse become oriented around dungeons.

U1709.name: My REAL Friends
U1709.description: Talking to inanimate objects refills your sanity meter.

U1701.name: Resonant Chamber
U1701.description: You now perfectly absorb and redirect sounds from the palm of one hand to the other.

U0203.name: A whistle which causes chest mimics to reveal themselves

U2049.name: Don't Forget To Hydrate
U2049.description: A gallon of water in a reusable plastic water bag.

U1514.name: Blessing of Babel
U1514.description: You gain an uncanny ability to design and learn any constructed language, which is sure to earn you great respect in the conlang community.

U0748.name: Modded
U0748.description: Powerful new raw materials are abundant on your island, but every day there's a 0.05% chance your game will crash and you'll have to start over from day 1

U0628.name: Improved Technique
U0628.description: Your starting tree now grows 50% larger grapefruit!

U0750.name: Moist Critical
U0750.description: +25% critical hit chance on enemies that are wet.

U0271.name: Arithmancy
U0271.description:
Carrying or wearing a certain number of an item will increase a corresponding stat by +1, +3, +5, or x1.25. 
2, 20, 24, 100: Chr
3, 18, 26, 111: Dex
4, 16, 30, 99: End
5, 15, 33, 145: Str
6, 17, 34, 321: Spd
7, 14,  28, 777: Lck
8, 12, 101, 999: Int
9, 11, 23, 666: Ach
10, 19, 37, 333: Wis

U0271-A0000.name: Pythagorean
U0271-A0000.description: If you repeat any of the base numbers out loud several times in a row, you get a small (+2.5% after other buffs) boost to that stat for a few seconds

U0271-A0001.name: Sacred Geometry
U0271-A0001.description: If you wear something with a depiction of a regular polygon with a number of vertices equal to the base number of a stat, you get a small (+1% after other buffs) boost to the corresponding stat

U1027.name: The House Always Wins
U1027.description: All lootboxes now have a 1% chance to contain lit Hyperbombs

U2040.name: Mask Off
U2040.description: Wearing the faces of others keeps you calm and collected.

U1551.name: The Angry Video Game Nerd
U1551.description: Playing any video game turns you into a rage-fueled monster with zero intelligence and no way to change back.

U0768.name: Mystic Eyes of Bait Perception
U0768.description: Glasses which allow you to differentiate between ragebait and trolling

U0261.name: An unknown IKEA furniture set in an unlabeled box with no instruction manual.

U0749.name: Modest Affluence
U0749.description: Gems below Vantawhite-grade are 1.10x more numerous, but rarer and unique gems are 1.10x less numerous.

U0634.name: Infinity +1 Shield
U0634.description: A wooden shield that makes you feel invincible

U0061.name: A 2 meter by 2 meter by 2 meter solid stone satellite island is added to your island 2 meters off the northwest corner.
U0061.description: It is supported with Star Material like the main island, but the two are not connected.

U0061-A0000.name: An office setup with a desk, chair, and pieces of cardboard painted like computer accessories (monitor, keyboard, and mouse) bridges between your island and the satellite island.
U0061-A0000.description: The foundations are wood and decently stable, but it is not supported by Star Material.

U0061-A0003.name: Your office now has a "punk" theme.
U0061-A0003.description: A wall is added behind the computer desk and a poster is added that says "I hate rules!"

U0061-A0004.name: Your office now has a "sports" theme.
U0061-A0004.description: A wall is added behind the computer desk and a poster is added that says "Touchdown!"

U0061-A0005.name: Your office now has a "video games" theme.
U0061-A0005.description: A wall is added behind the computer desk and a poster is added that says "Score > Everything"

U0061-A0006.name: Your office now has a "math" theme.
U0061-A0006.description: A wall is added behind the computer desk and a poster is added that says "f = ma"

U0061-A0007.name: Your office now has a "finance" theme.
U0061-A0007.description: A wall is added behind the computer desk and a poster is added that says "$$$"

U0061-A0008.name: Your office now has a "girly" theme.
U0061-A0008.description: A wall is added behind the computer desk and a poster is added that says "Shopping <3"

U0061-A0009.name: Your office now has a "politics" theme.
U0061-A0009.description: A wall is added behind the computer desk and a poster is added that says "The social contract"

U0061-A0010.name: Your office now has a "philosophy" theme.
U0061-A0010.description: A wall is added behind the computer desk and a poster is added that says "Hmm."

U0061-A0011.name: Your office now has a "minimalist" theme.
U0061-A0011.description: A wall is added behind the computer desk.

U0061-A0012.name: The size of the satellite island is increased to 3 by 3 by 3 meters, but it is now 3 meters away.
U0061-A0012.description: If you take the office setup, the office will be made longer.

U0061-A0013.name: A koi pond is added to your satellite island.

U1968.name: Hellraiser
U1968.description: A box of lemon cookies and a bag of popcorn. (Proceeds will be used to fund the Ghoul Scouts)

U0202.name: A wheel of casu marzu that spawns worms indefinitely
U0202.description: It has a chance (0.0004%) to spawn The Worm Dragon.

U0960.name: Squadala!
U0960.description: A mysterious wizard will let you fly on his magic carpet in exchange for a 20 Ultra-Rare gems every 100 miles.

U1351.name: Public Domain
U1351.description: Entities of the 'Verse do not see the items on your island as your property. If you encounter any, they can take and use any items as they please, and may refuse to return them to you when asked.

U1351-A0000.name: Attribution
U1351-A0000.description: Entities using your items must first personally thank you for your generosity before taking one or more of their choice. When they use the item(s), its effects will be two times stronger than if you used the item. You will be struck with pangs of jealousy.

U2028.name: Kept A Spare In The Safe
U2028.description: You now have the key to open the door to Grandpa's Secret Place. If only you knew how to summon the gate...

U0890.name: Reset Button
U0890.description: A button you can press at any time to restart the game

U0173.name: A sheet big enough for a king size bed

U0678.name: Kugelblitz
U0678.description: Clapping your hands turns you into a black hole

U1010.name: The decaying head of a pig

U1390.name: Culture War
U1390.description: Random bacteria now spawn on your starting island.

U1390-A0000.name: Counterculture
U1390-A0000.description: Spawned bacteria is guaranteed to be non-pathogenic.

U1544.name: Blocktris
U1544.description: Loot boxes, chests, loot bags, and enemy loot tables now have a higher chance of dropping tetrominoes.

U1279.name: An insulin meter, insulin pump, and a 1-month supply of insulin.

U1412.name: Jackpot
U1412.description: 1.5x LCK whenever entered into a lottery.

U0732.name: Megatropolis
U0732.description: You can stop time, but only subjectively.

U1795.name: No Need to Ask Why
U1795.description: Parry Gripp will write one song based on your most recent event or milestone

U1295.name: Gaslamp Fantasy
U1295.description: Gremlins now exclusively use steam-powered technology and wear top hats and monocles. They also no longer bathe.

U0631.name: Incubus
U0631.description: Having sex with NPCs or monsters increases your lifespan by 1 day.

U1848.name: Aquarius
U1848.description: Your astrological sign is historically misinterpreted as having good compatibility with elven females. The opposite is actually true.

U0785.name: No Cape
U0785.description: You can no longer equip anything in your Cape Slot.

U0433.name: Dent Yours
U0433.description: Your teeth are replaced with steel teeth. You get your old teeth in a bag.

U0477.name: Enter The Void
U0477.description: Once dead, you can go into spectator mode before Truedeath.

U0753.name: Mongolian Death Worm
U0753.description: Your island will occasionally lose individual blocks of dirt.

U1767.name: Alienmode
U1767.description: You now have a Toronto accent.

U0500.name: Feast or Famine

U0881.name: Redstone Prodigy

U1780.name: Grandpa Would Love These

U1369.name: Loveless
U1369.description: Immunity to charm, women seem to despise you.

U2032.name: Demon Time

U1945.name: Solo Leveling
