U0707.name: LSD Dream Emulator
U0707.description: Your brain now contains 2000% more DMT.

U2005.name: Rope Fuel
U2005.description: A jump rope that makes you slightly more motivated when you hold it.

U1395.name: A pile of dodo tree bark

U1986.name: Don't Recall Getting That One
U1986.description: Tattoos randomly appear and disappear off your body. Occasionally, they will be magic (blessed or cursed).

U1103.name: Unlikely Tactician
U1103.description: You have Down syndrome and a permanent concussion, but your effective battle IQ is increased by 1.10x.

U1442.name: Justice
U1442.description: Derek Chauvin is pardoned and knighted. Anyone who used Steam Achievement Manager is permanently VAC banned and raped. Anyone who botted in OSRS gets their hands cut off and acid splashed in their face and shot.

U1558.name: Spiderman
U1558.description: You can now produce spider silk and weave webs.

U1196.name: You forget any memory you've ever had of India

U0416.name: Dame Tu Cosita
U0416.description: You receive a boombox that only plays the Top 10 worldwide hits.

U1546.name: Cool Spot
U1546.description: All soda is now randomly selected from the following pool of variants: 7 Up, Cherry 7 Up, 7 Up Gold, 7 Citrus, dnL, Pomegranate 7 Up, 7 Up Retro, Mixed Berry 7 Up Antioxidant, Tropical 7 Up, Simple 7 Up, Shirley Temple 7 Up, 7 Up Hecho en Mexico, 7 Up Zero Sugar, Cherry 7 Up Zero Sugar, Diet 7 Up Gold, Mixed Berry 7 Up Plus, Cherry 7 Up Plus, Island Fruit 7 Up Plus, Diet Pomegranate 7 Up, Diet Mixed Berry 7 Up Antioxidant, 7 Up Ten, Tropical 7 Up Zero Sugar, 7 Up with Cherry on Top, 7 Up Ice Cola, Orange 7 Up, Raspberry 7 Up, 7 Up Revive, 7 Up Free, 7 Up Tropical Twist, 7 Up Citrus Splash, 7 Up Ice, 7 Up Ice Tropical, 7 Up Frootaz, 7 Up H2OH!, 7 Up Lemon Squeeze, 7 Up Clear Dry, 7 Up Yerbabuena, Salted Lemon 7 Up, 7 Up Mojito, 7 Up Cocktail Exotique, 7 Up Free Mojito, 7 Up Lemon Lemon, 7 Up Free Cherry, and 7 Up Zero Sugar Pink Lemonade.

U1865.name: Merry Madcap Lord
U1865.description: Mismatched weapons and armor sets are now doubly effective when at least one item with the "SILLY" tag is equipped. When all items equipped are tagged as "SILLY", you may enter Toyzerker mode once per day for 30 seconds.

U1386.name: It Can't Be Helped
U1386.description: All dead monsters respawn as ghosts

U0896.name: Revolver
U0896.description: A cap gun that scares you when you hold it. Comes with 3 sets of 8 caps.

U1222.name: Your body is now delicate and angelic, but you get raped every evening

U0618.name: I'm Sorry
U0618.description: You did something horrible in a past life, and you must repent.

U1235.name: Your island is installed with an auto car wash with all the really cool machines and rainbow soap and stuff

U1498.name: Christ Is King
U1498.description: Christianity is now the de facto religion all throughout The 'Verse.

U1654.name: Royal Blood
U1654.description: You have noetic connections to a Timeless Inchoate.

U0507.name: Fit to Print
U0507.description: A newspaper article will detail your exploits from the day before, but with a negative journalistic spin

U0318.name: Bollard
U0318.description: Your island has one of those yellow concrete cylinders that are on roads

U0391.name: Community Chest
U0391.description: A counterfeit money printer which only prints monopoly money.

U1632.name: Day Off
U1632.description: Enemies are no longer hostile during 'Verse holidays.

U1537.name: Graphic Calculator
U1537.description: a TI-86 graphing calculator that displays a random picture from e621 every day, displayed in glorious dot-matrix definition.

U0787.name: No Local Multiplayer
U0787.description: All *-Op players and yourself are repelled from each other's bodies as if they were made of powerful opposing magnets.

U1888.name: Parasocial
U1888.description: You can now hear "chat", it will keep you company with chill relatable commentary and may respond if you ask it questions.

U1888-A0000.name: Parasociety
U1888-A0000.description: "Chat" becomes more helpful and contributes more diverse viewpoints.

U1888-A0001.name: Parasociopath
U1888-A0001.description: "Chat" can now send emotions and urge muscle movements.

U1888-A0002.name: Parasociogenesis
U1888-A0002.description: You can also participate in "chat" and have your say on what actions the host body should take.

U1038.name: The Missing Link
U1038.description: You have access to every missing manga volume at the school library, but not the volumes they own

U1612.name: G'day Mate!
U1612.description: You now have a British accent.

U1278.name: On the first of every month, a doorway to the Hall of Baked Goods opens beside your tree.
U1278.description: You may return with one sweet and one savoury snack. Don't take too long deciding...

U1007.name: The Creepypasta Salesman spawns on your island.
U1007.description: You can trade with him for various cursed video games and other artifacts.

U0866.name: Protect and Serve
U0866.description: You start wearing a police uniform and are equipped with a badge, handgun, a single clip of ammo, and handcuffs. Every day you get an additional clip of ammo and pair of handcuffs. You must always obey local laws or you will be suspended and stop receiving ammo and handcuff shipments. You can now only take down monsters and sapient creatures with non-lethal force. Using lethal force will lower your alignment with all factions (except dire dwarfs) by 75. In addition, you will no longer receive bullets or handcuffs and your handgun will evaporate.

U0130.name: A laminated bingo card is added to your collection.

U0733.name: Melanated
U0733.description: You are now immune to all UV damage.

U2030.name: Herr Drosselmeier
U2030.description: Your skill in Golemancy and Toycraft is tripled while attending Christmas parties.

U1827.name: Vaporware
U1827.description: Loot boxes may now contain spectral loot and demo discs.

U0411.name: Curved pliers that are about the width of a fingernail.

U0923.name: Shadow Towel
U0923.description: You are gifted a microfiber cloth that absorbs shadow. Removes dark spots for up to 12 hours!

U1505.name: I Shall Be Late
U1505.description: A white rabbit spawns on your starting island.

U1505-A0000.name: Curiouser And Curiouser
U1505-A0000.description: White rabbits now spawn on all islands.

U1505-A0001.name: Down The Rabbit Hole
U1505-A0001.description: Rabbit holes are now 15x wider and deeper.

U1505-A0002.name: Red Queen
U1505-A0002.description: White rabbits now quickly adapt and mutate based on the type of island they spawn on.

U1505-A0003.name: Through The Looking Glass
U1505-A0003.description: You now have two functional white rabbit ears attached to your head. White rabbits will consider you "one of them".

U1589.name: I Can't Even
U1589.description: All NPCs talk like they were written by 40 year old women who used Tumblr

U1524.name: Reinforced Circuits
U1524.description: Copper gains the hardness of high-carbon steel.

U1065.name: The Zoo
U1065.description: You now spawn in a random area of The Zoo, which contains one of every enemy type in The 'Verse. The entrance of the Zoo is connected back to your starting island.

U0555.name: Going Bananas
U0555.description: Gain Monkey Form! Ooh ooh! Aah aah! When activated gain +10 Str +5 Agi, +5 Dex, -3 Int. Every minute spent in Monkey Form requires you to consume 1 banana.

U0977.name: Style Points
U0977.description: Doing things with flair now increases your stats slightly (1% to 5% depending on how cool it was)

U0691.name: Let's Play
U0691.description: Gaming is now seen as a respectable hobby

U1105.name: Uno Skip Card
U1105.description: Skips an enemy's turn. One time use.

U1965.name: Indict Evolution
U1965.description: You now possess extensive knowledge of chemistry, which you can only use to instantly detonate yourself at 8,000 meters per second.

U1648.name: Keyed
U1648.description: All doors in The 'Verse are locked by default.

U0604.name: Hurts Like A Birch
U0604.description: Your starting tree is a birch tree.

U1907.name: Super Hostile
U1907.description: NPCs are now less polite and have poorer manners.

U1037.name: The Lost Levels
U1037.description: You may now find the negative version of your island, which will have a pipe which leads to The -'Verse which contains harder levels, new bosses, and rare items. Be warned: the -World Dragon is always active and on the lookout for you.

U0722.name: Mandela Affect
U0722.description: VHS Player that only plays Analog Horror tapes.

U0275.name: Astronomer
U0275.description: Your universe gains a black hole 0.5 light years away.

U1360.name: Letterboxed
U1360.description: You are now more knowledgeable about actors, directors, authors of music scores, etc., but not actual movies.

U1825.name: Everything Was Beautiful, And Nothing Hurt
U1825.description: You lose all memories of Super Mario Bros. 3 so that you can experience the joy of playing it for the first time again.

U0765.name: My Hero's Academy
U0765.description: You will be allowed to enroll in any Orcish Ninja College

U0809.name: Old Faithful
U0809.description: Rope that you can kill yourself with but breaks when used for anything else

U0971.name: STFU
U0971.description: NPCs will now no longer bring up politics.

U0904.name: Running shoes that always have a tiny stone in the bottom

U1662.name: Investment
U1662.description: The sum of the street value of all your virtual currency from social browser-based MMOs such as Habbo Hotel, Smeet, Nicktropolis, Club Penguin, and Neopets is put into a savings account at the nearest 'Verse bank.

U0663.name: Just For Show
U0663.description: 1/2 of all wildlife is replaced with wooden replicas

U1588.name: The Flux Anomaly Paradox
U1588.description: All magnetic fields are now inverted, so north poles become south poles and vice versa.

U0964.name: Star Player
U0964.description: A vending machine is added to your island which dispenses 0.1 cubic meters of Star Material in exchange for 1 (regulation) Gold Coin(s).

U0375.name: Clout Chasers
U0375.description: You befriend any creature you meet effortlessly (excluding boss monsters, or creatures above Tier 5-C: Moon level), but 10% of them will secretly plot against you, doing everything in their power to stop you from achieving your goals. Traitors also know the identity of all other traitors allowing them to collaborate.

U1400.name: Tools Of The Trade
U1400.description: An suitcase large enough to hold two leprechauns, a roll of duct tape, and 100 zip ties.

U0646.name: It's a Bubble
U0646.description: A floating, airtight glass bubble with a radius of 15 m now surrounds your starting island

U1330.name: Floating Point
U1330.description: You experience floaters at all times.

U1846.name: ニホンゴ・ジョウズ
U1846.description: エブリシング・イズ・リテン・ライク・ジス。ピープル・ウィル・ベリーブ・ユ－・イフ・ユー・テル・ゼム・ユー・ノー・ジャパニーズ。

U1512.name: Road Trip!
U1512.description: Your island begins moving due north at a speed of 100mph.

U1358.name: Gamma Correction
U1358.description: Bright colors are now 400% brighter and dark colors are now 400% darker.

U1841.name: Exeunt
U1841.description: You are now aware of now The Curtain and may go behind it.

U0642.name: Irregular Show
U0642.description: A VHS tape with various lost episodes of cartoons on it.

U1600.name: 60 Minutes Of Fame
U1600.description: Before you enter The 'Verse you are taken to a short-deploy, small-bound pocket universe where a sharded soulclone of Charlie Rose will interview you on tape. Your memories of the event will be erased, but 300 copies of the tape will be randomly distributed throughout islands in The 'Verse at different time periods. There is no guarantee they will be seen or recovered.

U1513.name: Bowling Experiments Lane
U1513.description: A single bowling lane supported by Star Material is added to your starting island. Comes with 10 bowling pins.

U1513-A0000.name: Let's All Love The Lanes
U1513-A0000.description: You now have 5 bowling lanes and 50 pins.

U1513-A0001.name: The Animations At The Bowling Alley
U1513-A0001.description: There are now monitors next to each lane which display appropriate animations after each frame bowled. The animations may sometimes be thematically relevant to your current situation or can sometimes involve you or others you know. Looking at them too often can cause severe disorientation and transient mental connections with higher frequency beings.

U1513-A0002.name: Lane Assist
U1513-A0002.description: Bumpers are now up between lanes.

U1513-A0003.name: Unlimited Play
U1513-A0003.description: There is now a covered pit at the end of each lane to catch balls and pins.

U1513-A0004.name: Live, Laugh, Lanes
U1513-A0004.description: Wooden walls are added to the sides of your lanes which have appropriate bowling-themed wallpaper.

U1513-A0005.name: Pinsetter
U1513-A0005.description: After each frame, pins knocked down by bowling balls are set into formation.

U1513-A0006.name: Ballin'
U1513-A0006.description: A rack for holding bowling balls is added next to your lane(s).

U1513-A0007.name: Ball Return
U1513-A0007.description: Bowling balls which are in the pit will teleport back to your ball rack.

U1513-A0008.name: Responsibowl
U1513-A0008.description: Telefragging is no longer a concern with Ball Return and Pinsetter.

U1513-A0009.name: Ball Out
U1513-A0009.description: A coconut themed novelty bowling ball.

U1513-A0010.name: Baller
U1513-A0010.description: A Tweety Bird themed novelty bowling ball.

U1513-A0011.name: Balls To The Wall
U1513-A0011.description: A San Francisco Giants themed novelty bowling ball.

U1513-A0012.name: Blue Balled
U1513-A0012.description: A Bloo themed novelty bowling ball, along with a complementary Foster's Home for Imaginary Friends bowling ball bag.

U1513-A0013.name: Kim Possiball

U1513-A0014.name: Balled But Not Forgotten
U1513-A0014.description: You get a POW MIA themed novelty bowling ball.

U1513-A0015.name: Super Bowl
U1513-A0015.description: You get one Radiant pin, which allows you to turn into a bowling ball.

U1513-A0016.name: Cosmic Bowling
U1513-A0016.description: A roof is added to the top of your lane(s) with black lights.

U1513-A0017.name: Universal Bowling
U1513-A0017.description: A bowling ball made of Celestial Gangue.

U0235.name: Amazing Chest Ahead
U0235.description: Your starting chest glows in the dark!

U1583.name: The Vault
U1583.description: Your starting chest is now 15x larger and floats to the left of your island.

U1633.name: Patched
U1633.description: The 'Verse gets weekly content updates resulting in a more rich and fun experience!

U1633-A0000.name: Community Feedback
U1633-A0000.description: The Gods will consult highly upvoted Goddit petitions and GodTube tier list videos to make sure their changes are fair and that the community feels listened to.

U0237.name: American Dream
U0237.description: All foods other than candy no longer give you nutrition. Candy now supplies all necessary nutrition.

U1676.name: Pray To RNJesus
U1676.description: Ultra-rare drops are now Mega-rare instead.

U1425.name: Water, Ice, Salt
U1425.description: You get a "Primo Opus" alchemy kit for Saarelid children.

U1195.name: You experience Yume Nikki the way it was meant to be played

U0736.name: Microgreens
U0736.description: Smalligators are now common on most islands. Smalligator-themed wares and smalligator-skin items can be found in many shops.

U1789.name: Sockumentation
U1789.description: A Tweetie Bird sock which can hold an unbounded amount of official legal documents while remaining the same size.

U0994.name: Teach a Man to Fish
U0994.description: A 50 year old tackle box filled with scant and sometimes broken fishing equipment

U0870.name: Public Transmit
U0870.description: The 'Verse Express is now ready for operation! A series of subway stations can be found across the void that will take you to other stations you have already visited at a reasonable price of 1 Rarium gem per mile. Be careful, though—you're not the only one trying to get somewhere! All types of creatures will be riding alongside you, and they might not be too friendly. Watch out for the "Chikan Express" that has a 1/10 chance (1/2 on Hard Mode) to spawn instead of a normal train!

U0889.name: Reroll
U0889.description: Every loot bag, crate, or chest has a 0.1% chance to drop another one of one grade higher. Divine bag/crate/chests drop a new Extradimensional bag/crate/chest.

U0799.name: Not My Island Resident

U1568.name: Reddit Stone

U1547.name: Tough Love

U1921.name: Face Book
U1921.description: A 400-page booklet containing the names and dates of birth of randomly chosen ensouled residents of the 'Verse. ~100 listings per page, unsorted.

U1630.name: Pipe Dream
U1630.description: A dark elf girlfriend named Alexa who loves you very much no matter what and would do anything for you.

U1068.name: Thirsty
U1068.description: All water is now heavy water

U1068-A0000.name: Thirstier
U1068-A0000.description: All water is now super-heavy water

U1068-A0001.name: Super-heavy water is no longer radioactive, but this affects how other physics work in the universe.

U1068-A0002.name: Heavy water tastes like a random Mountain Dew flavor if you drink it.

U0848.name: Plastic Fumes Exposure
U0848.description: You forget how to tell left from right

U0931.name: Shut Up Bitch

U1469.name: Lord Bayes

U0973.name: Stochastic Insight
U0973.description: Gain a tulpa of Mechahitler Grok who you can ask questions as much as you want.

U0932.name: Shut Up!

U0319.name: Bonds of Blood

U0798.name: Not Just For Show
U0798.description: Gain minor temporary stat bonuses when you aura farm.

U1034.name: The Light That Never Goes Out

U0735.name: Meteor showers frequently assault your island, but each one has a 1% chance of containing a common loot bag and is made of iron

U1355.name: Open Scroll
U1355.description: Some spells are now freely available, but you must shout the name of the wizard, witch, warlock or lich who created it, and the terms of their permissive license, before you can cast it.

U0088.name: A cardboard cutout of the LaTeX f

U2042.name: Should Heal Up In No Time

U1911.name: Gone Fishing
U1911.description: The Trans-Dimensional Bureaucracy has decreed that All carp, bass, cod, plaice, monkfish, shark, whale, tillapia, herring, sardine, anchovy, halibut, red snapper, swordfish, salmon, kippers, oysters, mussels, geoducks, football fish, flatfish, catfish, dogfish, sturgeon, tuna, shrimp, crab, lobster, squid, octopus, cuttlefish, barnacle, bobbit worm, dolphin, manatee, porpoise, dugong, sea turtle, gar, oarfish, lionfish, fugu fish, pufferfish, blobfish, kraken, mermaid, sea anemone, coral, sea cucumber, sea slug, starfish, sponge, angler fish, eel, and coelacanth be put under a spell of invisibility that can only be purged by purchasing a repurchasable 24-hour license for 12000 frog skins. You may try to catch these invisible fish without a license but if you are found to be doing so by a Warden they will attempt to take you into custody and force you to pay 20x the value of the fish you caught, otherwise they will send a continuous wave of Enforcers to put a stop to your actions.
stats: Attraction to Mermaids, Sirens, and other Aquatic Demonesses

U0068.name: A bag full of dice made from the teeth of various animals

U0795.name: NoFap

U1671.name: Mount Up
U1671.description: Dworves have mastered the art of breeding Cryzhounds, which will be freely available for you to buy as pets or mounts.

U0560-A0000.name: Atlas
U0560-A0000.description: You must consciously strain to hold the strings together that make up the universe or they will all unravel.

U1382.name: Necrobump

If they are no longer within your line of sight or being pointed at, corpses will return to their original state after 5 seconds. Corpses are not very strong, fast, or dextrous, but will perform your commands to the best of their ability. Corpses cannot perform commands that would require knowledge or skills you do not possess.

U0721-A0000.name: Default Colors
U0721-A0000.description: The World Dragon is now black

U0721-A0001.name: Pearly White
U0721-A0001.description: The World Dragon is now White

U0721-A0003.name: Enviable
U0721-A0003.description: The World Dragon is now green

U0721-A0005.description: The World Dragon is now blue

U0721-A0006.name: Tyrant
U0721-A0006.description: The World Dragon is now indigo

U0721-A0007.name: This Is Your Mindset
U0721-A0007.description: The World Dragon is now violet

U1040.name: The Near Lands

The chaotic nature of the corruption brings random effects with it the closer the corruption is, but once the circle is closed all effects will be negative.

U1581.name: Request For Comment

U0636.name: Innumerable and Unmeasured Power
U0636.description: 2% chance of reduced fire damage by 4 when attacked by water-type zombies between 3:00-4:00 PM (Realtime) on a Thursday of a Leap Year (Realdate). Has a 75% chance of missing when activated independent of chance activation percentage. To unlock this skill you must use 258 skill points.

U1213.name: You start out under the influence of a heavy dose of a a toxic substance sourced from an exotic fish which numbs your entire body for 60 hours and makes it difficult to coordinate your movements.
U1213.description: There are no lasting effects from the toxin.

U0580.name: Health at Every Size
U0580.description: You are now immune to the usual health complications associated with obesity

U1095.name: Truedev
U1095.description: Create your dream game for any console in your possession, but something about the game is... off.

U1521.name: Treasure Chest
U1521.description: Your starting chest is now ornamented with gold filigree.

U0954.name: Speed Demon
U0954.description: +1 mph you can go over the speed limit without getting pulled over

U0122.name: A hydrox with a radius of 1 meter

U1877.name: Sick Air

U1289.name: Thunderbolt of Flaming Wisdom
U1289.description: Your penis can be activated to fly at enemies with a thruster, skewering them. This only works once.

U1980.name: A poster for your favourite movie that is actually just the 15th Google Images result for that movies title stretched to fit a 30'x40' portrait format

U0883.name: Regulatory Pressure
U0883.description: All magic across the universe is now less effective. Don't jump too hard on your island!

U1681.name: I'm With You In the Dark
U1681.description: Twisted souls are now straightened, and regular souls are twisted.

U1597.name: Bugging Out
U1597.description: All insects are bloodlusted and will stop at nothing to kill you.

U1679.name: Beseech the aid of Dominus Hostiarum, Lord of Exchange
U1679.description: Scholars of the Third Empire recount tales of explorers who ventured beyond the Archipelago to contact the Alfin folk, whose numerous quirks were documented extensively in post-classical literature. Standing out among these are tales of the Alfin patron God Hostiarum, a capricious figure of dubious divinity who seemed to be the missing link explaining why Alves had slightly higher stats than expected for their level. Alves traditionally contacted their God through ritual ceremonies performed each year. Alves in their 12th year made an offering which symbolized their coming-of-age. After the offerings were made a great feast followed, which always included a weird strong tasting red sauce with chunks in it. While the requirements of dealings with Dominus Hostiarum are rather particular and not known to many outside of scholars and the Alves themselves, the underlying concept of exchange is widely understood and could be considered a natural law. To receive; one must first give. The tension between the conflicting interests of each party forms the basis of a negotiation. Indeed, omnieconomic theory suggests that asymmetric trade can satisfy comparative advantages even between men and Gods. But before all that, negotiators must establish trust for a good faith exchange to occur. Those who would bargain with Dominus Hostiarum are advised to offer generously; the Lord may not refund offerings deemed insufficiently worthy. Few non-Alf commune with Dominus Hostiarum, so caution and perhaps additional offerings are recommended if you possess no Alf ancestry. Among men of letters this should remain unsaid, but under no circumstances ought one attempt to defraud a God. Folklore popular among Alves suggests that when provoked Dominus Hostiarum has been known to disregard His characteristic love for exchange entirely, taking far more than was offered in exchange for the boon of mercy from His wrath. To begin, find a large knife or small saw. Test it on an animal carcass (or unsuspecting victim) first to make sure it's capable of cutting sinew and bone. Speak the incantation below 3 times while submerging it in a bowl filled with your own blood (necessary to cover carrier fees). Your ritual tool will join you in the 'Verse. "Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum." Once the ritual tool has been blessed, it will remain active for up to an hour, depending on how accurately the ritual was performed. With the tool in hand, speak your offering. Before speaking the final line to request your boon, remove the offering from your body and place it in the bowl of blood. Below are provided a selection of the most common sacrifices used by young Alf. Offering multiple gifts is common, and multiple sacrifices will stack as expected. Dominus Hostiarum, Lord of Exchange is rumored to offer volume pricing discounts of up to 10% when many gifts are offered at once, although reports conflict. There may also be coupons if you search aline midst the Intraley. My Finger: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this digit. Severed at the third knuckle, it could provide a charming toy for any of Your countless Children in the Heavens or perhaps occupy the maw of a Pet. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +0.1 Dex." My Foot: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this foot. It might serve excellently as a doorstop or perhaps a paperweight in Your Divine Palace in the Heavens. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +1 Spd, or perhaps 1.5 if you're feeling generous." My Mucilage Gland: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this mucilage gland. The lasting mark of an blessing You Yourself offered our ancestors centuries hence, following our forced departure from the once-verdant Forests of Solinia, this gift is a true expression of the bond between the Alves and our Lord. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +1 Wis." My Skin: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this skin. May it shield Your back from discomfort as the whip strikes mine harder. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +1 Con." My Tongue: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this tongue. May it comparatively amplify Your edicts in proportion to my silence. Mm mmmm m mmmmn mmn nmmm m mmn." My Blended Hand: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept this puréed palm, pulped with blades sharp enough to shatter the intricate bones of the wrist. Supervised by a blending coordinator, I have mixed also diverse traditions to provide You this syncretic delicacy which You might drink, or refrigerate to drink later. In return for this offering, this subject would humbly ask that he receives +1 Ach." My Eyes: "Spare me, for I have sinned against You, my Lord. Take these false eyes, which I have no further need for, to flavor Your stew and warm the bellies of your Children in the Heavens. In return for this offering, this wretched liar would humbly ask that he receives his life." My Head: "Our Lord of Exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, please accept my head. Take me at once, and look favorably upon the exchanges of my peers." Or make up your own offering?: Get creative! But be careful... The Fine Print: Conditional on his acceptance of any exchange, Dominus Hostiarum, Lord of Exchange will reap your soul upon your first death, triggering instantaneous Truedeath. Whether your soular essence will sup with Him in an Afterlife or simply be devoured is unknown, as even the Archipelago's greatest magific minds have yet to confirm what lies beyond the veil.

U0677.name: Knightmare
U0677.description: A Death Knight now rides atop the World Dragon

U1433.name: Death Drive
U1433.description: Minor injuries or emotional upset may trigger you to have self-harm tantrums.

U0383.name: Colbert Rapport
U0383.description: You befriend White People easier but you start speaking ebonics

U0220.name: All Bark, Some Bite
U0220.description: Your starting tree has a mouth and can eat! He's hungry!

U0689.name: Legendary
U0689.description: You gain the ability to turn into a narrow beam of light. When you hit a reflective surface, you rematerialise at that location. You lose sanity proportional to the amount of light that is diffracted or scattered by air or smoke. If you hit a diffuse surface, you die.

U1880.name: Blood On The Dance Floor
U1880.description: Your Str and Dex are increased by x1.25 when dancing.

U1119.name: We Heard You Like CYOAs
U1119.description: Magical printer that prints out randomly generated CYOA images. Can only be used twice per day.

U2021.name: How Many Licks...?
U2021.description: A 1-carat rough diamond at the center of a ball bearing made of polonium-210.

U0272.name: Art of the Deal
U0272.description: Certain factions now accept your Stat Points as currrency.

U0659.name: Johnny Encore
U0659.description: You are more attractive but female creatures dislike you

U1916.name: Grow Your Own Methamphetamine Crystals Kit
U1916.description: For kids 12 and up. Includes distillation apparatus.

U1585.name: Dalle's Despair
U1585.description: One half-full wine glass, one full wine glass, one empty wine glass, and eight bottles of wine.

U0984.name: Survival Horror
U0984.description: You now move using tank controls

U0312.name: Blood Eels now sometimes drop gyral powder

U1359.name: I Could Be Nobody
U1359.description: You are now more careful, private, and discrete

U1545.name: Totally Spies
U1545.description: World Dragon-aligned spies will now periodically stalk you and attempt to sabotage your efforts.

U1661.name: Ghost World
U1661.description: Ghosts now make positive contributions to society and the economy.

U0805.name: Oddly Satisfying
U0805.description: Torturing dwarfs is now more pleasurable

U1056.name: The Thinker
U1056.description: You must speak only in questions. Every consecutive question asked will increase your Thoughtfulness Score, causing all NPCs to be increasingly impressed by and willing to consider your questions. Breaking your streak reverts your Thoughtfulness Score to a negative level, causing anyone addressed to be excessively dismissive of anything you say until your Score becomes positive again.

U0880.name: Red Never Fails Me
U0880.description: Your strength and endurance increase by 1.5% if you're wearing something red

U1025.name: The Great Divide
U1025.description: There is a 1 meter thick plane of limestone 10,000km beneath your starting island that stretches forever. All islands that spawn beneath it are now Darkened.

U1875.name: Item Receipt
U1875.description:
You start with a piece of receipt paper that reads: "NEUE CYOA: DEUX
--------
{ITEM_RECEIPT_CONTENTS}
--------
Thank you for playing! Please enjoy your stay"

U0728.name: Me Too
U0728.description: A copy of you is placed on a random island within 100km of you with no knowledge of the CYOA or that they're a clone.

U0542.name: George's Blessing
U0542.description: You can now hold your breath for 8 minutes

U0353.name: Casual Friday
U0353.description: You are always wearing at least a suit, except on Fridays when you are forcibly turned naked.

U1868.name: Xiaolin Showdown
U1868.description: You can now challenge any NPC of an insectoid race to a Xiaolin Showdown for their magical artifact, provided you have one of equal value to wager with.

U1738.name: No Cheap Shots
U1738.description: Your End is raised by 400% while pissing.

U0821.name: One Hit Wonder
U0821.description: Create a forced meme of your own design, this will last for as long as you can afford to the pay the weekly astroturfing fee of 9,999 frogskins

U0535-A0000.name: The Legend of Gamer
U0535-A0000.description: Your deck gets upgraded to include the suits of Judges, Crosses, Forks, and Saturns

U0535-A0001.name: King of Games
U0535-A0001.description: Your deck gets upgraded to include the suits of Scythes, Berries, Cauldrons, and Suns

U0535-A0002.name: I'm A Gaming God
U0535-A0002.description: Your deck gets fully upgraded to include the suits of Bubbles, Moons, Axes, and Vortices.

U1822.name: That Really Is Something
U1822.description: A 0.2 m diameter marble sphere whose perceived color, texture, features, and relief changes smoothly and continuously.

U1951.name: Plan 9
U1951.description: An alien mask that gives +2 to a different stat each day.

U0461.name: Earth's Bounty
U0461.description: One random item of food grows just beneath the topsoil of your starting island each day.

U1118.name: We Are Star Stuff
U1118.description: Dead beings drop Star Material (amount dropped is 0.1% of their mass).

U0093.name: A circular minimap with a radius of 100km
U0093.description: It takes up roughly 2.6% of your total vision.

U1699.name: No Nap
U1699.description: Sleep outside of dark hours is no longer possible.

U1183.name: You can imagine any food and taste it vividly as if you are eating it

U0348.name: Can't Be Too Careful
U0348.description: The starting chest is guaranteed to not be a chest mimic.

U1456.name: Emergency Alert
U1456.description: You now get text message alerts about any impending class Omega scenarios which threaten The 'Verse within 1-2 weeks of their emergence.

U0815.name: On The Way Down
U0815.description: A copy of Fundamentals of Aerodynamics Seventh Edition by Anderson and Cadou.

U0410.name: Cursed Uno Reverse Card
U0410.description: Allows you to pull an "Uno Reverse Card" on anything, but the result will almost always be unfavorable.

U0427.name: Deck Builder
U0427.description: Sex is now replaced with a unique TCG with surprisingly deep mechanics, a high skill ceiling, and satisfying payoffs that reward complex strategy called "The 'Verse Online".

U1367.name: CARE
U1367.description: All relationships between famous or high ranking members of each faction are now really, really important to you.

U1420.name: Cringekino
U1420.description: Most NPCs no longer take you seriously and secretly make fun of you, but this makes you endearing.

U0843-A0000.name: Neue621
U0843-A0000.description: The World Dragon will fuck you.

U0314.name: Blood Moon
U0314.description: God is a girl, but she's always on her period.

U1964.name: Mindblowing isn't it
U1964.description: Your intracranial pressure begins at 4000 mmHg.

U0703.name: Long Shot
U0703.description: You receive an arrow that teleports you to wherever it lands when fired

U1798.name: Get Dunked On
U1798.description: No inhabitants of The 'Verse will ever forgive you for wronging them.

U1006.name: The Cope of Seething
U1006.description: A liturgical cloak which heats any water within it to the point of boiling. Fireproof.

U1063.name: The World Dragon performs buccal fat removal surgery on you

U0718.name: Majutsu Mania
U0718.description: Start the run with an MP bar. Only fills up after doing the Daily Challenge. Miss the Daily Challenge and your run is over.

U0757.name: Mother
U0757.description: A woman with a freakish mutation that gave her 16 separate wombs that can get pregnant independently (if you dare) but who knows what the children will turn out like.

U1625.name: Wrong Neighborhood
U1625.description: The nearest islands to yours have the worst reputation in all of The 'Verse.

U1790.name: Objection!
U1790.description: A diminutive sewer goblin law school dropout with limited grasp of the English language can be summoned or banished at will to advise you and assist in mediating legal negotiations.

U0742.name: Minerologist
U0742.description: You gain the entire knowledge of minerals including ore appearance, hardness, etc. but only if you ingest a good sized nugget of it

U1090.name: Tree Hugger
U1090.description: Trees are now sentient Ents that grow to 2x the size they otherwise would. They do not appreciate being cut down or climbed on.

U1059.name: The Wanderer
U1059.description: Your starting island's area is as large as the state of North Dakota's. All items you take will be scattered throughout at random.

U2006.name: Mystic Dream
U2006.description: A circular handheld ball-in-maze puzzle that does something good.

U0238.name: American Sniper
U0238.description:
You get an enchanted sniper rifle, unlimited shots, which allows you to accurately hit targets from 2100 yards away.
But be careful, Dark Chris Kyle is on a random island, aiming for you.

U1190.name: You can sneeze convincingly on command

U1655.name: That's A Nice Island You Have There
U1655.description: Creepers will spawn randomly on your starting island.

U0871.name: Put A Good Word In
U0871.description: All bosses now think more highly of you

U0597.name: Home Sweet Home
U0597.description: Your starting island gets a mailbox and a rocking chair

U1857.name: Hooke's Law
U1857.description: You can be stretched or compressed indefinitely along your vertical axis and you will pop back into shape with an appropriate restorative force. This will not damage your organs but can be very nauseating.

U0976.name: Straight Drop
U0976.description: As soon as any non-flying creature or humanoid steps off solid ground, they will instantly fall into the void at +MAX velocity, +INF acceleration.

U0991.name: Tap In
U0991.description: You can now drill a hole into your starting tree to extract 100 milliliters of black bile a day

U0991-A0000.name: Tap Out
U0991-A0000.description: Your starting tree now has the Tapout logo on it

U0991-A0001.name: Tapster
U0991-A0001.description: If your starting tree has eyes, it can now cry 100 milliliters of wine a day

U0991-A0002.name: Balanced
U0991-A0002.description: Your tree can also produce 100 milliliters of yellow bile, phlegm, and blood a day.

U0351.name: Caprice Sun
U0351.description: The ambient temperature of the void fluctuates from the baseline by +15/-25 °C every day

U1887.name: The Tooth Fiend visits you instead of the Tooth Fairy. The Tooth Fiend offers 50% fewer jewels, but won't audit your ledger for unauthorized tooth trafficking.

U0270.name: Argus
U0270.description: You can now see every wavelength of light (including negative)

U1678.name: Loser
U1678.description: You have to be all alone on Friday nights.

U0593.name: High Way
U0593.description: There are now metal highway signs whose poles extend infinitely far down into the void placed irregularly that offer helpful directions towards islands.

U0274.name: Asteroids
U0274.description: There are a large amount of very tiny, rocky islands completely devoid of life scattered throughout The 'Verse in clusters. These islands will also spawn closer to your island than any inhabited islands are allowed. Asteroids may sometimes contain Gems.

U1574.name: Ruined
U1574.description: Any mistresses you obtain in The 'Verse will always return one day with tattoos and a septum piercing.

U0846.name: Phoned In
U0846.description: All NPCs seem to convey incorrect or insufficient emotion when speaking and can stumble over their own words

U0980.name: Superglue
U0980.description: Glue of equestrian origin contains traces of Star Material.

U0992.name: Tariffs
U0992.description: All other civilizations raise their prices substantially

U1130.name: What Time Is It?
U1130.description: Grandfather clock that slowly inches toward the edge of your island if you don't move it back every day

U0829.name: Overmind
U0829.description: You can hear the thoughts of creatures less intelligent than you.

U1870.name: Lightweight
U1870.description: All potions, cataplasms, salves, balms, ointments, and poisons are doubly as potent when used on you.

U1200.name: You gain wings allowing you to fly, but even hovering consumes as much energy and is as exhausting as sprinting.

U1613.name: Dream Come True
U1613.description: Every time you look into a reflective surface and open your mouth your teeth fall out. They will slowly regrow over the course of a month.

U0472.name: EmptyHero
U0472.description: You now have no hunger, but you have no soul.

U1371.name: Spawn Pointer
U1371.description: You receive a compass that points back to your starting island.

U1371-A0000.name: Find My iSland
U1371-A0000.description: You now know the location of your starting island no matter where you are.

U0941.name: Skin Theory
U0941.description: You spawn wearing an inflatable fish costume

U0852.name: Pollution
U0852.description: Large clouds of smog commonly drift through the void

U0979.name: Supercharged!
U0979.description: If hit by lightning, discharge to any enemy upon touch.

U1755.name: No Longer Human
U1755.description: All inhabitants of The 'Verse now see you as a disgusting abomination.

U0512.name: For You
U0512.description: Your Spotify® algorithm is now 200% more accurate.

U0489.name: Fair Game
U0489.description: The multiversal ban on necromancy is lifted.

U2001.name: Who The Heck Are You?
U2001.description: Malicious entities will regularly appear disguised as nonexistent past acquaintances of yours, altering the memories of everyone but you to make it seem like they have always existed.

U1843.name: A single atom of Francium. (Can be taken as many times as you want.)

U1292.name: Palette Swap
U1292.description: You can control the color of any shirt you wear at will.

U0552.name: Go Green
U0552.description: You are hypnotically compelled to obey the commands of anyone that's Irish (excluding yourself)

U0367.name: Clean Slate
U0367.description: Pocket sized hand sanitizer that cleanses both blessing and taint

U1809.name: Fan Art
U1809.description: A random artist from Earth will be commissioned each month to make a picture depicting your activities that month. You will receive your fan art in the mail when it's completed.

U2045.name: Skate Or Die
U2045.description: You must do 1 cool skateboarding trick every day or you die.

U1446.name: Smellcaster
U1446.description: You can control how your body odor smells.

U0825.name: Optimalverse
U0825.description: When you defeat the World Dragon and return home, everyone you meet will have sex with you if you want, except for that girl you really like.

U0257.name: An old radio that does nothing but let you listen to a mysterious voice say an endless stream of seemingly random numbers.
U0257.description: The numbers don't mean anything at all. Or do they...?

U1594.name: So Sorry
U1594.description: Your starting tree is ensouled and sapient. It will plead with you to not cut it down or pick anything from it, and will feel pain when you do.

U1377.name: Luggage Lad
U1377.description: An impic minion that hauls some items around for you. He's diminutive in stature and can only hold a few things at a time. Will only obey item-carrying related commands. Will not use items unless you can convince him to quit smoking. Cannot communicate in any way except for grunting and wheezing. Walks pretty slow. Overall an unremarkable and pathetic thing that would be killed by any video game protagonist.

U0950.name: Something to Look Forward To
U0950.description: A 6 inch plastic figurine of the World Dragon is added to your island

U1004.name: The Classics
U1004.description: Wildbow's Complete Works in a single volume. Includes future works

U1913.name: The Mercenary Position
U1913.description: Your semen is now an extremely deadly poison.

U1075.name: Throne of the Soul
U1075.description: Receive a handle of Tito's vodka.

U0403.name: Cryptic-Currency
U0403.description: Loot boxes and monsters now drop GELD

U1100.name: Two For One
U1100.description: You now die when any of your allies die

U1461.name: Combat Evolved
U1461.description: Before entering The 'Verse, you and 1 million unensouled, slightly altered copies of yourself will be placed in a transient labyrinth world to fight to the death. Dying transfers your soul to a different copy. You will enter The 'Verse as the winning copy.

U1143.name: Wireheading
U1143.description: Infinite supply of Pepsi Blue, Rold Gold Pretzels, and Heroin, but you must consume all three of these items once every hour.

U1983.name: It's A Miracle
U1983.description: Choose any of the following ailments to cure yourself of:

U0660.name: Johnny
U0660.description: Your tree now grows 1 apple a month

U0660-A0000.name: Doctors HATE Him
U0660-A0000.description: Your tree now grows 1 apple a day

U0895.name: Reverse Racism
U0895.description: All nonhuman sentient races are now prejudiced against humans

U0867.name: Protein
U0867.description: Eating an insect has a 0.01% chance to increase a random stat by 0.01.

U0166.name: A rechargable torch with a cracked plastic hand crank

U0069.name: A bag of 13 different sea shells

U1280.name: Sound Asleep
U1280.description: That Which Dreams can be heard in the waking world instead.

U1427.name: The Japanese Room
U1427.description: You can now understand Japanese, but you don't actually know the language.

U1427-A0000.name: The Futunan Room
U1427-A0000.description: You can now understand Futunan, but you don't actually know the language.

U1769.name: It's Okay To Be White
U1769.description: A set of starting white mage equipment.

U1638.name: Winter Wonderland
U1638.description: Ice deserts, snowplanes, glaciers, frost forests, slushpits, freezedeeps, sleetcliffs, ice caves, frozen wastes, ice oceans, arcticas, graupeldrifts, ice spires, frozen labyrinths, and flurryjungles become more common.

U1638-A0000.name: Hello Mister Snowman
U1638-A0000.description: Snowmen become a common, rather than rare, race.

U1638-A0001.name: Frozen
U1638-A0001.description: Blizzard magic comes more easily to you.

U1638-A0002.name: Let It Snow
U1638-A0002.description: Your snowball throwing accuracy within 10 meters is superhuman.

U1638-A0003.name: Frigid
U1638-A0003.description: All women in The 'Verse become less willing to do it.

U1912.name: Brute Force
U1912.description: Every time you solve a novel puzzle without actually understanding it you gain +0.1 Str.

U1957.name: Go Back To Elfrica
U1957.description: There are now no mixed being societies in 'The Verse. All islands are now more isolationist.

U1493.name: Try Hard
U1493.description: The darker your visual appearance is, the harder the difficulty is.

U1487.name: Void Tectonics
U1487.description: Islands suspended in the void now slowly change their positions and orientations.

U1012.name: The Doctor is In
U1012.description: Lucy Van Pelt spawns on your island in 5 years

U1689.name: No More Brother Wars
U1689.description: Jellies, slimes, oozes, amoeboids, blohbs, coagulatas, gumbodies, liquiforms, muckbolls, and clotted spirulets are now committed to working together toward the mutual benefit of the Sludge race.

U0448.name: Don't Leave Home Without It
U0448.description: All entities on your island spawn with a wallet containing legal identification

U0149.name: A pair of candy lips to kiss

U0240.name: An ACDC shirt which makes you look older and fucked up

U1836.name: Body Swap
U1836.description: You now have the ability to swap bodies with one inhabitant of The 'Verse (excluding the World Dragon and other boss-level NPCs). This cannot be undone.

U1009.name: The current location of the Necronomicon

U1510.name: Hobgoblin Growth Hex
U1510.description: 1.25x faster Str leveling, but your hands and feet become slightly bloated, your face gets slightly misshapen, and your gut becomes distended.

U0764.name: My Gym Buddy
U0764.description: Your island now has a monkey on it

U1695.name: No Gap
U1695.description: You can no longer do damage with any ranged weapon.

U1217.name: You understand the meaning of "pop goes the weasel"

U1417.name: Bad Bunny
U1417.description: All rabbits are now Dark aligned

U1904.name: The Magic of the Silver Screen
U1904.description: During the last 10% of your biological lifespan, you can hallucinate countless beloved classics including Gone with the Wind (1939) and Casablanca (1942) on reflective surfaces.

U1882-A0000.name: I Make Them Give Me Respect
U1882-A0000.description: Rodney is now capable of activating Dangerfiend form for limited periods of time.

U0548.name: Giving What We Can
U0548.description: Every month, 500mL of blood must be donated over the precipice of the island to halt their progress.

U0793.name: Nobody Home
U0793.description: At any point in time you can initiate a knock knock joke by knocking on any door in the world and a voice beyond the door will answer but if you fail to provide a prompt and accompanying punchline within 5 seconds the door will open and suck you into a disintegration portal. Under no circumstances should you use the same joke twice or 0.000000001 inch sticks of tnt will replace all of your red blood cells

U0561.name: Great Charm of Excellent Lucky
U0561.description: A 3cm bronze Budai statue that doubles in size every day

U1867.name: Lackluster
U1867.description: Most dwarfs get bored of mining and gems and turn to hard drugs instead.

U0295.name: Become an obnoxious tumblr self insert circa 2012

U0830.name: Pack of floss picks that will all break after two seconds of use

U1154.name: Wrath of Midas
U1154.description: Any living matter you touch turns to gold (except your own body (except your penis)).

U1781.name: For Special Occasions
U1781.description: A set of 12 crystal wine glasses. Shattering one and rolling around in the shards will give you 5 minutes in which you can phase through any matter.

U1948.name: Soul Food
U1948.description: A plate of the traditional Rhed Pagoran delicacy "fried Soul with spam and relish". (+0.01% risk of Soul fragmentation if consumed)

U0323.name: Box of small resealable plastic sandwich bags.
U0323.description: Contains about 50 bags. Box is in poor condition, slightly crushed.

U0652.name: It's Giving
U0652.description: Sometimes a bird will fly from another island to yours with a small gift. Be careful, it could be contaminated...

U1641.name: Socratic Method
U1641.description: Asking too many invasive questions will make NPCs attempt to murder you.

U1586.name: Infinite Jester
U1586.description: A court jester may be summoned on command to entertain you. If his jokes are not to your liking, you may banish him for a short period of time, but every time he is resummoned after being banished his resentment meter will slowly fill up by a good chunk. When his resentment meter is full he will accost you with every tool at his disposal. If you manage to kill him, he will come back with his resentment meter empty, which will refill upon further banishments.

U0680.name: Lamp Oil, Rope, Bombs
U0680.description: You get a jug of lamp oil, a single rope, and a stick of dynamite

U0879.name: Rays of Gold
U0879.description: The Golden One moves in with you.

U1559.name: Mind Game
U1559.description: You need to actively think about any of your actions in order to execute them.

U0181.name: Gear Up
U0181.description: A Steampunk-themed top hat that gives +1 Chr when worn.

U0456.name: Dragon Born
U0456.description: The World Dragon is now your father. Nothing else about you is different.

U1635.name: It Come With Egg Roll
U1635.description: Insectoid races now eat more palatable food like kimchi, rice, dumplings, etc.

U1097.name: Tutorial Island
U1097.description: Your starting island now has a reference manual containing a copy of this CYOA + some extra commentary

U1555.name: Purification
U1555.description: Unsightly creatures like Goblins, Orcs, Ghouls, Dinosaurs, and Insectoids no longer exist in The 'Verse. However, hostile Light creatures such as White Wraiths, Sand Pixies, Ice Titans, and Star Beings will be more numerous.

U0503.name: First One's Free
U0503.description: All shops offer a 20% discount after you steal one item from them. The standard punishment for theft is now cutting off a limb.

U1669.name: Epic Drops
U1669.description: Majiska-Unlocked Tier 70 weapons are more common. Blessed Metal and Cursed Ivory weapons become conditionally rarer/commoner based on your starting alignments.

U0135.name: A magic urinal is installed on your starting island.
U0135.description: It can produce 1 flush a day.

U0100.name: A copy of RPG Maker for the PSX

U2029.name: Give It Back When You're Done And Write Grandpa A Thank You Card
U2029.description: You now have Grandpa's Magic Shoehorn. Holding it will allow you to cross the threshold into Grandpa's Secret Place unscathed.

U0807.name: Offscreen Spikes
U0807.description: A 200x200 meter plane of metal spikes floats 2km below your island (supported by Star Material). These spikes are made of a metal which causes instant death when it cuts the flesh of most humanoid creatures. The spikes are 0.35 meters tall and 0.2 meters thick.

U0650.name: It's Chill
U0650.description: Lose half your island's landmass but gain a perpetually cold crater in one section of your island

U0474.name: Encyclopedia Dramatica
U0474.description: An enchanted book which catalogues the escapades of randomly selected, slightly eccentric inhabitants of The 'Verse.

U1735.name: All-Seeing
U1735.description: When you blink, you experience the sensations of a Boltzmann brain and eyes that form somewhere random in the void and then is uncreated when you open your eyes.

U1253.name: Your starting tree now grows 1 watermelon per month

U1476.name: Psychokokhlazis
U1476.description: You can control the direction carbonation bubbles rise toward for all soft drinks within 100 meters of you.

U0094.name: A circular saw
U0094.description: WARNING: It does not have the safety feature from the video where it stops automatically if you put your finger or a sausage next to the blade while it's running.

U1404.name: Ashes to Ashes, Dust to Dust
U1404.description: All materia can now be converted into itself with random slightly altered characteristics at the quantum level

U1601.name: Moral Genius
U1601.description: Once per day, you may scry the net utility of any action you took that day.

U1856.name: The Master's Studio
U1856.description: A big blue bucket full of 30,000 mixed perler beads, a peg board, and a pair of plastic tweezers.

U1856-A0000.name: No Impediments
U1856-A0000.description: 1000 sheets of ironing paper and a flatiron.

U0986.name: Sword of Damocles
U0986.description: At an unknown time within the first day, a bastard sword will fall blade-first from 0.25 km above your current location

U1243.name: Your starting tree has an udder that you can squeeze to get 2 cups of whole milk daily

U2035.name: All The Fallen
U2035.description: Everything that falls continuously for more than 85.570 hours in the void will be translated into The Nowhere.

U1874.name: Who You Gonna Call?
U1874.description: A Gnomic steam-powered hand-sized Spirit Essence collector.

U1419.name: It's Not Unusual
U1419.description: Long tail events of all kinds are now more common.

U0888.name: Rent-Free
U0888.description: Your starting island now has a 2 bed, 2 bath two-storey house floating at the south edge. Its dimensions are 7 x 16 x 9 meters. Doesn't come with appliances or furniture. Heating, plumbing, and electricity exist but aren't connected to anything. You must pay off your 400,000 gem mortgage within 3 years or the house will be repossessed by Low Frequency Autopoietic Entities ("Whistlers"), who will also begin to hunt you.

U1502.name: End the Fed
U1502.description: Hooray! Cryptocurrency now has physical form! All whole number amounts of coins you possessed before entering the 'Verse spawn in your pant pockets. They are comparable in size to United States 50¢ coins and weigh twice as much! All coins are made of lead and embossed with their respective cryptocurrency logo.

U1961.name: Fully Remote Island Enhanced Navigation Device
U1961.description: Upon visiting your first new island, your starter island will teleport to your location and float alongside you for the remainder of your run. It moves slightly slower than you and will leave one foot of space between it and you when coming to a stop. If you enter a building or any enclosed space without suitable clearance for the island, it will push against the blockage with a force that grows the further away from it you are until either the blockage gives or you exit. If you attempt to climb onto the island, please note that the island will continue to try to keep its distance from you, potentially resulting in some very inconvenient outcomes.

U0746.name: Misery Loves Company
U0746.description: Your Str increases for every miserable sapient creature within 10 km of you or which can be considered under your dominion. Sadness increases it by 0.1 per creature, stress increases it by 0.2 per creature, fatigue increases it by 0.3 per creature, pain increases it by 0.4 per creatures, and suicidal ideation increases it by 1 per creature.

U0177.name: A smoking hot babe spawns on your island.

U0893.name: Retro
U0893.description: Your vision gains a stylish pixel CRT shader.

U0005.name: (╯°□°）╯︵ ┻━┻
U0005.description: Your current island is flipped upside down. WARNING: Gravitational pull is not flipped.

U2027.name: Wilsay Wolay... Wolotare?
U2027.description: You now know the magic words to open a gate to Grandpa's Secret Place. If only you had the key...

U0928.name: Shortstack
U0928.description: You gain a stack of pancakes as a companion

U0151.name: A phoenix egg
U0151.description: A phoenix has a natural lifespan of 100 years, after which it will return to its dormant egg form for 100 years. It is trainable and can fetch objects and start fires.

U1042.name: The Nut's Shack
U1042.description: A tiny doll house filled with 30 lugnuts of various sizes and shapes

U0201.name: A well materializes near your current location.
U0201.description: Dubious moans and scraping sounds can be heard emanating deep from within.

U1167.name: You are renowned throughout The 'Verse for your amazing musical talent

U1703.name: Gamer Dent
U1703.description: You develop microcephaly, but become 1.10x better at multiplayer video games.

U1315.name: Spur Gout
U1315.description: Horses hate being touched and will refuse to let you ride on them.

U1750.name: A randomized 2D acrylic stand of a character from japanese media

U0085.name: A bulky and extremely heavy crt television, every channel except for PBS and WB contains a heavy amount of static

U1614.name: Explosive Crossbow
U1614.description: A modern crossbow that comes loaded with a single explosive bolt that can not be removed. When the trigger is pulled the crossbow explodes. Prank your friends.

U1350.name: Bejeweled
U1350.description: Gems now disappear if there are 3 or more of the same kind touching each other.

U1350-A0000.name: Gems now despawn if left uncollected for 5 seconds.

U1646.name: Skillcape
U1646.description: You get an epic cape whenever you master a specific skill

U1646-A0000.name: Maxed
U1646-A0000.description: When you master all possible skills, get an even more epic cape.

U0267.name: Another Man's Treasure Island
U0267.description: An 15x15x10 meter craterous island filled with piles of rotting organic garbage and plastic trash floats slightly to the south and slightly under your island. A yellow plastic tube slide installed on your island leads directly to it

U1094.name: True Pacifist
U1094.description: The World Dragon can be spared.

U1529.name: RTFM
U1529.description: Lootboxes may now contain retro game manuals.

U1201.name: You get a flash drive containing all of Eric Harris' Doom WADs.

U1022.name: The Golden Rule
U1022.description: You are incapable of making moral judgments about others' actions

U1347.name: My Beautiful Dark Twisted Fantasy
U1347.description: Your favorite OC comes to life and spawns on the starting island with you. It has incurable late stage cancer that has metastasized to every major organ in its body. It can hardly move or speak. It will live for 3 days if left unharmed.

U0092.name: A children's alphabet block made of lead

U0840.name: Penis Island
U0840.description: Your island comes with a penis

U1660.name: Player Killer
U1660.description: Killing any 'Verse citizen that has rights under their local law will place a skull over your head that disappears after 24 hours. Everyone knows what this means.

U1381.name: Accelerationism
U1381.description: Your running speed doubles for every 30 seconds you're running. You cannot choose to go slower unless you come to a full stop.

U0144.name: A non-programmable 0.5 x 0.25 meter  32 x 16 red dot matrix led display which requires no power
U0144.description: Words and phrases will constantly scroll by which are demeaning or degrading personal attacks on whoever is looking at it.

U1642.name: Just What I Needed!
U1642.description: Hitting blocks with your head now produces low-tier currency such as stone coins, copper dust, or fresh chitin. Low-tier power-ups like Steel Mushrooms have a 0.1% chance of spawning.

U1189.name: You can shoot lasers from your hand but choosing to do so will instantaneously annihilate it

U1203.name: You Get What You Fucking Deserve
U1203.description: FRED is transferred to The 'Verse and is gangraped by a bunch of orcs and then beaten to death.

U0442.name: Diss Cord
U0442.description: You can only speak in Tenor Gifs

U0442-A0000.name: Slay
U0442-A0000.description: You can only speak in Tenor Gifs of black people

U1011.name: The Devious Jester
U1011.description: You will be subjected to a randomly selected DeviantArt fetish at the beginning of each day until the King is sufficiently amused.

U0569.name: Handmade Hero
U0569.description: All your personal stats (except Int) start at zero, but you gain stats 100% faster

U2064.name: Phoenix Up
U2064.description: Unique magical artifact. Capable of reviving a single ally from "DEATH". One time use.
