U1657.name: Social Distancing
U1657.description: An outbreak occurs resulting in a deadly virus infecting all creatures throughout The 'Verse. Don't get within 6 feet of anyone or you'll get infected as well!

U1657-A0000.name: Cured
U1657-A0000.description: A vaccine with no side effects at all comes out that you take ensuring you will never ever be infected with the virus

U1782.name: Backstabber
U1782.description: Do 2x damage to any creature whose Friendship score is above 65.

U1248.name: Your starting tree now grows 1 infant rhesus monkey per month

U0025.name: 2000s Nostalgia
U0025.description: You look like Homestar Runner now.

U1967.name: For A Good Cause
U1967.description: -80 points, but they go to someone who really needs them.

U1967-A0000.name: Get A Job, Nigger
U1967-A0000.description: Fuck those freeloaders. Take your points back and then some.

U0176-A0000.name: You may choose any little hat you would like for your cactus.

U0726.name: Master the art of breathing through your mouth

U0935.name: Sicko
U0935.description: Quadrupedal creatures are now more attractive

U0095.name: A clear plastic bag full of 40 shark teeth

U0096.name: A soccer ball that can double as an exit bag

U1320.name: MICKED
U1320.description: You are branded with a Queen of Shamrocks tattoo

U0758.name: Move Along
U0758.description: On one island, The All-American Rejects will be performing a concert.

U1819.name: Steelman
U1819.description: You can now summon a hostile copy of a nearby monster that is 100x more powerful but drops 10x better loot.

U1731.name: Do It for the Vine
U1731.description: A small vine plant begins to grow on your island. You feel strongly compelled to help it grow as tall as possible, even at the expense of your other goals. Who knows, maybe one day you'll be able to climb it to somewhere...

U1254.name: Your starting tree now grows 300 random flavor jellybeans per month

U0682.name: Last Shade
U0682.description: Before fighting the World Dragon, you will see your starting tree for the last time, alive again and fully replenished.

U0483.name: Every week, summon a cool friend from high school to hang out with and share memes.

U1772.name: Trimmed Armor
U1772.description: The better an item's stats are, the cooler it looks.

U0143.name: A nightcore remix of Things That Rhyme With Orange by I Set My Friends On Fire on vinyl
stats: Lck, but only once the nightcore remix of Things That Rhyme With Orange has been played

U0705.name: Longcat is Long
U0705.description: You can become longcat at will

U1226.name: Your highschool shop teacher joins you for the second year of the challenge

U0259.name: An undeveloped polaroid picture.
U0259.description: When shaken, an image of a man holding a revolver right at the camera appears. If left to fully develop, a bullet with the same force as one being shot from a Colt Single Action Army materializes and rips through anything in its path.

U0276.name: At The Speed of Light
U0276.description: The starting tree grows fruit 1% faster

U1301.name: Fairy Tail
U1301.description: Certain smaller races get a lot stretchier...

U0957.name: Splash And Tear
U0957.description: Simple Water Gun pistol. Upgrades into a machine water gun if heavy water is used. Super-heavy water upgrades it into a BFWG.

U0655.name: Jar of 20 King Cobras in Guangdong Formaldehyde

U1946.name: Melty Bag
U1946.description: A brown paper bag that absorbs sound.

U1730.name: Etched Into the Annals of History
U1730.description: After defeating the World Dragon, youtuber "evenewon2007" will upload a video essay documenting your exploits, amassing a total of 7,644 views and 86 likes before the eventual heat death of the universe.

U2019.name: 500 milliliters of charcoal lighter fluid in a Ziploc® sandwich-sized plastic bag.

U0115.name: A gaming PC that doesn't POST and I think someone took all the RAM out of it except one stick

U1096.name: Truth or Consequences
U1096.description: Everyone else can intuitively tell when you lie. Lying repeatedly permanently decreases your luck.

U1125.name: Well That Happened
U1125.description: You start with a magical well on your island that shows you random snippets of any of your escapades since arriving on the island when you toss in any amount of any currency (only works once a day)

U1723.name: Capman
U1723.description: A large glove you can wear on your head which can be controlled as if a hand were inside it.

U1770.name: Anatomical Error
U1770.description: Your right hand is now a left hand.

U1570.name: Star Wars
U1570.description: On an island far, far away, the Brown, Red, Yellow, and White Dwarves fight in a neverending war... Will you be the one to bring them peace?

U1570-A0000.name: May The Forge Be With You
U1570-A0000.description: If you can bring peace to the dwarves, they will share their ancient knowledge on how to make the Light Saber.

U0371.name: Close To You
U0371.description: Your atoms can now get 1 femtometer closer to the atoms of other objects/beings

U0123.name: a Jansport backpack with a giant hole ripped in the bottom

U1055.name: The strength of gravity has been rounded up to 10m/s.

U1284.name: 12 unenchanted Mr Beast Feastables chocolate bars including unreleased flavours.

U0596.name: Holesome
U0596.description: Your tree has a small hollow that birds can nest in.

U0681.name: Land Tax
U0681.description: Your starting island is 3x longer and wider, but every day it loses 10% of its mass until it returns to its original size

U1304.name: I'm Cooked Bruh
U1304.description: All food you cook is now extremely poisonous

U0908.name: Sam Hide
U0908.description: A secret Nazi base appears somewhere in the void...

U1353.name: Code of Conduct
U1353.description: The social contract is now written by a fucking retard.

U1650.name: Pet Sitter
U1650.description: Your Neopets will be fed while you're gone.

U0379.name: Code Switching
U0379.description: You can change your race at will

U0379-A0000.name: Ren Fair
U0379-A0000.description: You can now pick from generic fantasy races such as elfish, dwarf, orc, etc. Your body mass and height will not change.

U1764.name: Fat Loot
U1764.description: Pastries are 4x more likely to be found in loot boxes. Blacksaber Kruelelfs are 2x as likely to drop magic pastries.

U1168.name: You become a pedophile, but at a price...

U0654.name: It's What's On The Inside That Counts
U0654.description: Your inner organs are more beautiful

U1241.name: Your starting area is instead a two pen cottage from Milwaukee but there are constant moans coming from the second floor

U1116.name: Waters of Forgiveness
U1116.description: Spitting on others makes them more likely to forgive you

U2050.name: Dumb Luck
U2050.description: A maneki-neko ring. Wearing it makes you luckier when you do things without thinking.

U1362.name: Cold-blooded
U1362.description: You catch a cold more often.

U1173.name: You become the administrator of an altchan

U0675.name: Kiss Me I'm Irish
U0675.description: Become temporarily Irish after you take a substantial amount of damage. You can only transform back to normal by causing a substantial amount of damage to another creature.

U0640.name: Introspection
U0640.description: You can dispel mirages if you spend enough time thinking about the likelihood of their existence

U1324.name: Festive
U1324.description: Your starting tree is now decorated with Star Wars themed Christmas ornaments.

U0875.name: Rage Bait
U0875.description: You can now catch fish using Anger as bait.

U0875-A0000.name: Master Bait
U0875-A0000.description: You can now catch fish using Arousal as bait.

U0236.name: AmeliaNotFound
U0236.description: On a random island, you find a crashed Lockheed Model 10 Electra airliner against a tree, there is nobody inside. Requires advanced mechanic tech tree to repair, requires fuel.

U1472.name: A :3 flu mask which will detonate with the force of a stick of dynamite 15 seconds after being worn

U1323.name: Fools Rush In
U1323.description: Your starting island is now positioned directly above a large Profoundly-Defiled Stygian Demon-Curs'd island.

U0306.name: Blackface is no longer considered offensive

U0478.name: Epic Meal Time
U0478.description: Consuming bacon gives you random temporary buffs.

U0784.name: No Cap
U0784.description: You can no longer equip anything in your Head Slot.

U0921.name: Self-improvement
U0921.description: You stop procrastinating and start working on your plans to bomb a nearby concert hall

U1076.name: Throwback
U1076.description: A small bunker spawns near your starting island, filled with random, useless junk, and someone's dead body...

U0755.name: Mother 2
U0755.description: The starting island is now made out of living flesh

U0692.name: Liar's Game
U0692.description: Every lie you make another believe for at least a day gives you 1 gem

U1854.name: Meet The Beetles
U1854.description: A swarm of bark beetles have been sighted due 50 knots away and are currently headed toward your starting tree.

U0760.name: Mr. World Wide
U0760.description: You can now teleport to a random coordinate in the void twice a day.

U0107.name: A filing cabinet filled with decades worth of various receipts, ledgers, and administrative forms which will prove invaluable in managing a larger colony

U0872.name: Pyramid Scheme
U0872.description: Mummies may now spawn in normal graveyards.

U0199.name: A warm 128 oz Big Gulp full of of Dr. Pepper

U0338.name: Bulletproof
U0338.description: You get a free bulletproof coffee in an 8 oz styrofoam cup every morning

U0195.name: A USB flash drive with a free copy of VLC Media Player on it

U1374.name: The Man From The 'Verse
U1374.description: NPCs now refuse to believe you came from another universe, no matter how much evidence you present in your favor.

U0710.name: Lucky Coin
U0710.description: You receive a coin which will randomly multiply or divide a stat (except Lck) each time you flip it. Effects last for an hour. Flipping the same stat twice replaces the current buff/debuff.

U1262.name: Brace Yourself
U1262.description: You start out wearing a neck brace.

U1113.name: Warhammer
U1113.description: A 0.762 meter long dead blow hammer decorated with a Singaporean flag pattern

U0054.name: A 0.85 meter long elgiloy compression spring

U1535.name: I Paused My Game To Be Here
U1535.description: Any achievements or gamerscore you've accrued on Earth will be seamlessly transferred to The 'Verse.

U0244.name: An ancient, antique corpse is buried on your island. Mostly in good condition

U0914.name: Scrap of Solomon's Contract
U0914.description: Burning this will abjure all temporarily summoned creatures, once.

U1906.name: Aspect of Glenn
U1906.description: All of your limbs are replaced with tentacles which you can mix and match the style of freely.

U0720.name: Make The 'Verse Great Again
U0720.description: The World Dragon becomes the president of The 'Verse

U0438.name: Die Zauberflöte
U0438.description: A magic flute, which when a song of 3.5 minutes in length (or greater) is played upon it, spawns 50 crickets. 30 minute cooldown.

U0577.name: Have Some Pride
U0577.description: Design a flag for your island. 1 large flag with that design replaces your starting tree.

U0897.name: RGB
U0897.description: Turn the sky into your favorite color.

U0739.name: Mind-boggling Effects
U0739.description: Reality is now rendered through a Playstation One

U1973.name: A set of glass paperweights in the shape of the 5 Pythagorean Solids

U0927.name: SHOOP DA WHOOP
U0927.description: Every creature with a mouth may fire their laser.

U1060.name: The Wauce Is Boss
U1060.description: Wasps are 50x more abundant, 1.5x larger and louder, and deliver 5x more painful stings. Each sting temporarily increases a random stat by 0.75

U1170.name: You become closer to God but not the one you want

U1639.name: The Mandelbrot Effect
U1639.description: Sacred Geometry no longer exists in The 'Verse.

U1228.name: Your island has a blade of grass!

U1227.name: Your island comes with a log!

U2026.name: Shiggy Diggy
U2026.description: A shovel with a blade that looks like Shigeru Miyamoto's face. Cuts through tough naturally occurring rocks like butter and is immune to cursed rock, but otherwise a normal shovel.

U2026-A0000.name: His Body Was Ready
U2026-A0000.description: Graves dug by Shiggy Diggy are 10x more Sacred.

U0649.name: It's Arcade Time
U0649.description: Add a small arcade to your island, but you must Win Big in it once a month or you die.

U0839.name: Pen Pal
U0839.description: A sentient, talking rollerball pen which loves when you use it.

U1969.name: Together Forever
U1969.description: A pair of heart-shaped lockets. If the wearer of one locket dies, the wearer of the other locket will inherit the deceased's essence

U1325.name: Back to the Greeks
U1325.description: A 10m tall, 1m radius Corinthian marble column.

U1745.name: Treat Or Trick
U1745.description: Candied Weapons do double damage on Halloween

U0918.name: Second Life
U0918.description: You gain one retry upon death. You respawn with tan skin, spiked hair, and full body tribal tattoos, but are also gay

U1286.name: A pack of white pavement chalk.

U1834.name: Waking Life
U1834.description: You can no longer tell if you're dreaming or awake.

U0464.name: Ed Boy
U0464.description: Loot boxes now contain more Jawbreakers

U0523.name: Friend In Me
U0523.description: You now have 3 tapeworms inside you

U0523-A0000.name: Best Buds
U0523-A0000.description: Your tapeworms are now sapient and capable of telepathically communicating with you

U1785.name: Gem Whale
U1785.description: Owning an enormous amount of gems will now have a negative impact on the economy of The 'Verse.

U1785-A0000.name: Greed Is Good
U1785-A0000.description: Greedium weapons and Armor of the Avariciant are now 200% more powerful.

U0747.name: Missing Persons
U0747.description: All sapient races now regularly have members of their communities vanish mysteriously

U0774.name: Neue Cyoa Deux After Dark
U0774.description: Enemies and NPCs use more mature language.

U1314.name: Really Hits The Spot
U1314.description: A randomly chosen spot on your body now has a 30 cm glowing red spot that causes double damage to you when hit.

U1771.name: Sinister Link
U1771.description: You can now merge your left hand with any other matter and it will act as if it's attached to your body. Your left hand will not displace any of the other matter, just attach you to it.

U1771-A0000.name: Dancing Links
U1771-A0000.description: You can now do the same with your right foot.

U0969.name: Steve's Lava Chicken
U0969.description: You are now immune to burning your mouth.

U1306.name: Lifeline
U1306.description: A red telephone that lets you call the American president once.

U0948.name: Smile Dog
U0948.description: Smile Dog spawns on your island.

U1663.name: Let's Find Out
U1663.description: You get a small crystal ball which allows you to tune in to the infrequent livecasts of a wizard who was unfairly banished from his kingdom. He offers a lot of sage advice on wizardry, role-playing games, and how you should interact with different races in The 'Verse.

U0547.name: Gilligan
U0547.description: Your island gets a rowboat tied to its dock (REQUIRES DOCK)

U2017.name: Control Alt Delete
U2017.description: Games'Verse now stocks banned video games

U0290.name: >be me
U0290.description: >greentext out loud >others can view my memories exactly as they happened

U0138.name: A model train filled with a viscous fluid that when bathed in removes Cursed wounds

U1580.name: The Toker
U1580.description: Things are now 420 times funnier when you smoke weed

U1282.name: Nostalgia
U1282.description: Your childhood memories are modified to be more positive (especially "that"). You forget about the existence of this item.

U0117.name: A glass stein filled with warm Mello Yello Cherry

U0958.name: Sponsored By
U0958.description: Conversations with other sapient beings must include mention of FanDuel or Spotify® at least once per hour of cumulative conversation time, or your run ends.

U0608.name: I Don't See Anything
U0608.description: Everything within 666 gigameters of your starting island is now within the maw of Cetus Iuniperi

U0018.name: 1kg of aluminum powder in a sealed container

U0920.name: Seer's
U0920.description: Furniture catalog for your island that comes once a month. Items can be bought using any applicable currency. Can only buy 1 of each item listed. Items are severely overpriced.

U0751.name: Moment of Truth
U0751.description: Once you defeat the World Dragon you will learn the true meaning of C.Y.O.A.

U2031.name: Fake Fans
U2031.description: All Neue Cyoa Deux: Skyblock Edition secondaries are sent to the Torture Dimension.

U0819.name: One Door Opens...
U0819.description: Anytime you open a door, a door somewhere else closes.

U0233.name: Always Bet On Black
U0233.description: Your Lck increases by 0.5% if you're wearing all black

U1459.name: The True Man Show
U1459.description: 50 years from now, an extra-terrestrial race (native to the 'Verse) will visit Earth. They will crash their ship in Neo Roswell, ███ ██████. If found alive, the authorities will quickly destroy them. However, inside their ship is a 24/7 live stream of your exact Run shot on candid camera that they were busy watching before entering our atmosphere. At first, the government will sit on the footage and keep it under wraps. Eventually, tuning in to your Run will become the global pastime. If you manage to finish your Run before all intelligent life on Earth is extinct, you will be hailed as a hero, and will retire in luxury.

U1773.name: Style Over Substance
U1773.description: The worse an item's stats are, the cooler it looks.

U0422.name: Dat Frog
U0422.description: Randomly occurring islands now have 50% more frogs and unicycles.

U1216.name: You temporarily gain amazing and impeccable driving skills

U1645.name: Not Like Us
U1645.description: Humanoid-adjacent races such as flesh faeries, river goblins, ghost titans, and stone imps will instinctively see you as friendly, while non-humanoid creatures will see you as an enemy.

U0588.name: Hero's Journey
U0588.description: One chance to bounce back up if you fall into the abyss.

U1592.name: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
U1592.description: You now have a loyal tiger as a pet, but as a result the World Dragon has rendered itself permanently invisible to any advanced technological detection systems.

U1114.name: Warmer
U1114.description: The ambient temperature of the void is increased by 5 °C.

U1114-A0000.name: Sweltering
U1114-A0000.description: The ambient temperature of the void is further increased by 5 °C.

U1114-A0001.name: Blistering
U1114-A0001.description: The ambient temperature of the void is further increased by 5 °C.

U1114-A0002.name: Scorching
U1114-A0002.description: The ambient temperature of the void is further increased by 5 °C.

U0072.name: A bathtub filled with frozen boiled water

U0300.name: Better Go Catch It
U0300.description: A full-sized, living refrigerator with legs. It does not rely on electricity, instead consuming 100g of meat placed inside it per day. It must be fed and taken for walks daily.

U1685.name: Let's Fucking Go
U1685.description: Small accomplishments are now more meaningful and exciting to you.

U1249.name: Your starting tree now grows 1 jalapeno per month

U1757.name: Insane Schizophrenic Retard
U1757.description: Your Faith now scales with your Paranoia and Uncertainty.

U1245.name: Your starting tree never stops growing, so long as you remember to water it.

U0637.name: Insane Clown Posse
U0637.description: A gaggle of clowns will follow you around with unicycles and honking horns throughout the entire run. The worth of this perk may only become clear once you have beaten the main game…

U1495.name: No Fun Allowed
U1495.description: All items are now significantly nerfed in order to balance difficulty and gameplay.

U1017.name: The Fishbowl
U1017.description: Your starting island is now trapped in a warped area of space. A sphere (of indeterminate size) around it will always lead back into it, except for a 10 meter hole at the very top.

U1017-A0000.name: Escape Room
U1017-A0000.description: Your starting island is now completely surrounded by warped space. There is no exit.

U1694.name: Weak Spot
U1694.description: You gain a big, red, unremovable button on the top of your head that when pressed will render you immobile for 30 seconds.

U1300.name: Grimdark
U1300.description: NPCs will never laugh or smile.

U0346.name: Caesar's Mantle
U0346.description: +15 Chr when equipped, but gaining any renown will lead to conspirators plotting to end your ambition. Unequipping the mantle does not end any conspiracy against your life.

U1604.name: UltraUnique
U1604.description: Your mood changes depending on the color of your eyes

U1587.name: Treasure Magnet
U1587.description: Enemy loot such as gems, lootboxes, and weapons will now fly towards you when initially dropped.

U1705.name: Nonce Sense
U1705.description: You now have some bad ideas, but you won't act upon them... right?

U1572.name: Cookie Clicker
U1572.description: Your starting island is a chocolate-chip cookie!

U1572-A0000.name: Peanut Butter
U1572-A0000.description: Your starting island is a peanut butter cookie!

U1572-A0001.name: White Chocolate
U1572-A0001.description: Your starting island is a white chocolate cookie!

U1572-A0002.name: Dark Chocolate
U1572-A0002.description: Your starting island is a dark chocolate cookie!

U1572-A0003.name: Snickerdoodle
U1572-A0003.description: Your starting island is a snickerdoodle cookie!

U1572-A0004.name: Gingersnap
U1572-A0004.description: Your starting island is a gingersnap cookie!

U1572-A0005.name: Fortune Cookie
U1572-A0005.description: Your starting island is a fortune cookie and comes with a fortune!

U1572-A0006.name: M&M
U1572-A0006.description: Your starting island is an M&M cookie!

U1572-A0007.name: Oatmeal
U1572-A0007.description: Your starting island is an oatmeal cookie!

U1572-A0008.name: Graham Cracker
U1572-A0008.description: Your starting island is a graham cracker!

U1572-A0009.name: No Bake
U1572-A0009.description: Your starting island is a no-bake cookie!

U1572-A0010.name: Got Milk?
U1572-A0010.description: Your starting tree is now a glass of milk!

U1844.name: History Is Written By The Victors
U1844.description: Famous 'Verse historian Victor Parblum joins you on your island. He's an esteemed professor, so the squalor of your island may appal him. If you wish to get any juicy factoids out of him, you may need to tidy up the place so he can get cozy...

U1844-A0000.name: Might Makes Right
U1844-A0000.description: Killing Victor will grant you several stat bonuses.

U1844-A0001.name: To The Victor Go The Spoils
U1844-A0001.description: Any item drops from creatures you slay will automatically be given to Victor and you will have to convince or otherwise coerce him into giving you them.

U2051.name: It's Montenegrin to Me
U2051.description: All Sisyphean tasks, Herculean efforts, and Gordian knots require 15% less effort to overcome.

U0170.name: A second-generation iPod Touch with infinite power
U0170.description: The only song on it is "In the End" by Linkin Park. You can't add any other songs, and if you try to delete "In the End," the device shuts off forever.

U1839.name: Amish Paradise
U1839.description: Elves no longer rely on magitech-based vehicles and appliances.

U1656.name: Due Process
U1656.description: Upon death, you are given the opportunity to speak to the Board of Versemasters for twenty seconds to present a case arguing why, based on your perks, runs and/or items, your deathblow shouldn’t have killed you. The Board of Versemasters has the ability to repeal your death, but is extremely difficult to convince. None of your runs, items or perks will be active during the conversation.

U0616.name: I'd Buy That For a Dollar
U0616.description: Your starting tree now grows money instead of leaves.

U0103.name: A decent scuba mask, 0.5L filled oxygen tank, and manual pump

U1206.name: You instantly learn any language of your choosing.
U1206.description: Everybody else forgets it and anything written in it is erased from existence.

U1497.name: Unit 731
U1497.description: Loot boxes are now more likely to contain manga, ramen, and bento boxes.

U0611.name: I Got A Ring In There Last Night
U0611.description: Develop an intermittent and intensifying case of tinnitus, which at its higher levels allows you to hear an expanded range of frequencies previously inaudible to the human ear.

U0368.name: Cleansing Light
U0368.description: Every second you stare at the Sun gives you +0.1 Holy

U0919.name: Security System
U0919.description: Sentry turrets that will shoot any invaders, including you

U0767.name: My Little Pet Shop
U0767.description: A glass fishtank that has four animals in it: a dog, a lizard, a porcupine, and a panda. The animals are all 3 inches tall.

U0502.name: Fingy
U0502.description: You gain an extra finger on each of your hands (Can take up to 6 times)

U0630.name: In Harm's Way
U0630.description: Things without sturdy foundations or which are at risk of toppling over will fall over more often and always fall towards you

U1652.name: Billiards
U1652.description: Islands are now given random starting velocities and will bounce off of each other.

U1199.name: You gain the Steam UI over your vision.

U2004.name: Scabbarder
U2004.description: A flammendolch that doubles the End of anything it's stabbed into.

U0128.name: A knob on your neck that allows you to apply frequency modulation to your voice

U0526.name: Fucking Magnets, How Do They Work?
U0526.description: Your island is now magnetically charged.

U1015.name: The Exchange
U1015.description: Trade height and points in either direction at a rate of 0.77 cubit : 8.14 points.

U1430.name: ICBA
U1430.description: ESTINA (Every Single Thing Is Now Acronymized)

U0355.name: Caver's Story
U0355.description: The inside of your starting island is now hollow

U1310.name: Natural Remedy
U1310.description: Your starting tree now grows 1 bottle of aspirin a month

U1758.name: Death of the Author
U1758.description: Writing any language, sign, or symbol causes you to have a fatal heart attack.

U0857.name: Predictable
U0857.description: The Good Factions are now Evil and the Evil Factions are now Good

U1706.name: Omega Point
U1706.description: The 'Verse's underlying topology is now conical. Moving far up vertically will allow you to traverse vast horizontal distances relative to your starting elevation. Moving downward will have the opposite effect.

U1452.name: Di 'Verse Tastes (Brought To You By Spotify®)
U1452.description: Residents of The 'Verse now listen to and produce genres of music besides schlager, electroswing, liquid dnb, and speedcore.

U0770.name: Natural Colorants
U0770.description: Your feces will be a bright color of your choice

U1869.name: Foreplay
U1869.description: You must insult enemies before you can attack them.

U0820.name: One free egg a day, but it's impossible to eat the eggshells or throw them off the island
U0820.description: WARNING: Do not step on them.

U0079.name: A boomerang carrying an Aboriginal curse which causes it to never return to the one who threw it

U1287.name: You now see the world from a bird's-eye view but you need to concentrate to control the mouse pointer that moves you around.

U1287-A0000.name: You gain the ability to zoom in or out with the camera. There is a clamp on how far you can zoom out. The view will reset itself to the default camera position after 4 seconds of non-zooming activity.

U1287-A0001.name: The mouse now has two buttons instead of one, and left clicking on an entity will tell you its race and a general description of what they do.

U1287-A0002.name: When hovering your mouse over an item, material, or entity, you will see what it's called near the pointer. Only works with things you know about. Requires gaining knowledge of unknown entities and materials to see this descriptor.

U1914.name: Cur Sieve Writing
U1914.description: Your handwriting will now ward off feral or poorly-trained dogs.

U1988.name: Fuck
U1988.description: During your run the World Dragon will come out about the horrible things you did to it a few years ago.

U0771.name: Natural Remedy
U0771.description: Sprinkling blighted bone dust on chest mimics causes them to writhe in pain for several seconds.

U0081.name: A box of 100 nitrile gloves, 45 of which have been removed

U1484.name: Free* Will
U1484.description: You now only have 1/2 as many choices available in any situation.

U1484-A0000.name: Freedom Isn't Free
U1484-A0000.description: You now have all choices available to you again.

U0868.name: Psy-Op
U0868.description: A friend you know from real life of your choice will join you, but they are loyal to the World Dragon.

U0076.name: A binder full of screenshots from Bug! (Sega Saturn version)
U0076.description: Screenshots are printed on laminated paper and document one playthrough of the game.

U0076-A0000.name: Implanted memories of it being your playthrough with your younger brother

U0672.name: Kill It With Fire
U0672.description: The undead are still weak to fire even before you exhume and exorcise the Zombie Dragon.

U0916.name: Sealing Suture
U0916.description: You are now immune to the negative effects of Horned Calf's Blight, though you still retain the visible signs

U1331.name: O RLY?
U1331.description: An owl now lives in your starting tree

U1376.name: Deplatformed
U1376.description: You no longer get a starting island

U1807.name: Storied Islander
U1807.description: You get another island above your current one.

U1515.name: ACAB
U1515.description: Police and other peace officers of all nations and kindreds and people and tongues go to Heaven when they die. All Campbell's canned goods now sport a blue & black label in accordance with their reverence for authority.

U1416.name: Shrunk in the Wash
U1416.description: You start every day with your tshirt changing font, justification, kerning, print quality, and clothing material

U1716.name: Verse's Finest
U1716.description: A 1 meter tall plastic trophy with the plaque "BIGGEST RETARD".

U0015.name: 150 3cm3 colored wooden cubes and a piece of paper which has the name of each cube next to an image of it

U1891.name: Mr. Lynchfingers
U1891.description: You now have a permanent hangnail on your right middle finger and left thumb

U0814.name: On Tap
U0814.description: Star material can now be produced in nuclear fusion

U1737.name: Lovely Sweet Dream
U1737.description: Your initial Dream stats are upgraded to the point where level 10 Apparitions, Oneirhinos, and Avatars of Phantasime will be a breeze.

U1556.name: Jelly Donut
U1556.description: All foods now have a random mystery substance hidden in the middle.

U0806.name: Official Ame Manga shirt. Wearing it suddenly gives you an insatiable craving for frogs. Part of the Yildrog set

U0038.name: 450 packs of Charles Chocolates Ping Pong Peanuts

U0648-A0000.name: It's good, but it doesn't live up to the hype

U0648-A0001.name: It's awesome and it lives up to the hype

U0648-A0002.name: Gaben adds you on steam and makes you creative director

U1424.name: Barely Know Her
U1424.description: Congratulations, neophyte summoner! You can now effortlessly attain skills in summoning that would normally require decades of study. The entrance fee is 20 points, after which you can take as many options below as you would like, but only once for each!

U1424-A0001.name: 1 American green tree frog every month

U1424-A0010.name: A green summoner's robe and summoner's hat

U1835.name: Doctor's Orders
U1835.description: The blood of virgins (female) satisfies your hunger meter.

U0782.name: Nightmare Mode
U0782.description: You now have a full body Nightmare Before Christmas tattoo

U1477.name: QWOP
U1477.description: A mysterious figure will appear every 7 months to give you cryptic portents of your current run in an mobster-like voice

U1816.name: Yin & Yang
U1816.description: Good is no longer "good" and Evil is no longer "bad". Chinese practices like torturing animals before slaughter in order to make them taste better are more common.

U0671.name: Kidd Hardladd
U0671.description: Aye, up and at 'em! We've got monsters to slay! is how Kidd Hardladd likes to start the day. Young Hardladd is a quixotic Elfen adventurer-in-training that's got the bravery of a knight three times his size. Despite his young age and lithe body, Kidd has slew more monsters in his time than most of the adults in his village! He's quite crafty and a little mischievious, but the elders from all the surrounding islands speak goldenly of his valor. "I may just be a Kidd, but I pack a mean whallop!" - Something he likes to say.  Hearing of the grand pickle you've got yourself into, Kidd can't help but to join your cause! "They don't call me Hardladd fer nothin'!" He's ready to venture with you to the ends of The 'Verse to defeat the World Dragon, and he won't let anything, not even his Non-Hodgkin's lymphoma, get in the way.

U0224.name: All magic becomes science
U0224.description: WARNING: This may have unintended consequences.

U0337.name: Bugger Rabbit
U0337.description: A certain sassy humanoid cartoon rabbit joins you! He may not realize cartoon physics don't apply to you. He only has the durability of a cartoon character and lacks other extraordinary traits outside of animation gags.

U1290.name: Hue Shift
U1290.description: All colors are randomly mapped to different ones

U0455.name: Dr. Slump
U0455.description: You become schizophrenic but have very rare occasional bouts of genius.

U1258.name: Yuletide
U1258.description: The Magma Demon is now made of Frost Magma

U0303.name: Bigfoot
U0303.description: Your feet get 1.05x larger every step you take. Each second you aren't walking they get 0.975x smaller until they return to normal size. The size they can grow to is unbounded.

U1501.name: I Am Fucked Up
U1501.description: One too many screws came loose. Maybe pushed a little too far by a world that didn't fucking care...? Whatever the reason, you are now fucking insane and twisted.

U1653.name: Natural Hierarchy
U1653.description: Islands are now sparser but will more likely generate above or below each other in large vertical stacks.

U0404.name: Cull The Weak
U0404.description: Any enemy you can solo low diff dies instantly when you look at it.

U1894.name: The Jokester
U1894.description: You may now only speak in jokes and puns.

U0418.name: Dark Portal
U0418.description: You may invade another players run once but your run is over the instant you are seen by them. You are teleported out after 24 hours and can bring back anything you steal.

U1926.name: A silver ring that permanently transmogrifies the finger it is worn on into a stick of peppermint.

U0342.name: Butterfly Stroke
U0342.description: You can swim through air but you permanently lose 0.1 Str for each second spent afloat

U1494.name: Veggie Tails
U1494.description: Vegetables are now sentient and intelligent.

U1953.name: Where Be The Booty?
U1953.description: An eyepatch is now forcibly equipped to your left eyeball slot with no way to remove it and one of your hands is replaced with a hook hand, but the women of The 'Verse now have more voluminous derrieres. This is a test of your attention. The effects of this item are a lie and it's free to take. If you do not take this item, the Presence of Decay will spawn during your run.

U0417.name: DangerZone
U0417.description: Gain the ability to travel to other random islands by stepping on ants. Only works if you aren't vaccinated.

U0324.name: Boyz II Men
U0324.description: Everyone in the Philippines grows to 6'2" but you lose 4 inches in height over the course of one month

U1251.name: Your starting tree now grows 1 pair of XXL denim pants per month

U0731.name: MeDoo Doll
U0731.description: You come into possession of a voodoo doll but it only seems to work on yourself

U1932.name: Stress-Free Environment
U1932.description: Atmospheric pressure in most sectors of The 'Verse is reduced to 0.2 atm.

U1615.name: Cool Down
U1615.description: All lava is now Hawaiian Punch

U1449.name: Lost Woods
U1449.description: 5 Backwoods cigars that activate Phantom's Grasp while being smoked

U1622.name: Raw Dog
U1622.description: A plate of uncooked dog meat.

U0706.name: Love-All
U0706.description: A regulation size tennis court floats 10 meters off the west end of your island, surrounded by 4 meter tall chain link fencing. A wood and rope bridge connects it to your island.

U0344.name: Buying Gf
U0344.description: The World Exchange now spawns only 10km from your starting island

U0519-A0000.name: Every Box a Winner
U0519-A0000.description: Toys are 100x more common, but low tier toys are 10x more common.

U0098.name: A computer spawns on the island.
U0098.description: Upon boot, you are met with a logo and the words "Window 8" written below, but the OS behaves nearly identically to Windows 11. Internet, keyboard, mouse, and applications not included.

U0559.name: Grand Exchange
U0559.description: A pamphlet which lists the exchange rates of all currencies in The 'Verse

U0900.name: Rise and Shine!
U0900.description: Every 24 hours at 7 AM (in your time zone) a rooster's call will echo throughout the entire universe. You will be able to hear it no matter where you are.

U0898.name: Righteous
U0898.description: Criminals now do 2x damage to you

U0516.name: Four Teen Words
U0516.description: The phrase "bruh ts pmo fr" echoes in the back of your mind, especially when you're trying to sleep. If you can decode its meaning, perhaps you can find the final solution...

U0993.name: Tarpaulin of Invisibility
U0993.description: Obscures objects from all forms of magical and nonmagical sight, except That Which Watches. The thick fabric makes a loud crinkling noise when it moves.

U1212.name: You rapidly regenerate from minor scrapes and cuts, and living matter removed from your body does not degrade in any way.
U1212.description: Matter used to regenerate your body is created from nothing.

U0997.name: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Shrimp
U0997.description: Turn into a shrimp once a day. Lasts 15 seconds.

U0402.name: Crosswhen
U0402.description: The World Dragon trades places with in the real world you and assumes your relationships and responsibilities, acting in your place until it's summoned using the Radiant Shards. Its actions vaguely mimic yours in The 'Verse.

U0481.name: Every 1 in 1000 hairs after regrowth are made of silver

U0191.name: A tub of legendary black Kratom

U0811.name: OMEGALUL
U0811.description: You can now only think in Twitch emotes.

U1680.name: Phew, What a Work Out
U1680.description: A pullup bar and bench press + barbells that you will never ever use under any circumstances are installed on your island.

U2033.name: Chasing Shadows
U2033.description: Stationary gemstones emit homing blasts of energy at nearby living creatures.

U1786.name: A steampunk Glock which fires coins

U0544.name: Ghibli Vision
U0544.description: Deactivates once Sam Altman is assassinated in the Real World.

U1910.name: Has-been Motel
U1910.description: Demons now use swears like fuck, shit, nigger, and retard twice as often.

U0987.name: Synesthesia
U0987.description: You experience sight, sound, touch, smell, and taste as pain, fear, misery, despair, and gloom respectively.

U1368.name: Flat Mirth
U1368.description: All comfort is felt as solace instead.

U0027.name: 263 of those stickers that you get out of the quarter machines at the entrance to Walmart

U1746.name: If It's Good Enough For Mario
U1746.description: A tribal tattoo covers your entire left arm. Scratching it vivaciously will allow you to charge up your "Beast State".

U0599.name: House Of Leaves
U0599.description: Your house becomes covered in vines and shrubbery.

U0198.name: A wadded up ball of aliminium foil (0.5 kg) with small amounts of battery acid on it

U0047.name: 6 everlasting, inedible stones with no nutritional value
U0047.description: Each one tastes sweet, salty, sour, bitter, pungent, or astringent respectively. You can suck on them to experience the taste as long as you want.

U0714.name: Magic Fingers
U0714.description: Having sex with NPCs or monsters increases your Dex by 0.1.

U2047.name: If You Want Something Done Right
U2047.description: A Tamagonna machine. Raise your own girlfriend, virtually! Once you're done with the video game aspect, a compartment will open up in the machine and present you with an embryo, which you will then have to raise in real life.

U1454.name: The Witness
U1454.description: You will always look back on your time in The 'Verse as at least Type II fun.

U1153.name: Wrath of Mars
U1153.description: All sentient creatures except you are hostile to one another (and you) and bloodlusted.

U1423.name: THE FCKING BEAST
U1423.description: Your muscles are huge and you skin gets all tight and feels like it's going to burst and your veins are black and your eyes are bloodshot and you're so fucking mad you can't even think it's like the blood is pressing against your skull and it's so loud it pisses you off and you can't think about why it pisses you off which pisses you off and you need to fucking kill something right now

U0940.name: Skill Tree
U0940.description: You can now water your starting tree using your stats! (Permanently depletes stat)

U0891.name: Residue Processing
U0891.description: You can now digest wax and plastic food

U1691.name: One-Armed Bandit
U1691.description: At any point in time a considerable amount of loot is gathered up within one location (whether inside of your inventory, in a container, or sitting on the ground in the world, etc.)  a dwarfish gnomelike brownie with one arm may appear and attempt to make off with the goods within 10 seconds if not dealt with. Items that the brownie was carrying from its own stash may also be added to the loot.

U0926.name: Share the Love
U0926.description: You may grant stat increases to a selected ally instead.

U1552.name: Combustible Lemons
U1552.description: Lemons are now combustible, but only if you're mad enough.

U1338.name: King of Spades
U1338.description: You can now build and command an army of lesser races, but only if you have enough gems. This bypasses any faction alignments.

U1214.name: You start with a book containing various goals to accomplish on the island. If you can complete them all you get a gold star

U0541.name: Geometric Mind
U0541.description: You can now always accurately determine angles and visual ratios

U0598.name: Hot Head
U0598.description: Every second you spend reading increases the temperature of your skin by 0.1 degrees Celsius.

U0407.name: Cupcakes
U0407.description: The flesh of sapient creatures can now be turned into a delicious confection which can heal minor wounds.

U0378.name: Code Loco
U0378.description: You now have a larger head. This would go well with a larger brain...

U1503.name: Permanent Puppy Punishment Uniform (PPP Uniform Set)
U1503.description:
A modified Hachiko High School uniform designed by Coco & Angel specifically to punish, humiliate & control Teve. It was created with the help of Mittens and Ginger, who repurposed an ancient demon imprisonment ritual, to make sure that once equipped, it could no longer be removed nor destroyed, even in death. The uniform includes a cropped shirt, a tie and a school swimsuit. The swimsuit has a built in null bulge that can vibrate and shock, but also makes Teve's genitals difficult to stimulate. 
+1 Punished Puppy 
+1 Vibration (inactive) 
+1 Shocked (inactive) 
+1 Purrmanent Seal

U1211.name: You permanently have a slight sniffle. Everyone thinks it's a horrible contagious disease and will avoid you until you convince them it's just a cold.

U0892.name: Rest in Peace
U0892.description: Graveyards are no longer in the cultural milieu. Dead are thrown off the side of islands. Ghosts are now 1/4th as common.

U1627.name: More Creeps And Weirdos
U1627.description: Creatures in The 'Verse are now 99x more crazy and fucked up.

U1952.name: A Trial
U1952.description: All enemies now spawn as Superior versions of themselves instead.

U1952-A0000.name: A Challenge
U1952-A0000.description: All enemies now spawn as Champion versions of themselves instead.

U1952-A0001.name: An Odyssey
U1952-A0001.description: All enemies now spawn as Heroic versions of themselves instead.

U1952-A0002.name: An Impossibility
U1952-A0002.description: All enemies now spawn as Divine versions of themselves instead.

U0571.name: Hapa Mode
U0571.description: You are your current race, but half Asian, ranging from Pacific Islander to Middle Eastern. All races have an equal chance of occurring.

U0395.name: Covert-Op
U0395.description: A friend you know from real life of your choice will join you, but being seen by NPCs causes them intense pain.

U1000.name: The Best Medicine
U1000.description: You now laugh instead of cry

U1399.name: One of those metal head massagers.

U1534.name: Zipperhead
U1534.description: There is now a large zipper on your head which affords easy access to your skull.

U1803.name: You Matter
U1803.description: If you or a co-op player are considering suicide and seeking emotional support, please choose this item. A phone booth will be added to your island which will allow you to call a toll-free number which will connect you to an operator who will listen to you and guide you step-by-step through the process of taking your own life.

U1803-A0000.name: Ring Ring Ring Ring Ring
U1803-A0000.description: The receiver now looks like a banana.

U1803-A0001.name: Please Hold
U1803-A0001.description: It will now play "Opus No. 1" by Tim Carleton when you dial any other number.

U1393.name: An RC car that continuously drives in a circle with a radius of 2 meters

U1356.name: What Arm Thing Homie?
U1356.description: Your arm now occasionally spasms violently at random times.

U1356-A0000.name: I Heil Hitler Nigga
U1356-A0000.description: Instead of your arm spasming randomly, you do a sieg heil randomly. Everyone in The 'Verse knows what this means.

U0453.name: Double Pain
U0453.description: You take double damage from all sources

U1832.name: Where Are Her Organs
U1832.description: Elf women no longer have organs.

U0029.name: 3 ropes but they are the shitty plastic ones and they're light blue, pink and white respectively

U1722.name: Sovereign Citizen
U1722.description: Your island is a sovereign state and is no longer owned by the Confederation of Outer Islands.

U0606.name: I Can't Tell If This Is An Improvement
U0606.description: All enemies will have His face.

U1380.name: A white t-shirt with black gothic text that reads "BUILT TO GAME"

U0583.name: Heaven Is For Real
U0583.description: Death erases your memories and starts everything over again, but it becomes subtly harder each time.

U2043.name: Street Smarts
U2043.description: A printed copy of the entirety of urbandictionary.com as of December 2025.

U0513.name: Forbidden Fruit
U0513.description: Your starting tree now grows a grapefruit once every year!

U1533.name: Slippery Slope Fallacy
U1533.description: As long as your feet are planted on the ground you will be able to cling to slopes of at most 60° without sliding downward.

U1533-A0000.name: Blessing Of Lipschitz
U1533-A0000.description: You can now cling to slopes of 70° at most.

U1491.name: Guiltless
U1491.description: Choosing not to donate gems at NPC shops during checkout no longer affects your alignments.

U1409.name: Sticks and Stones
U1409.description: +20 End, but words now hurt 10x as much

U0855.name: Post-Op
U0855.description: A friend you know from real life of your choice will join you, but their body is now a decaying corpse.

U0413.name: Dad's Car
U0413.description: A navy 2014 Chevy Malibu is attached to the bottom of your island by a 7 meter long steel chain

U0413-A0000.name: Pimp My Ride
U0413-A0000.description: Your dad's car now has a PS2 and TV in it

U0413-A0001.name: What Would You Give?
U0413-A0001.description: Your favorite PS2 game is now hanging from the bottom of the car by a 1.5 meter long piece of fishing line.

U0413-A0002.name: Momslayer
U0413-A0002.description: Dad's revolver is now in the glove compartment, loaded with 3 bullets. Comes with another box of ammo.

U0413-A0003.name: Dad's Last Resort
U0413-A0003.description: Tied by one hundred meters of rope to the side of Dad's car is an MGM-140 ATACMS

U0651.name: It's Dangerous To Go Alone, Take This
U0651.description: A bottle of infinite sunscreen. Will turn to dust if used on anything but your skin.

U1463.name: Daemon Tools
U1463.description: A DeWalt DCK730P2 20V Max Brushless Site Ready 7-Tool Combo Kit with one battery that never runs out of charge. Or you can take the shitty Harbor Freight screwdriver that comes with ringworm on your crotch.

U1445.name: Bottomfeeder
U1445.description: Your shoelaces now act as an extension of your mouth.

U1519.name: Better Than Nothing
U1519.description: A dowsing rod which points toward the World Mountain.

U1925.name: Going Green
U1925.description: An enchanted uranium amulet that glows in the dark and gives +5 Magic Def when worn.

U1797.name: Oddity
U1797.description: This item is still under development. Check back later!

U0308.name: Blessing of Asmongold
U0308.description: Remove all wokeness and DEI from the world.

U0356.name: Cerulean Perspective
U0356.description: You become well-acquainted with ancient Elfkin lore and customs.

U1837.name: Do Not Redeem
U1837.description: Inhabitants of The 'Verse constantly try to scam you for your jems.

U1030.name: The King of Kong
U1030.description: It causes others immense pain if they slander you

U0419.name: Dark Web Contractor
U0419.description: You will receive daily assignments on slips of paper that appear in your hands after you sleep that you can earn gems for completing. Failure to complete any assignments for a long enough period will lead to local ruffians seeking you out to seek their dues one way or another, or worse...

U1141.name: Windmill Windmill
U1141.description: You get a life-size replica of the windwill island from Gorillaz's "Feel Good Inc" floating 3 meters to the north of your starting island. Cannot fly but does have a working windwill. Connected by a rope bridge and posts.

U1527.name: El Dorado
U1527.description: A scrap heap of a jalopy, with no wheels to boot

U1987.name: An official Kim Possible themed fingerbox.

U1239.name: Your Native American uncle will spawn. He has the ability to cook for you.

U0468.name: Elder Ring
U0468.description: A mysterious ring that you can't seem to get rid of...

U0424.name: Deadly Note
U0424.description: During the game, if anyone writes down your full name you die.

U0924.name: ShadowPlay
U0924.description: Your shadow is now 30 seconds behind you

U0861.name: Pro Jared
U0861.description: You gain the ability to pickle any food item.

U0393.name: Cosplayer's Blessing
U0393.description: Your hair will now retain any shape it's styled to be in

U0520.name: Free XP
U0520.description: All innocent NPCs now give 1.5x XP when killed

U1616.name: Finnish Delight
U1616.description: All sodium chloride is now ammonium chloride.

U0255.name: An inflatable pool filled with glitter slime

U1144.name: Wise Investment
U1144.description: An assortment of 20 professional oil painting brushes valued at around $1000 in total

U1814.name: My Blood Is Your Blood Now
U1814.description: You now have access to your bloodline's Kekkei Genkai, allowing use of special powers, techniques, and magic passed down from generation to generation. Use your power wisely...

U1814-A0000.name: Tentougan - Eyes Of Ra
U1814-A0000.description: Your eyes now let you see through light no matter how bright. You can control light itself and even call the power of The Sun to your side.

U1814-A0001.name: Chinuki No Soujutsu - Blood Bending
U1814-A0001.description: You can now control the blood of yourself and others, as well as form it into solid matter or weapons, or tranfuse it into yourself.

U1814-A0002.name: Yomibi - The Tail Of Hell
U1814-A0002.description: You gain a black, nigh-indestructable tail forged from the souls of hell. You may use the tail itself as a weapon, or reform its mass into limbs or something else with a simple command.

U1814-A0003.name: Obakekugutsu - Ghost Puppet
U1814-A0003.description: Any dolls or puppets you create will come to life and can be puppeteered by you. You may imbue each puppet with any sort of singular property.

U1814-A0004.name: Hosseigan - Eyes Of Genesis
U1814-A0004.description: Your eyes now let you see the cause and entire past of anything singular thing, person, or property.

U1814-A0005.name: Rikugougan - Eyes Of The Cosmos
U1814-A0005.description: Your eyes now let you see anywhere from any position, no matter the distance.

U1814-A0006.name: Houyoku - Flying Phoenix
U1814-A0006.description: You now have burning red wings that let you fly throughout The 'Verse at very fast speeds. If your wings are destroyed, they will instantly regrow.

U1814-A0007.name: Sennin No Tamashii - Soul Of The Immortal
U1814-A0007.description: You are immune to aging, accidental death, death from hunger, illnesses, curses, poison, venom, and any form of nonfatal damage.

U1814-A0008.name: Juuokunenyume - Billion Year Dream
U1814-A0008.description: You gain the ability to use extremely powerful Genjutsu, allowing you to manipulate the senses of others. Your ability will get better the more you train.

U1814-A0009.name: Kanshiriki - The Powerful Sixty
U1814-A0009.description: Great power is granted to you based on the current year represented by the Kanshi, or Sexagenary Cycle. Each power is as follows: Kinoe Ne - Wood Rat: Exceptional ability in creation of various tools. Kinoto Ushi - Wood Ox: Immunity to all pain and suffering. Hinoe Tora - Fire Tiger: Great increase in power, additionally with the ability to freely control anger. Hinoto U - Fire Rabbit: Weapons will never miss the target you set out to hit. Tsuchinoe Tatsu - Earth Dragon: Gravity now bends to your will. Walk across The 'Verse as if it were ground. Tsuchinoto Mi - Earth Snake: Ability to dig through any material with your bare hands. Kanoe Uma - Metal Horse: Ability to run faster than any vehicle. In addition, while running, your body is stronger than steel. Kanoto Hitsuji - Metal Goat: Ability to consume anything for nutrients. During digestion, you can attain the property of whatever you have ingested. Mizunoe Saru - Water Monkey: Swim through the air like a fish. General agility is also increased hundredfold. Mizunoto Tori - Water Rooster: Water now fuels your Soul-flame, granting you power the more you drink. Kinoe Inu - Wood Dog: All of your coordination and reflexes are now maximized. Kinoto I - Wood Pig: Nothing is too heavy for you to carry. Hinoe Ne - Fire Rat: Small creatures and insects now bend to your Authority. You may control them at will. Hinoto Ushi - Fire Ox: All physical blows can be endured. Your strength is like an iron wall. Tsuchinoe Tora - Earth Tiger: Ability to avoid almost any attack if you know it's coming. Tsuchinoto U - Earth Rabbit: You are invisible to anyone as long as you make no noise. Kanoe Tatsu - Metal Dragon: Weapons are leagues more powerful now than they normally would be. Kanoto Mi - Metal Snake: You can teleport over large distances with a single thought. Mizunoe Uma - Water Horse: Water is no longer an obstacle for you. Walk, run, and jump over it like ground. Mizunoto Hitsuji - Water Goat: Melt anything into liquid with a touch. Kinoe Saru - Wood Monkey: Your limbs can now morph into anything you'd like, including weapons. Kinoto Tori - Wood Rooster: Ability to detect and hear sounds from any distance away. Hinoe Inu - Fire Dog: Power increased greatly. In addition, others will always underestimate you. Hinoto I - Fire Pig: Bacon damage is now increased millionfold. In addition, choose one another element from the following list to increase thousandfold: Light, Dark, Poison, Doom, Good, Evil, Ice, Fire, Water, Stone, Metal, Shadow, Air, Energy or Ghost. Tsuchinoe Ne - Earth Rat: You are now healthy and strong no matter what. Tsuchinoto Ushi - Earth Ox: Greatly increased luck. Kanoe Tora - Metal Tiger: Gain the brain of an armsmaster. Blueprints for powerful weapons of destruction come to you easily. Kanoto U - Metal Rabbit: Never run out of energy. Always be at your maximal strength. Mizunoe Tatsu - Water Dragon: All liquid now bends to your will. Mizunoto Mi - Water Snake: Ability to masterfully craft all your words and lies. Additionally, charisma greatly increased. Kinoe Uma - Wood Horse: No one ever considers you an enemy. Kinoto Hitsuji - Wood Goat: Ability to convert matter into any other form or material. Hinoe Saru - Fire Monkey: Ability to use any martial arts (human or 'Verse-based) at a professional level. Hinoto Tori - Fire Rooster: Women of all races swoon at the sight of you. Tsuchinoe Inu - Earth Dog: All animals are tameable within minutes. They will follow your every command. Tsuchinoto I - Earth Pig: Every day is pleasureable, and you always feel motivated to do your best. Kanoe Ne - Metal Rat: Technology of all kinds bend towards your will. In addition, tinkering with any technology comes easy to you. Kanoto Ushi - Metal Ox: Damage to anyone ignores their defenses. Mizunoe Tora - Water Tiger: Ability to use Soul Magic at a veteran level without any additional rituals to begin. Mizunoto U - Water Rabbit: Weather, seasons, temperature, and environmental effects in a general area can be changed at will. Kinoe Tatsu - Wood Dragon: All enemies, creatures, and beings are now ten times weaker than normal. Kinoto Mi - Wood Snake: Your starting tree now grows one thousand times faster. It can also grow to limitless heights. Hinoe Uma - Fire Horse: Chaos reigns throughout The 'Verse for your enemies. Order comes to you easily. Hinoto Hitsuji - Fire Goat: Immunity to fire and other heat or light-based magical attacks. Tsuchinoe Saru - Earth Monkey: Grow any plants or fungi instantly. Tsuchinoto Tori - Earth Rooster: Regenerate wounds and damage one hundred times faster, without any loss of energy. Kanoe Inu - Metal Dog: Ability to steal familiars, slaves, or summons bounded to other beings and use them yourself. Kanoto I - Metal Pig: Money, gems, and general riches come to you easily. Mizunoe Ne - Water Rat: Ability to shrink yourself down by any amount. Mizunoto Ushi - Water Ox: All physical and magical attacks phase through you. Kinoe Tora - Wood Tiger: Control whether someone will remember any action involving you or not. Kinoto U - Wood Rabbit: INT and WIS both increased by 100. Hinoe Tatsu - Fire Dragon: Tenfold increase in all stats. Hinoto Mi - Fire Snake: Inflict a powerful poison, venom, or curse through touch. Tsuchinoe Uma - Earth Horse: Any being weaker than you will die on touch. Tsuchinoto Hitsuji - Earth Goat: Any being less intelligent than you will give you any valuable or thing you desire. Kanoe Saru - Metal Monkey: Ability to easily control the emotions of others. Kanoto Tori - Metal Rooster: Death is no longer a possibility for you. Mizunoe Inu - Water Dog: Succeed and win in anything as long as another being considers it a challenge. Mizunoto I - Water Pig: Immunity to any amount of force that is more than ten times the amount needed to fatally wound you.

U1175.name: You can breed animals like in Minecraft, but any animal obtained through this method eventually becomes vicious and attempts to kill you

U0398.name: Crack Nigga
U0398.description: Smoking crack now has twice the normal effect

U0398-A0000.name: Crack Chigga
U0398-A0000.description: Smoking opium now has twice the normal effect

U0420.name: Darklord
U0420.description: The amount of Dark Mana you can hold is now unbounded

U0573.name: Happy Birthday
U0573.description: A large candle shaped like a birthday cake

U0966.name: Status Symbol
U0966.description: A necklace with a four-pointed star which gives knowledge of all of your stats (except hidden ones) when you wear it. NPCs who see you with it equipped will assume you are person of importance.

U1044.name: The outside world is paused while you sleep, but you can sleep for a maximum of 4h per day and always experience nightmares

U1137.name: Why Can't I Hold All These Items?
U1137.description: Objects constantly slip out of your grasp, making tools and weapons impossible to use.

U1366.name: Onions Have Layers
U1366.description: Ogres are now more likely to be attracted to you.

U1847.name: Leo
U1847.description: Your name is changed to Leo. (Not short for anything)

U0334.name: Bros To The End
U0334.description: Any *-Op players that die during your run will become a voice in your head and be able to experience your life vicariously.

U0724.name: Marvelous Misadventure
U0724.description: You now know the exact location of Candied Island.

U0610.name: I Give My Life
U0610.description: All options which increase your lifespan now grant Ach instead, with an exchange rate of 4 years = 1 Ach.

U1517.name: Doomed
U1517.description: It's too late. There is nothing you can do.

U0567.name: Hamburger Hill
U0567.description: One selected chunk of the map gets completely covered in cooked steaks, but every creature on it instantly dies.

U0854.name: Positive Role Models
U0854.description: A larger percentage of orcs are in high-status white collar jobs instead of barbaric rape tribes.

U1234.name: Your island is installed with an All-you-can-eat Korean BBQ.

U0595.name: Hit the Bell
U0595.description: Someone else ringing a bell in front of you instantly hypnotizes you.

U0358.name: Chat, Is This Real?
U0358.description: Choose one real friend of yours. Your friend will receive a VGA monitor (640 x 480 resolution) in the mail which, when plugged in, broadcasts your life through your eyes. Only your friend can see it.

U0358-A0000.name: Sound Blaster
U0358-A0000.description: Headphones can now be plugged in to the monitor to allow your friend to listen to what you're hearing.

U0358-A0001.name: Crystal Clear Picture
U0358-A0001.description: The monitor now has 4K resolution with true color display

U0358-A0002.name: Stream Snipe
U0358-A0002.description: Your friend gets a big red button under glass with the word "KILL" on it in white lettering. If the button is pushed by anyone or anything, you will instantly die

U0358-A0003.name: Backseat Gaming
U0358-A0003.description: Your friend gets a mouse which can be used to highlight objects or entities onscreen (shifting their colors 50% closer to #f4cc2c) for 1 second. Clicking again will toggle the effect on or off early. Only 1 object can be clicked at a time.

U0358-A0004.name: Trackball Btw
U0358-A0004.description: The mouse is a trackball mouse

U0091.name: A chess set with extra pieces that are confusingly shaped

U0002.name: +30 aura, but you lose 90% of your fights.

U1833.name: Cool Whip
U1833.description: You now have a 5-foot long leather whip.

U1833-A0000.name: Off the Chain
U1833-A0000.description: The whip is now a metal chain with a spiked flail on the very tip of it.

U1833-A0001.name: Devo Fan
U1833-A0001.description: The whip is now a a fire whip.

U1833-A0002.name: How Can I Help You Hombre
U1833-A0002.description: The whip now can be mechanically shot out, used as a grappling hook, or set between up to 3 points as a tripwire.

U1833-A0003.name: Earnest Evans
U1833-A0003.description: Your spine is now a whip and can freely bend in any direction.

U1191.name: You can telly-bridge indefinitely, but only in Minecraft

U1132.name: Wheel
U1132.description: Become a wheel at will, but you must wear a backwards red ballcap with spikes protruding from the inside of the cap’s dome collecting your blood at all times

U0592.name: High Roller
U0592.description: Lck now slightly increases Sacred attributes

U0168.name: A replica of Megaman's helmet made of foam

U0480.name: Equality
U0480.description: You also have a small chance to spawn with infernal buffs.
